name: Vincent Dixie
subject: Thank you.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vincent Dixie for Tennessee
body:
We’ve made history before. Now, it’s time to flip this seat.

[|
---](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/a8siqk_Fg-PF-tuHlsLorA~~/AAUS1hA~/rvZj1BkkYwbnQFs-Ev_dWxod5GcH0FHU43XXJgJNmqFjoVBPKXJAWx7rvaxwy-IERjK_v8mfqvRIVF4D7XIWTpXm5Wm6YbM2f-gtYEr-omU87yEaH_V7PQU9Ba2qK55ZxUnHp4Mcjogmro8FVv6AJyTeyGPTnJWhWnPur7OsMVo~)
| | | | Happy August, Peter! It’s Vincent Dixie. I wanted to reach out personally to say _thank you_. Since I announced my run for Congress in Tennessee’s 7th District, I have felt the energy from everyday people exhausted by the rising cost of living and the broken promises coming out of Washington. I know that struggle firsthand. I was raised in Chattanooga by a single mom who did everything she could to hold things together. I started working at 14. By 15, I was driving my mom to and from work – learning early what responsibility meant. Now, I’m running for Congress because working families deserve a voice that doesn’t back down from a fight — and doesn’t forget where we come from. This is a rare moment. TN-07 is one of the most flippable seats in the country after 40 years of Republican control. We’ve made history before. I became the first Black leader of a legislative caucus in Tennessee by fighting like hell for everyday people. Let’s keep that momentum going. Let’s turn up the heat — and flip this seat. —Vincent Dixie [](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/fbiqRilYb_88pl7BfYiBBw~~/AAUS1hA~/0OhOxLdpQ9RnYWwXgjxXkaXWKNqTkctGr7W0ARAUAcMkrXDqezwv0rOnwAsOq9v4ICHYk7OwI1WiNDIfjsGkQf6ZTnuma9_Q5osodD2auAz6811Ip5OO6qdqLjwzHHeMUMvNO-f5aDgpOba5AHxZ2nKgT2odqKf88H85WfKjBEBx3nZ-7DENfTvLUx-her0zxI6OpBxk43wSqBN4R02bA5Vql3CYjoXAk0173RxKoOZopYgvbW7cEAywiqrAw_K-4_9xy4fKcRRlbc8w3QLUzIdxsb57IG7pn5JVsAJXOmQ~)

* * *
_Vincent Dixie is a small business owner, husband, and State Representative who has passed bipartisan laws, taken on corruption, and delivered real results for Tennessee families. Now he’s running for Congress to lower costs, protect Medicare and Social Security, and finally put working people first._ **[**DONATE »** ](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/fbiqRilYb_88pl7BfYiBBw~~/AAUS1hA~/0OhOxLdpQ9RnYWwXgjxXkaXWKNqTkctGr7W0ARAUAcMkrXDqezwv0rOnwAsOq9v4ICHYk7OwI1WiNDIfjsGkQf6ZTnuma9_Q5osodD2auAz6811Ip5OO6qdqLjwzHHeMUMvNO-f5aDgpOba5AHxZ2nKgT2odqKf88H85WfKjBEBx3nZ-7DENfTvLUx-her0zxI6OpBxk43wSqBN4R02bA5Vql3CYjoXAk0173RxKoOZopYgvbW7cEAywiqrAw_K-4_9xy4fKcRRlbc8w3QLUzIdxsb57IG7pn5JVsAJXOmQ~) ** **

Since I announced my run for Congress in Tennessee’s 7th District, I have felt the energy from everyday people exhausted by the rising cost of living and the broken promises coming out of Washington. By 15, I was driving my mom to and from work – learning early what responsibility meant. Now, I’m running for Congress because working families deserve a voice that doesn’t back down from a fight — and doesn’t forget where we come from. This is a rare moment. TN-07 is one of the most flippable seats in the country after 40 years of Republican control. We’ve made history before. I became the first Black leader of a legislative caucus in Tennessee by fighting like hell for everyday people. Let’s keep that momentum going. Let’s turn up the heat — and flip this seat. —Vincent Dixie ~ Vincent Dixie is a small business owner, husband, and State Representative who has passed bipartisan laws, taken on corruption, and delivered real results for Tennessee families. | | What do jeans and lemonade have in common? They’re racist. American Eagle just put out a [new ad](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/s/c/dRDoAiA8JbBLhrF-qMhUZnx_tEWUXlVK7usmCU1w_qiRhinZS14-2hWQjV3PlWit9WQ0L7GmLMwNIRET4Ls3HgiLonB01xqYycNQ8Odqwt2Cze9nrtCBFYY7oRumWa2UMtU6wR3NkGhqTjIhYw3ZDsLQuud7SkCpT6mGMUNualKBJzpm9BgjC5RKHPzrJyvpbAfG1W9x876a-rMEl4I88FkLbB4Sx21pnlMoVoOK0BZIuHsh_ppl03lZEGuMfkdmvBFIfU7EkD3dcPjyG4D5FDyK2sP5EPfCw4Ifeaqvr5osXsiJR4we9jEyIqhZlWZXRZA2y20LqJw8wdrmzrnrgias7nkavmMTdocucBItM3DrZEElDkEolvIE6e0n1vHaFt_1Q1zhvkXeTh56QwN0WC9WK7g1GkBfwnKED1iXtQv4qvU8NQSbKpNS3RSnDBz5arbViXmTj1CUphlItqnkKbJ0x4XlEcr45oYsFZnOmmoBExkQuUIVCmrIGBJs749ZM4CMM6P7DciNxqgRMKh1EnGb_ult_0uOtJpB2e_w-HRLLxatA2F_c7x4v1ApA20Z_xKz4ju-1oUi0mNAjzH1yR7Ezg/VIyi9_tqtEn-s6Hjja9fqJLRzft8fpff/11) featuring Sydney Sweeney (some Hollywood type I’ve honestly never heard of). It's just a clever spot where she talks about “genes” being passed down—then flips the script and says _her_ “jeans” are blue. Simple and harmless, right? Wrong. The liberal media and internet trolls wasted no time calling it racist, accusing the company of promoting eugenics, and dragging out the Nazi comparisons, which really grinds my gears. I’ve said it before, and I’ll say it again: Comparing anything to the Holocaust is disgusting, lazy, and downright wrong. That’s just the go-to for Democrats when someone doesn’t check all the diversity boxes they cling to. But it’s not just American Eagle. Dunkin’ Donuts is [catching heat](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/s/c/U4kYHj-8l6mv6qlf9RuBEjr6HBuj3yTczCw4aDvu8qpmo6joiJBV9OGGB7MsnMTf0fCH8QHtZ95YbApIqIX6z-3RPX4iPfB0G47pGKu2F8HSbxlJEhJHwP2KQuwcP6PbU1qi0eQg_vpLV1ieBoHQ0GITrpwHJ1Zr8iD43PBgywf1_aSgvcnFHfWAz0yWSaCjIXy2bFDC55xiUtzDV9zvRgwcaEau7Hc1LB_-kAxA2SaRZMY6SjtVZh62PMQCAPqndZ8C2jynZhT_yBtge3DgO4tXvLl8j1XgGQgYhOWL-ECI3ZNWziqo8u3TIEsBUsNlj2tVU9uBim02e1r8KIiTLSrLc0lwiWGg0033H-SF0vhIAJEetsPZFtVSrTe6wnzL_d20VWiHbkgnWbArugjY8-7rQcgxvU_wUGjA4XDixnRKbXjWxLs_9SepjdvTP-8HeL2DLhCgPtvqE7nlddibYn96z5HjBPa5AmuA5s4TlqTYQZ5QQDmHV-hI5AhyN0KikVg_V3XPyLnoqeirowT8y0cMLGUCiSEfD95zT8_QV5FPnbYmjenUak2Qf969tGTMLwz2641-pg/n4sxDZ5pyDWy_3jHNHLZrN0w7vMSncol/11) now too. The liberal mob is coming after them for an ad where a young teen-idol type of guy thanks good genes for his golden tan as he drinks some sorta lemonade beverage. That’s it. That’s the hysteria-inducing controversy. Folks, this is what the Left is worried about. Not our country’s spiraling debt. Not the border. Not even the cost of living. They’d rather pitch a fit over commercials about denim and fruity drinks. This pointless drama is exactly why they lost last year—and it sure [isn’t helping their chances](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/s/c/sAWZeat8OXbQhqIqG3gzEkwH3JxP2VM1-IBxbzNXzJGXKogizu22tbyiGWqtalO4xCJSuLJF3-I1bmMYk5fjcecOWuD1gEDnyB6FoX6EShf2nwcKHkr74VvKHlNhRGagEm-IvV___gJrpYl0jW3OVsKE-77D0fyUbuYDTdb3_1l84lq-CdYEEka_f_wUKpZ3ZcjR5q4DO042lsTYRw9D2UuVHjb4DtY1-Bs5bv1TTwa69ORvdREmjtNuDr2LS7XTWwQpgEhiF2vfxWfHhI-I4gXTe59mX31cTH4-5mVgBQoh3pOTiTCMGDyyWRovBbFDA1HRXKxeHJq1vbx85FYlVviCvDQEinjk1HE9pipv6ga0ni2o-hMP2zDnDvnGNLmQpE4iN0zyBa4YxUGE8uRz4a1qwm9eS8LY4Uo_NzGfm35VtdX5rTouM4bhCIz0iiFRVhGmMDTLaKdWS1Lrjn8CtWqW082K1mhkEkG5VMjWtBuGFtqbNPQwQgTHNt4SOLYoF0RVnD8/tsNc17sC7xe9t9jnUIWv9rVOmLdx06Bx/11) as we approach the midterms. Meanwhile, I’m back in East Tennessee for our district work period, talking to folks about real issues that affect their everyday lives. If Democrats put half as much energy into talking to real people as they do screaming into the void, this country would be a lot better off. They may even fix a problem or two. I really thought President Trump’s big victory was going to be a wake-up call for the radical Left, but I guess it’s true what they say—you can’t teach an old dog new tricks. Let ‘em whine and we’ll keep working.

They patched me up and got me [back on the road](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/s/c/lIHpUiDM9aBSt-8Lwc8_TdICpiW8hRR0l52u8exxLO1w6_9DbBKH8_2IhU69oj9cdGVM0alhvPf36I0R42Px9sXNuMp96-ZLWHK7oNXLzrPyWBnyXvh9yGM0gx52djOysm54-m0AB0ECVGqyUefpkCJ-okvkme55V7G7h4M0Q9jdOAXik3NR9ponsyc-8woBfvoC0hol7cFtnxFvpTlztKLuzuNHehwoAk5IVgA-xkwS0ykioM7Y7TQ8KoO1o91OXgjBRaPYrolVERdPRdlhoY96DvvrK2TUQ09_qHf4GWJcQjEZyt2S0PdP4UQF2-MUcQ_MyFtDNM9L0AllcrCcKBNfK18xGidOqdMxN6J208F7iKj3DtgdkkMBlIrafbt0EFpTZK3rSqV_YkYpKQfSSOjSVx2i3mqWaxYo01EssutppL_Deg/o57x5RNDeoTq6SZWzaljrXUJjpy6WZUb/11), helping me make the most of this district work period. From [Smith County](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/s/c/64JG2zpJG65aKxuWPzF6A2HUQy42gPVbqDWi4uTtZiZ2ncD-JGNAMpZM9s851nLNTwmZpHUm5VFmv8jMzPCV6BDR-qRRuWthMiNSBRtYlZY0cBwXip7aFQPKYSnfPp6gAdHDfbjh1kpBoogyZqVQH-Ptz_0Ucseb78r5rY8jSn3HvN7kAZBkQ7IzqKY9dFVCQ-EM-xsI4iJFLrL8eHqnzEk2m0DKrV-pYxwCkWaSXyjBWjkbNHKpJSaOhFr6390VIbsnV0ArmClgEAxVBghjvcVsAQ8mzswX30pTDjUMHTfo9DPLydsy7blwhSO-_ZvQcDEZyWCqzm-_QJgAIeQ6dLlC9Z1SvsM9b5jZZvEhqrVEciIQmWYzm68TtnraZvT3PGQCAfEmhUxpB6dnLLw5eMJfZiTAk1aABawA0W-kG4QmNwDCyw/ShYHx848NuwA3kX7OUTWTYYa-7ROkLb9/11) to [Maury County](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/s/c/ieWhDNFvT-ppsPd9Mh9eCQUhXpewh9mgQfJYc__Gw-DH1WKdNyIc5as_W22BXSVwVD1q7Ir_jZ2tFAypBUhC-ei5PBrs6fim534Q3Pd1OnrCi3pPjHSGKha03P3_n8MqIczYF6GfDQwE5R_wFlq7QBMxZbyay_ClKBOG4oHzCjG7X8arDBIHu75kXNbBREOUzTClPdvKv-ro5TY1s0tAWumOzR0trJwestVrgok8xQI06h_GXidsMFJ-TUcU638_XZxvQ6GEh_8rTbNvW8NVAvp5MBd_54CHj0v8QZgL9wt66JJM8n1Hp1lr45CCOtePeIx_G-9CpAICD-9SbDhmPMZ3zUndS7NLlpKdCtOo8MuBsaFIX5V00NTIKHpsxvV0mcHkYqckf7UTgNlS8N1WnaLoFantL20ZHXcG3FqFhm8lB0hNxqw/EtJ47Wz4RMHHGTcTgEi-q1gG1rOzWW8Y/11) to [Campbell County](http://links.burchettforcongress._HVd0QvJ6vK73XngSEWva3hMLK0jQsAhKzjvjAjW7BlmxsHSrPsivxOvTRVSK9BzFoolfkDccOmhL2skPR35h9qj7PEyi69-RDlt4dJrbJH-_Ry-8QMiZDBdtoORBQ/4OVJnhy6g-gZXfK5KAuJ-hYDdfwXoXI4/11), I’ve been all over the place talking to constituents about what we’re working on in Congress, and more importantly, asking how we can do it better. It’s been a busy week, but I couldn’t be more grateful to serve people like you. It’s always a pleasure putting faces to names, hearing what’s on your mind, and having down-to-earth conversations. Grabbing a few chicken strips from [Hoskins Drug Store](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/s/c/TwoIS9gOupX2b96SIKAleoB6G4XWknsP1ScYgzHJPfcpHBYb9E6k_MPM_EnonCmPgxNc2xISHJ3P5QecYEbAP5CtoyCX31RwQfEozpUMuPt3b-IyqZdtc7Y7WrVMtqE9SE22pvYizbSOQGfE6nNVKXRfX7urtStWAin6z_t8wTpcRWWDuO_r3TcGyUeVuS4_0Le99GG5741wLl2G5WQ2zTH4OpALdSVMI7PtsA50rh49U-ZZ7PL4EquFze8iXn5I2Mm4Qob20DOFbsDNp7fBFUqTz1OGnLlt9BbNPoyLj1JBo4FeqoNPhqFpgkwgSC5VH8NFn8gjAyb5eccLtSk-PQN_9fV9qWrqMoD32V8IjivUd-HtS1XWS4Qc19FcEN7kvZPDDEViuwjiKInMpZEE-gysVW5gmsU8m2544JjInFLXy376v4s/30xMeUE44r2uAE-E85yYZPrFBN9K1Lww/11) along the way doesn’t hurt either. And yes, that’s your friendly reminder to support those local mom-and-pop shops that make America so dadgum special.

clean_body: TIMtalk will keep you updated on the important issues and goings-on in our campaign, in Tennessee, and in our country.| | | | | Woke Math: 👖+ 🍋= 🫨 | | | | What do jeans and lemonade have in common? They’re racist. American Eagle just put out a featuring Sydney Sweeney (some Hollywood type I’ve honestly never heard of). It's just a clever spot where she talks about “genes” being passed down—then flips the script and says her “jeans” are blue. Simple and harmless, right? Wrong. The liberal media and internet trolls wasted no time calling it racist, accusing the company of promoting eugenics, and dragging out the Nazi comparisons, which really grinds my gears. I’ve said it before, and I’ll say it again: Comparing anything to the Holocaust is disgusting, lazy, and downright wrong. That’s just the go-to for Democrats when someone doesn’t check all the diversity boxes they cling to. But it’s not just American Eagle. Dunkin’ Donuts is now too. The liberal mob is coming after them for an ad where a young teen-idol type of guy thanks good genes for his golden tan as he drinks some sorta lemonade beverage. That’s it. That’s the hysteria-inducing controversy. Folks, this is what the Left is worried about. Not our country’s spiraling debt. Not the border. Not even the cost of living. They’d rather pitch a fit over commercials about denim and fruity drinks. This pointless drama is exactly why they lost last year—and it sure as we approach the midterms. Meanwhile, I’m back in East Tennessee for our district work period, talking to folks about real issues that affect their everyday lives. If Democrats put half as much energy into talking to real people as they do screaming into the void, this country would be a lot better off. They may even fix a problem or two. I really thought President Trump’s big victory was going to be a wake-up call for the radical Left, but I guess it’s true what they say—you can’t teach an old dog new tricks. Let ‘em whine and we’ll keep working. | | On The Road Again 🚙 | | | | You probably heard I had a little run-in on the farm and . But thanks to the folks at UT Medical Center, I didn’t miss a beat. They patched me up and got me , helping me make the most of this district work period. From to to , I’ve been all over the place talking to constituents about what we’re working on in Congress, and more importantly, asking how we can do it better. It’s been a busy week, but I couldn’t be more grateful to serve people like you. It’s always a pleasure putting faces to names, hearing what’s on your mind, and having down-to-earth conversations. Grabbing a few chicken strips from along the way doesn’t hurt either. And yes, that’s your friendly reminder to support those local mom-and-pop shops that make America so dadgum special. | | Just For Fun 🥳 | | → Great-grandma’s hero 🦸 ()→ Still got that swing! 🏌️ () → Sealed with a kiss 🦭 () | | Product Of The Month 🛍 | | | | | Join the conservative movement! Chip in to help us pave the way for a solid Republican agenda. | | Stay in Touch 👇 | | | | ---|---|---|--- Paid for by Burchett for Congress

You’re going to want to see our Republican opponents' fundraising numbers, Peter:
Riverside County Sheriff Chad Bianco raised **$1.6 million** , while former Fox News host Steve Hilton **loaned his campaign $200,000** from his personal wealth.
Together, they are sitting on millions of dollars–and hoping to flip California red.
These are real threats we can’t afford to ignore. Both candidates are _Trump loyalists_ who want to bring the MAGA agenda right here to California.
And with a poll showing nearly half of California voters being open to voting for a Republican governor, they just might pull it off–unless we do everything we can to elect Katie Porter.
Katie is the Democratic frontrunner, but our campaign needs to build even more momentum to power us to victory. The election may be next year, but the GOP is already getting to work–and so must we.

subject: Folks in D.C. never say “thank you.”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican National Committee
body:
[****](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/SkN8cutgCzrkaTalU9YjEiEn-A0RlQZDVedAaWsXPtxfnkAqUhwuCf6qgdHCC8TZSxBJzxOGUkDPxkkvC6xLACdLMcRPjBZaDXqln6rtUIxyXxvBTeZ5o2E-L5TwmL_BNP6L8pfJsr3ekj2OBnbOIUzsOSg47cTe03lxkHJ1wqZRRd3-nWoWNcXZHnWht0Jg2OI9YPTjbFk8lK7gAMq4Ic0rDxUu53ieGPWGOtUvL-cW9zP3Dcn88WrYwVTCUwffp4XNJhNgyIHbpCRRUhtV9Xf_aaWG-Lskb3KsqhPzgl5KUtMhvQATmFSI4JQwjfTxmeERLG4MEj6n_MF_wQmfwBOba7UASdT9fGie1RKuhwICK3tTz1XMOS_I7VRte6-7F5KnI-nwtgSlqU3n8vXc62nrou5Hcv2okwNpzlC0sjmksLoltzJ-lnpMSWIpi_SCXR1pXKTCA4zPFwngessv6JoyTNcSpEXnapnGaxx6TdVe-qL_IevqCKVGudJleSxv6LOEfIoaErL6o8lhp5gtu335plHBpjXkf8-dE7X0vg2obrO4fDReJICsEFVt-LonAUloChEyBjwHIc71j28t2WRkifuCyWe1ni18-2g6ESNmmrvdjkPFfy8QwQH-31UtYvXZcjyk0ltajEtOqv8MvcM1O_-Fv41AV6mdW8ydV-vsrkPgnbH9Rm9aE90d5is2D0RwCBpcjcgOq8FWsXR2JAgobK-NMe1Kj_BO5eVJZTVwR3vI_dvpQmSoog2_-8tBddhTtXwqvrwXvUHnjlfrfIdN2y9ayRpheZCa-ZdjYuyuF51Hoim-jxbSC5W7IHADR9sooK-U6zrmK53qOOF6J7Xt6URgHwXjdXLAB8c93w3ejrbwRhsAdKGnsH-CzbuvVIbJtfDedRYEixexa6zG0vMKgt-UE9yOtLl9wn0WaXWJkwrtA3w2KT87hWH_uH_0vgEWx5THm1QAZr4MnUbQmSXJOjTbKAKpw1CwGcxqUe5VP-LFVR1nYTJCdi0PQzET2flij8nrIg/ewOD--7vLqE0bOf9nPZeYzo0I7EbveM3/11)
**JD VANCE sent you a secret message that may take your breathe away.**
**-- -BEGIN MEMO---**

You know what really ticks me off?

Politicians in D.C. never say "**_thank you_**."

They beg for your vote and hard-earned money but once their election is over, they leave you in the **dust**.

**Regular folks like you are the backbone of this country, yet people in Washington seem to _forget_ that.**

I want to put the manners my Mamaw taught me to good use, so here goes:

**THANK YOU for always having President Trump's back.**

**THANK YOU for your unwavering support of MAGA.**

**And THANK YOU for proudly fighting for the greatest country on Earth.**

You are an American grassroots hero, which is why I've nominated you for the **RNC 's LIVING LEGEND** award.

But I noticed you haven't accepted it yet...

They beg for your vote and hard-earned money but once their election is over, they leave you in the dust. Regular folks like you are the backbone of this country, yet people in Washington seem to forget that. I want to put the manners my Mamaw taught me to good use, so here goes: THANK YOU for always having President Trump's back. THANK YOU for your unwavering support of MAGA. And THANK YOU for proudly fighting for the greatest country on Earth. You are an American grassroots hero, which is why I've nominated you for the RNC 's LIVING LEGEND award. But I noticed you haven't accepted it yet... This is my small way to say THANK YOU , I hope you accept. The RNC 's Living Legend award designates YOU as a TOP ally of our party and MAGA. With Trump loyalists in Congress ramping up attacks and the Social Security Administration underfunded and understaffed, our safety net is under siege.

**Millions depend on Social Security to cover rent, groceries, and medication. We can’t afford to lose it.**

And now, after the GOP’s passed the largest Medicaid cut in U.S. history, we’re staring down a coordinated campaign to dismantle every vital safety net program we have.

**That’s why we’re launching the Social Security Task Force – a grassroots counterforce of defenders, donors, and activists who will fight tooth and nail to protect what we’ve earned.**

Your donation helps us:
✅ Power petition and voter outreach in key districts
✅ Hold MAGA Republicans accountable

clean_body: Join the grassroots Task Force standing up to Trump’s cuts | = Earlier this year, Trump’s allies in Congress proposed slashing Social Security – and they’re not backing down. 📉From raising the retirement age to gutting benefits, the attacks are escalating – and millions of seniors, veterans, and working families are at risk. We’re building a grassroots army to stop Trump’s MAGA cuts to Social Security. = | = With Trump loyalists in Congress ramping up attacks and the Social Security Administration underfunded and understaffed, our safety net is under siege. Millions depend on Social Security to cover rent, groceries, and medication. We can’t afford to lose it. And now, after the GOP’s passed the largest Medicaid cut in U.S. history, we’re staring down a coordinated campaign to dismantle every vital safety net program we have. That’s why we’re launching the Social Security Task Force – a grassroots counterforce of defenders, donors, and activists who will fight tooth and nail to protect what we’ve earned. Your donation helps us: ✅ Power petition and voter outreach in key districts ✅ Hold MAGA Republicans accountable ✅ Elect Democrats who will defend Social Security, not destroy it = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: **= = = Together, we’ll protect what’s ours, and stop the MAGA agenda in its tracks. name: Thank you, Stephen Colbert! (via VPP)
subject: Re: Stephen Colbert’s show ENDING >>>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
This marks the end of an incredible and honorable era.
| **This is __exactly__ what Trump had in mind when he went after CBS:** [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/92661?t=6&akid=20787%2E878179%2E4pBMw1) _Trump is attacking any voice that holds him accountable and speaks truth to his MAGA lies!_

That’s why he’s absolutely thrilled that Stephen Colbert’s late night program has been cancelled. **He said he “absolutely loves” that Colbert got fired — _we’re APPALLED!_**

[**To thank Stephen Colbert for his decade of hard work in the face of escalating MAGA attacks, we’re sending him a letter tomorrow at 9am promptly. Rush $3 to add your name before we hit send »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/92661?t=7&akid=20787%2E878179%2E4pBMw1) | [**CHIP IN $3 TO SIGN NOW »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/92661?t=8&akid=20787%2E878179%2E4pBMw1)
---
TO: Stephen Colbert
FROM: A grateful Democrat
Subject: Thank you. Dear Stephen Colbert,

**Thank you.** Your commitment to journalistic integrity and the truth over the last 10 years has been truly inspirational and has kept us all laughing through the MAGA madness.

While Fox News and other far-right outlets spew misinformation and conspiracy theories, you have been a constant, outstanding voice for our democracy.

**We know this is exactly the outcome that Trump and his MAGA cronies wished for — _and we are committed to fighting back tirelessly to protect the free press._**

While I’m going to miss seeing you on TV every night, I’m glad you’ll finally be getting the much-needed rest and recuperation you deserve.

[**So I’m signing this letter today by chipping in $3 to VPP to thank you for your years of service and to join VPP in the fight against Trump’s attacks on the free press. It is _absolutely critical_ that we elect good Democrats who will stand with your progressive values and honor your legacy, and we are so sad to see you go. »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/92661?t=9&akid=20787%2E878179%2E4pBMw1) [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/92661?t=10&akid=20787%2E878179%2E4pBMw1) | [**CHIP IN $3 TO SIGN NOW »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/92661?t=11&akid=20787%2E878179%2E4pBMw1)
---
**_X A proud Democrat_**
\- The Voter Protection Project
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=20787%2E878179%2E4pBMw1). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=20787%2E878179%2E4pBMw1).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=20787%2E878179%2E4pBMw1) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=12&akid=20787%2E878179%2E4pBMw1). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=20787%2E878179%2E4pBMw1)
---
[Donate Just One Time »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/124?t=5&akid=20787%2E878179%2E4pBMw1)

body:

Earlier this week I noted how [hundreds of paid subscribers cancelled their support of Let's Address This, many citing my advocacy for Gaza](https://substack.com/redirect/d335f746-1db6-42e3-b4f3-52d0cc631da2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and Palestinian human rights. And I promised that in response, I would double down on my advocacy to end this genocide. Now, YouTube has removed my interview with globally renowned Palestinian-Canadian human rights lawyer Diana Buttu. And guess what? We're doubling down. **Let 's Address This.**
**Let's Address This with Qasim Rashid is a reader-supported publication. To receive new posts and support my work, consider becoming a free or paid subscriber.**
[ Upgrade to paid](https://substack..FJdWLmMAvzhT42Rv3JX1_o_iJzarK9fYmwBPcYASwVs?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=169896659)
It is worth noting that YouTube is owned by Google, and Google is one of the companies [the United Nations has identified as complicit in Israel's genocide of Palestinians](https://substack.com/redirect/e0286ecc-0987-4a2a-aa0b-724549648a1b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Therefore, I am unsurprised that YouTube would remove a hard-hitting interview with one of the world's leading scholars on Palestine and the horrific apartheid and genocide through which Palestinians have suffered for generations.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/566ef3d0-55bf-4ef6-b28b-be95efc9fa4f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..FJdWLmMAvzhT42Rv3JX1_o_iJzarK9fYmwBPcYASwVs?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=169896659)
My team and I are appealing YouTube's decision and we hope to restore our account and the interview. In the meantime, we cannot sit idle as the genocide of Palestinians rages on. Here is my full interview with renowned international human rights lawyer Diana Buttu. Please watch, share, and spread widely. And remember to hit [subscribe](https://substack.com/redirect/8b39822d-8d7c-4377-ac44-9c0057f06a93?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) so we can continue to bring these important stories on human rights to the forefront, even as corporate media and mega corporations try to whitewash them into oblivion.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/e45fd061-e307-47b5-87e6-429c75b039b4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
**As major corporations and social media continue to censor content on Palestine and human rights, consider becoming a free or paid subscriber to Let 's Address This to help advance the fight for justice.**
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..FJdWLmMAvzhT42Rv3JX1_o_iJzarK9fYmwBPcYASwVs?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=169896659)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/47e607e5-3a37-4eff-b083-ad2b9ddd4846?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|

name: Real Texas PAC
subject: He’s not bluffing — Trump wants to arrest his opponents
body:
🚨 UPDATE: Trump has FURTHER escalated his fascist takeover — now detaining legal residents, firing watchdogs, and threatening to arrest governors. We need your help immediately. 👉 Rush a donation now to help us fight back » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-fightback?refcode=080125_4]
Peter, let’s not sugarcoat it:Trump is using the U.S. military to silence dissent — and threatening to arrest governors who stand in his way.
🔻 700 Marines
🔻 4,000 National Guard
🔗 Mass arrests sweep L.A.
🚫 Protesters brutalized. Silenced. Shackled.
And then Trump said Governor Gavin Newsom should be arrested for opposing him.
This is fascism. This is lawless, brutal, and deliberate.
And we can’t respond with polite statements or vague concerns.
We need a surge of grassroots resistance — now.
We’re raising emergency funds to support Democrats on the frontlines who will launch rapid-response ads, organize campaigns, and mount legal challenges. This can’t wait. If we let this stand, it will only get worse. Chip in $15 or more right now to help us crush this authoritarian power grab before it spreads further. # Friends Near Fort Wayne:
**I would love to connect! And friends from around the state, if you know of folks near Fort Wayne who would enjoy a morning gathering- spread the word. Tickets are limited and going fast!

A CREATIVE FUNDRAISER WITH SENATOR ANDREA HUNLEY** Join me in my hometown of Fort Wayne for a morning of civic creativity. We will decorate tote bags with patches, pins, stencils and more-- all while enjoying bubbly drinks, sweet treats, and great conversation. **WHEN: **Saturday, August 9 from 9am-11am **WHERE: **Sunbound Books 3215 N. Anthony Blvd, Fort Wayne This is a joyful way to connect, reflect, and raise funds to support my continued work for justice, democracy, and progress in Indiana. \------ Your contributions help support my re-election campaign. **Every dollar raised ensures that we can engage voters, hire strong team members and interns, and purchase important items like stamps, digital and television ads, and voter analytics tools.**

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: See you at the Library Day just got huge
body:
I wanted you to be one of the first to hear this awesome news.

| | |
---
| |
---
Dear Fellow Conservative,I wanted you to be one of the first to hear this awesome news. BRAVE Books has been invited by President Trump’s DOE to host our **SEE YOU AT THE LIBRARY** **DAY** at the Library of Congress! Friend, talk about taking back our libraries! Just three years ago, we were fighting to get into local public libraries across the country to counter the Left’s “Drag Queen” Story Hours. Radical librarians sabotaged our efforts. Leftists cursed us with insults. And now, thanks to unwavering support from patriots like you, on August 16th, we’ll be sharing lessons in humility, freedom, and patriotism with children and parents at the largest library in the world -- America’s Library. But as excited as I am to announce our Library of Congress event, it's also a little daunting. **SEE YOU AT THE LIBRARY DAY** just got huge. **[And that’s why I’m sending you this email with a 24-hour deadline.](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zvsgdg9404v4om823bjviboict6hddfem7nusmh8_rp22sh2s8i6epb1chh61o76c9h2bs)** Friend, I’m praying you will help BRAVE Books make the most of this incredible opportunity.
---
* Hosting **SEE YOU AT THE LIBRARY DAY** at the Library of Congress helps us reach hundreds more children and their families in person.
* The media coverage gets our conservative message in front of untold numbers of children and families who need to hear that our country and our God are good.
* And our presence at the Library of Congress sends a powerful message that America is about faith, family and freedom.

---
For too long the Left has filled the hearts and minds of children with lies. What a blessing it will be to share God’s truth on August 16th at the Library of Congress. But friend, the date is barreling towards us and our budget just skyrocketed. The new audio/visual needs alone for an event of this magnitude are more than BRAVE Books can handle without your help. | | The 1619 Project: Born on the Water by Nikole Hannah-Jones. This book teaches 6-8-year-olds about the Black Resistance movement in the United States. And then of course, there are the Scholastic Books. Scholastic has been holding schools hostage for generations with their “fundraising” promises while warping young minds in return. The school Book Fairs you may remember are now filled with disgusting books you don’t want anywhere near your grandchildren. Scholastic has a whole series of books written by former football player Colin Kaepernick who found fame by taking a knee during our National Anthem. And their current LGBTQ selections for children are pure evil. From Run Away with Me, one of their many books about an illicit affair between two high school boys, to Escape from St. Hell which tries to normalize a girl’s transition into a boy... and with thousands of titles in between... Friend, in the face of all this it’s hard to imagine that a small Christian publisher like BRAVE Books could make a difference. But listen to this... God’s design is so perfect. Did you know that the British burned our Library of Congress to the ground on August 24, 1814? Then five months later, Congress purchased Thomas Jefferson’s personal library of 6,487 books as the foundation of a new American Library. And for decades, the Left has been dragging our country further and further away from Thomas Jefferson’s original vision for our nation. But on August 16, 2025, “we the people” will bring that vision back to the Library of Congress -- back to America. We can’t do it without you. [**Please help us make SEE YOU AT THE LIBRARY DAY a success by rushing back your best emergency gift of $35, $50, or even $500.**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zcpat92cdlou5tlqcj7162augh96oli39qa4ni9o_rp22sh2s8i6epb1chh61o76c9h2bs) And because it’s so critical that you get your **crucial** gift back in just 24 hours, as a “Fast Response Bonus” for your gift of $100 or more, I’d love to send you the first book I wrote with BRAVE called As You Grow. As You Grow tells the story of a tiny seed that, through the fruit of the Spirit, turns into a mighty tree. Friend, that’s BRAVE Books. All that we do is only possible through God’s grace and your generosity. **[Now we’re at a watershed moment and I’m asking for your support.](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z7rlipgi6ib95sf3sssd2og4edtq0t2q0sno8msg_rp22sh2s8i6epb1chh61o76c9h2bs)** Whether your emergency gift is $35, $50, $100 or anything higher or lower -- what’s most important is that you respond in the next 24 hours because August 16th is just weeks away. The Holy Spirit has opened a door for us to host an incredible **SEE YOU AT THE LIBRARY DAY** at the Library of Congress. Please help us seize this opportunity to bring our message of freedom, America’s greatness, and God’s love to our nation’s capital while we have the chance. BRAVE Books is on a mission to help parents raise children who love God, love freedom, and love America! And we’re so happy you’re with us.
---
Thank you!

name: Michael Whatley
subject: This is Trump Country
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
The left is coming at me with everything they have. Will you fight with me?

Friend,

The moment I announced my run for U.S. Senate, the Left went into full-blown meltdown.

They know I helped deliver North Carolina for President Trump, **[THREE TIMES.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zbpun3tchddcdnm32c6ql8mj5eumtnrd3vq7ehq8_rp22sh2s8i6epb1chh61o70cdh2bs)**

They know I've fought to secure our elections, defend the Second Amendment, and stand up to the globalist elites.

And they know I won't back down once I get to the Senate.
[STAND WITH MICHAEL](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zn67ooh24o672sl8264akuqplm1npgqcqfn52c4o_rp22sh2s8i6epb1chh61o70cdh2bs)
**[That's why they're already dumping MILLIONS into this race to try to stop me. Biden's allies. Hollywood liberals. Radical activists. They're ALL coming for North Carolina.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zu8rc8tev09v3h2001vnr430liqllc34ub289u60_rp22sh2s8i6epb1chh61o70cdh2bs)**

But here's what they don't get:
**[NORTH CAROLINA IS TRUMP COUNTRY. And we're just getting started.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zbsse3kjorkellmups2r4bs6e78vm7tatlg0cbco_rp22sh2s8i6epb1chh61o70cdh2bs)**
With President Trump's full endorsement and YOUR support, we're going to flip this race on its head and send a clear message:
**[The America First movement is stronger than ever.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z9jrcsefokl8cqn9lf1gh102pua512789lkteiv8_rp22sh2s8i6epb1chh61o70cdh2bs)**
I need grassroots patriots like you with me from Day One. Every dollar matters. Every supporter counts.

**[Donate $10, $25, or whatever you can right now and help me FIGHT BACK.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zrb5o6jvh27rur5livv1vglgr3376e3737cm7bb8_rp22sh2s8i6epb1chh61o70cdh2bs) **

[DONATE NOW](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zb405a6fgm2p9vvhpvir2eo5n7vn01n59gitmvo8_rp22sh2s8i6epb1chh61o70cdh2bs)
Let's win this together and keep the Left out of North Carolina.

Thank you,

name: Charlie Kirk, Turning Point USA
subject: Why are students begging for this hat?
body:
What it represents is more powerful than you realize

| | | [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z7qh45ppieg1sreimagnv6snjitutlpe9gdogu7g_rp22sh2s8i6epb1chh61o70c5h2bs)
---
Friend,
---
I'll cut straight to the point... I want to send you a FREE limited-edition "47" hat...The same hat college students have literally begged for during our campus tour stops.
---
[](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zo66pqrapmb4ru5pp10str8uq77hctd8h5mnpvd8_rp22sh2s8i6epb1chh61o70c5h2bs)
---
But this isn't just any hat... It's a symbol.A symbol of what's happening right now across college campuses in America. _Students are waking up... Chanting "USA!"... Waving flags... and standing up for faith, family, and freedom._Everywhere Turning Point USA goes, we're seeing record crowds -- thousands of students -- fired up to defend this country and reject the Left's lies.And guess what?**They 're PROUD to be American.** This isn't just a moment... It's not a mere "shift"... This is a generational REVOLUTION!**And Friend, I want YOU to be part of it.**_All I ask?_**Make a gift of ANY amount to help Turning Point USA reach even more young people ...**...and I'll send you a limited-edition "47" hat as my thank-you.

---
Friend, this isn't a gimmick... It's not another piece of "merch"... This hat means something.To every student who wears one -- it's a statement: _" I'm not afraid to stand up for this country."_ To every patriot like you who fuels this mission -- it's a reminder:_ "I helped wake up a generation. I helped build a movement."_
---
[](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zhfmhqcj9uvkkir3chndcfdccee0hneccrb8vg58_rp22sh2s8i6epb1chh61o70c5h2bs)

**The "47" hat is a badge of honor for people who are saving this country.****So please -- make your first gift now to help Turning Point USA push this movement even further...**🔥 More campuses
🔥 More students
🔥 More hearts and minds changed _And I 'll send you your "47" hat as a symbol of the mission you've joined._

Let's win the American Culture War. Let's make Gen Z the MOST PATRIOTIC generation in our nation's history.Let's take this thing all the way.

For America, Charlie Kirk

Turning Point USA

name: Dinesh =?UTF-8?Q?D=E2=80=99Souza?=
subject: I need you to know something very important.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Brandon Gill for Texas
body:
I’ve prepared a brief note that I need you to read

| | | [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zlvolm30pei6c9e8i9qnsid4q3vah5tk7gr1ml68_rp22sh2s8i6epb1chh61o75c9h2bs)
---
Friend - it’s Dinesh D’Souza. I spent time writing you this urgent note. There’s a lot that needs to be said, so this message may be longer than usual. _**[But I’m humbly asking that you take just a few minutes to read until the end!](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zb64ga18335kdnv514lejisfuecab0h0hvq7meb8_rp22sh2s8i6epb1chh61o75c9h2bs)**_ _The radical left has made it their sole mission to blow up the entire MAGA movement and drag America into TYRANNY._ Whether it’s the deep state working behind the scenes, federal district judges employing lawfare, or Democrat elected officials calling for BLOOD to be spilled in the streets in resistance against ICE, they’ll stop at nothing to tear our country apart and use every power afforded to them to BLOCK the plan President Trump has promised to deliver. **Even after the recent SCOTUS ruling struck down nationwide injunctions, an activist judge has launched an attack, this time not against Pres. Trump, but instead in an attempt to BLOCK Congress from being able to make critical funding cuts that prevent your hard-earned tax dollars from being funneled to the WOKE agenda.** **Democrats are now even inspiring domestic terrorism against ICE, inciting deranged lunatics in the streets and telling them they must be willing to get SHOT. ** _Look, I’ve been called a fascist, a conspiracy theorist and been mercilessly attacked for fighting for the truth. It’s never stopped me before and it won’t stop me now._ **You see, I’m also an immigrant. I came to America with nothing. And I believe in doing everything we can to save this country from insanity. I’m not afraid to stand up for it no matter what the cost. ** **I say all this because today I want to tell you about another fearless warrior for the truth.**_**My son-in-law, Rep. Brandon Gill has been smeared by the radical left again and again.**_ Years ago, Brandon started one of President Trump’s TRUSTED NEWS OUTLETS, the DC Enquirer to **_cancel out the FAKE NEWS smear campaigns against Trump_** and give a real voice to the American people. To every rancher, every farmer, every small business owner, every worker who built this country with their bare hands. name: Young Kim
subject: Throwing in the towel
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Young Kim for Congress
body:
The truth is, my campaign is in BIG trouble

It could be time to raise the white flag, Friend.
This is the LAST thing I want to be sending you right now.
I wish I could tell you that everything is going to be okay. But the truth is, my campaign is in big trouble.
For years, the Democrats have tried every dirty trick in the book to take me down. But time after time, I've come through thanks to people like you, Friend.
But this time, I fear the writing is on the wall...
The Democrats have launched an unprecedented attack on our GOP House Majority.
A major Democrat campaign operation has labeled my seat as a TOP TARGET. They're spending millions of dollars to replace me with a far-Left radical. I'm not exaggerating when I say that if we lose my seat, our GOP House Majority is finished - FOR GOOD!
But all hope isn't lost.
We still have a shot at saving our House Majority, and that's by hitting our major fundraising goal tonight.
As a woman who knows the value of a hard-earned dollar, I don't ask this lightly. But if I'm going to be able to keep up the fight for the American Dream, I'm going to need your support.
[So what do you say, Friend? Can I count on you?](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z1orn3gbu99kkbhhev8o2frlbrdqk03devdo8k60_rp22sh2s8i6epb1chh61o71cdh2bs)[DONATE

name: GOP Presidential
subject: Thomas Sowell: Trickle Down Theory and Tax Cuts for the Rich
body:
I hear from people all the time that Thomas Sowell is one of their heroes.

| | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z11as19djoaqknbpvk136qehoq5joja9kaki8958_rp22sh2s8i6epb1chh61o71cth2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend,I hear from people all the time that Thomas Sowell is one of their heroes. For those people--and you may be among them--I'm thrilled to share a digital copy of one of his commentaries with you, absolutely free: _[**_"_****_Trickle Down " Theory and "Tax Cuts for the Rich._****_"_**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zncim8qqch1mf1rnghsllsup168o5k7tofrmbap0_rp22sh2s8i6epb1chh61o71cth2bs)_
---
| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2ztj0tqjv3tn5jopqen09trlqofqomcs0ifis856g_rp22sh2s8i6epb1chh61o71cth2bs)
---
| | "Tax cuts for the rich" is a favorite argument of those who oppose lower tax rates. But does imposing higher tax rates on wealthy Americans actually increase the amount of revenue coming into the federal government? Hoover Institution Senior Fellow **Thomas Sowell takes an empirical approach** in his commentary, [**_"_****_Trickle Down " Theory and "Tax Cuts for the Rich._****_"_**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zhp8fp1s3rc7i012hi24q5ll7naoa9uvk84ucc0g_rp22sh2s8i6epb1chh61o71cth2bs) Sowell separates fact from fiction when it comes to tax rates and uses real life data and examples to prove that lower tax rates for all actually lead to greater revenue for the government. As a friend and supporter of the Hoover Institution, we are proud to offer you this valuable, thought-provoking resource free of charge.[**Click here to get your free copy of**** _ "Trickle Down" Theory and "Tax Cuts for the Rich" _****now.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z7j9ns76vdt609rkmksqa9fukhrvc86hs1ite1go_rp22sh2s8i6epb1chh61o71cth2bs) Thanks,Greg Greg Stamps | _Online Development_ Hoover Institution | Stanford University
---
_With its eminent scholars and world-renowned Library and Archives, the Hoover Institution is a non-partisan, data-driven policy research organization that seeks to improve the human condition by advancing ideas that promote economic prosperity, national security, and democratic governance. Over more than one hundred years, Hoover's work has directly led to policies that have produced greater freedom, democracy, and opportunity in the United States and around the world._
---

name: AMAC Action
subject: A ticking time-bomb set by Joe Biden and Kamala Harris
body:
It isn’t rocket-science. It’s basic math.

| |
---
| | It isn’t rocket-science. It’s basic math.
---
| |
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zr7kdthf5hfrc48if0q8rfju70rlkaqj1sakvnj0_rp22sh2s8i6epb1chh61o76c9h2bs)
---
| | **“****A disproportionate number of illegal immigrants go to blue states, they amplify the effect of a blue state vote. My understanding is that Democrats would lose approximately 20 seats in the house if illegals were not counted in census. And that’s also 20 less electoral votes for president.**** ** **So, illegals absolutely do impact who controls the House and the presidency.”****~** Elon Musk
---
| | Fellow Conservative,Elon Musk is right. It isn’t rocket-science. It’s basic math. It’s also a ticking time-bomb set by Joe Biden and Kamala Harris – in the form of 11.5 million illegals entering our country on their watch – one which will explode shortly after President Trump leaves office in 2029.While you and I have no doubt President Trump will deliver on his promise to secure the border, this threat will not go away. The truth is, without immediate action, these illegal aliens will be counted in the U.S. Census, which determines both the apportionment of seats in the House of Representatives _and_ the number of electoral votes given to each state. Whether they came because, four years ago, Kamala Harris and Joe Biden prompted them to “surge to the border” for asylum or because of blue-states offering sanctuary status, “free” health care, “free” cell phones, “free” housing, and “free” college...it doesn’t matter. The result is the same.Your vote is _already_ being **watered down** in Congress. Your vote is _already_ being **watered down** in the Electoral College.And every day reports are popping up of non-citizens, illegal aliens, and convicted felons being registered to vote in cities and entire swing-states across the country, which means your vote may be fully **canceled out in future elections**. **_American elections should be decided by American citizens._****[If you agree then please sign your “BAN NON-CITIZEN VOTING” Petition to Amend the U.S. Constitution so the chaos we’re seeing now _never_ happens again in America.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z0c9ikbpur6857lt71dmapgah82f28sr18spb5n8_rp22sh2s8i6epb1chh61o76c9h2bs)**Because, here’s the scary part:The last census took place in 2020. That was _before_ the 11.5 million illegal aliens who invaded our country under Joe Biden and Kamala Harris. To put it in context, there are only 8 states in America with a population over 11 million. So, it’s as if the radical Left just imported the 9th largest state in America. That’s more than North Carolina (10.8 million), Michigan (10 million), New Jersey (9.2 million), or Virginia (8.7 million).You get the picture. That’s why urgent action is needed to pass a Constitutional Amendment to ban illegal aliens from voting and from being counted for purposes of congressional and electoral vote apportionment. The next census in less than 6 years away. If those 11.5 million illegal aliens are counted in the census or are allowed to vote in the intervening years, you and I simply won’t have a country. **[It’s vitally important that your representatives in Washington and in your state legislature hear this demand directly from you.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zll6bqku53lhb6k9dhvmi42nnfv65emph5c5uje0_rp22sh2s8i6epb1chh61o76c9h2bs)** Because, quite honestly, they think they can pull a fast one on you. They think you and I will be so relieved to see the border secure again and criminal illegal aliens deported, that you and I will be oblivious to this threat lying dormant under our very eyes.No way.My name is Rebecca Weber. I’m the chairwoman of AMAC Action. **AMAC Action is the most influential advocacy group in the country when it comes to standing for the values of conservative Seniors.****We’ve got 72 chapters and 300 volunteer delegates, who are the “feet on the street” advocates who contact Members of Congress and state legislators in their district offices.** **Moreover, our chapters and delegates help organize Town Hall meetings with elected officials and candidates to enable those locally of our 2,000,000 AMAC members to meet, hear, and question them.****And you should also know that we now have more than 337,000 AMAC members who respond to our “calls-to-action” and weigh in with members of the** **U.S. House and Senate, as well as their state legislators on the issues.** Quite simply, when we speak, Washington listens. [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z518dbm1tai37vfmpvfv32g8c6l1p207dk1mijvo_rp22sh2s8i6epb1chh61o76c9h2bs)**[And AMAC Action needs your help today in this do-or-die battle to pass a Constitutional Amendment to protect your vote from being canceled out by an illegal alien or a convicted felon.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zd4v7f7hgv3rp7vur0nuknim8a42dvc6veob3ar0_rp22sh2s8i6epb1chh61o76c9h2bs)** But I can’t do it without you. **No matter what issue you care about the most, if you and I don’t have a secure,_honest_ elections... none of it matters.**Inflation. Illegal immigration. Violent Crime. Drug use. Homelessness. The 2nd Amendment. Out of control spending. Social Security and Medicare insolvency. Right to Life. Indoctrination in our schools. Endless foreign wars. You name it. **[So please follow this link to sign your “BAN NON-CITIZEN VOTING” Petition to Amend the U.S. Constitution](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zki7hbsnupm6rsrj9tg6u0vvrcsd5gm5mpep2f20_rp22sh2s8i6epb1chh61o76c9h2bs)** so that AMAC Action can put your representatives in Washington and in the state legislature on notice with a simple demand: Namely, that you will not tolerate this erosion of your vote.Now, here’s the bad news:Most state constitutions grant voting rights to “every” citizen, open-ended language that liberal activists argue permits localities to authorize non-citizen and even illegal alien voting. States should amend their constitutions to instead permit “only” citizens to vote. But there’s good news, too:Seven states have _expressly_ banned non-citizen voting already: Alabama, Arizona, Colorado, Florida, Louisiana, North Dakota, and Ohio.**What’s more, voters approve of constitutional amendments to ban non-citizen voting by overwhelming margins. Nearly 77% of Ohio voters approved a measure in 2022, while nearly 63% of Colorado voters approved one in 2020.** This is a solution whose time has come. You and I can do this. **[That’s why, when you’ve signed your “BAN NON-CITIZEN VOTING” Petition to Amend the U.S. Constitution](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zpjjrq1uq2nf5dc9n2lnro5dqjhl8hj5vlg4i3r8_rp22sh2s8i6epb1chh61o76c9h2bs), I'm also asking you to make a one-time contribution of $35 to give AMAC Action the resources to send out, collect, process, and tabulate millions of petitions.** The reality is, we don’t get a dime of taxpayer funding. Our funding comes from grassroots conservatives like you who care deeply about the future of America. This is important. _It means we can’t be bought._ On the other hand, the leftwing election fraud machine is funded by leftwing billionaires like Mark Zuckerberg and George Soros who are actively funneling _billions_ to dark money “non-profit” groups to “**reshape** ” our elections and our electorate.With that said, if you’re able to make a larger contribution – say $50, $75, $125, $250, $500, or even $1,000 – it would really be a life saver. Please hurry. In order to secure your vote in all future elections – and with 11.5 million illegals chomping to be included in the next census – **[your “BAN NON-CITIZEN VOTING” Petition to Amend the U.S. Constitution is vitally important.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zucbqhmiut1votu9db2vfd3lvb1tvpqt4ihukhc8_rp22sh2s8i6epb1chh61o76c9h2bs)** Yes, this is about saving your vote from being canceled. It’s also about saving America.And it all starts with the straightforward premise that non-citizens and illegal aliens – no matter how many Kamala Harris and Joe Biden imported on their watch – should be banned from voting _and_ banned from being counted for apportioning congressional seats and electoral votes. Thank you in advance for joining the fight to secure your vote
---
[ **SIGN THE PETITION**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z7bq6oh8c6cf8etb1koi0eukc8mtatvntlrfne20_rp22sh2s8i6epb1chh61o76c9h2bs)

**Rebecca Weber,_Chairwoman_****AMAC Action**

My understanding is that Democrats would lose approximately 20 seats in the house if illegals were not counted in census. And that’s also 20 less electoral votes for president. So, illegals absolutely do impact who controls the House and the presidency.”~ Elon Musk | | Fellow Conservative,Elon Musk is right. It isn’t rocket-science. It’s basic math. It’s also a ticking time-bomb set by Joe Biden and Kamala Harris – in the form of 11.5 million illegals entering our country on their watch – one which will explode shortly after President Trump leaves office in 2029.While you and I have no doubt President Trump will deliver on his promise to secure the border, this threat will not go away. The truth is, without immediate action, these illegal aliens will be counted in the U.S. Census, which determines both the apportionment of seats in the House of Representatives and the number of electoral votes given to each state. Whether they came because, four years ago, Kamala Harris and Joe Biden prompted them to “surge to the border” for asylum or because of blue-states offering sanctuary status, “free” health care, “free” cell phones, “free” housing, and “free” college...it doesn’t matter. The result is the same.Your vote is already being watered down in Congress. Your vote is already being watered down in the Electoral College.And every day reports are popping up of non-citizens, illegal aliens, and convicted felons being registered to vote in cities and entire swing-states across the country, which means your vote may be fully canceled out in future elections. American elections should be decided by American citizens., here’s the scary part:The last census took place in 2020. That was before the 11.5 million illegal aliens who invaded our country under Joe Biden and Kamala Harris. To put it in context, there are only 8 states in America with a population over 11 million. So, it’s as if the radical Left just imported the 9th largest state in America. That’s more than North Carolina (10.8 million), Michigan (10 million), New Jersey (9.2 million), or Virginia (8.7 million).You get the picture. That’s why urgent action is needed to pass a Constitutional Amendment to ban illegal aliens from voting and from being counted for purposes of congressional and electoral vote apportionment. The next census in less than 6 years away. If those 11.5 million illegal aliens are counted in the census or are allowed to vote in the intervening years, you and I simply won’t have a country. Because, quite honestly, they think they can pull a fast one on you. They think you and I will be so relieved to see the border secure again and criminal illegal aliens deported, that you and I will be oblivious to this threat lying dormant under our very eyes.No way.My name is Rebecca Weber. I’m the chairwoman of AMAC Action. AMAC Action is the most influential advocacy group in the country when it comes to standing for the values of conservative Seniors.We’ve got 72 chapters and 300 volunteer delegates, who are the “feet on the street” advocates who contact Members of Congress and state legislators in their district offices. Moreover, our chapters and delegates help organize Town Hall meetings with elected officials and candidates to enable those locally of our 2,000,000 AMAC members to meet, hear, and question them.And you should also know that we now have more than 337,000 AMAC members who respond to our “calls-to-action” and weigh in with members of the U.S. House and Senate, as well as their state legislators on the issues. Quite simply, when we speak, Washington listens. But I can’t do it without you. No matter what issue you care about the most, if you and I don’t have a secure,honest elections... none of it matters.Inflation. Illegal immigration. Violent Crime. Drug use. Homelessness. The 2nd Amendment. Out of control spending. Social Security and Medicare insolvency. Right to Life. Indoctrination in our schools. Endless foreign wars. You name it. so that AMAC Action can put your representatives in Washington and in the state legislature on notice with a simple demand: Namely, that you will not tolerate this erosion of your vote.Now, here’s the bad news:Most state constitutions grant voting rights to “every” citizen, open-ended language that liberal activists argue permits localities to authorize non-citizen and even illegal alien voting. States should amend their constitutions to instead permit “only” citizens to vote. But there’s good news, too:Seven states have expressly banned non-citizen voting already: Alabama, Arizona, Colorado, Florida, Louisiana, North Dakota, and Ohio.What’s more, voters approve of constitutional amendments to ban non-citizen voting by overwhelming margins. Nearly 77% of Ohio voters approved a measure in 2022, while nearly 63% of Colorado voters approved one in 2020. This is a solution whose time has come. You and I can do this. , I'm also asking you to make a one-time contribution of $35 to give AMAC Action the resources to send out, collect, process, and tabulate millions of petitions. The reality is, we don’t get a dime of taxpayer funding. Our funding comes from grassroots conservatives like you who care deeply about the future of America. This is important. It means we can’t be bought. On the other hand, the leftwing election fraud machine is funded by leftwing billionaires like Mark Zuckerberg and George Soros who are actively funneling billions to dark money “non-profit” groups to “reshape ” our elections and our electorate.With that said, if you’re able to make a larger contribution – say $50, $75, $125, $250, $500, or even $1,000 – it would really be a life saver. Please hurry. In order to secure your vote in all future elections – and with 11.5 million illegals chomping to be included in the next census – Yes, this is about saving your vote from being canceled. It’s also about saving America.And it all starts with the straightforward premise that non-citizens and illegal aliens – no matter how many Kamala Harris and Joe Biden imported on their watch – should be banned from voting and banned from being counted for apportioning congressional seats and electoral votes. Thank you in advance for joining the fight to secure your vote | | For Freedom, Rebecca Weber,ChairwomanAMAC Action | | | P.S. American elections should be decided by American citizens. It’s not rocket-science. And it shouldn’t be controversial. Yet, the radical left is pouring billions into their scheme to “reshape ” our elections and our electorate. Nothing less than an amendment to the U.S. Constitution will suffice when it comes to stopping this threat. P.P.S. It’s imperative that you and I help President Donald J. Trump hit the ground running - especially when it comes to defusing the ticking timebomb left behind by the previous regime in the form of “open borders” and allowing non-citizens to vote. | | AMAC Action is a 501(c)4 committed to working directly with patriots like you to preserve the values that have made America the greatest nation. The "Action" branch of AMAC, our community-based chapters work tirelessly educating AMAC members and like-minded conservative members of the community and driving legislative results for our country. name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: The loophole allowing noncitizens to vote must be closed
body:
We’re taking your petitions straight to D.C.—but we need your help on the ground.
| | | |
---
|
---
| Patriot-

---
| **** **** ******** Did you know that under current federal law, states are prohibited from requiring proof of citizenship when someone registers to vote using the federal voter registration form? And did you know states are required to accept those federal forms? This loophole has allowed noncitizens to get on the voter rolls and even cast ballots in federal elections. The media can shout "conspiracy theory" all they want, but the facts are undeniable: our elections are vulnerable, and it is past time to fix it. That's why we've launched Only Citizens Vote Month--a nationwide effort to educate, mobilize, and demand passage of the SAVE Act, which would close the loophole and require documentary proof of citizenship when registering to vote. But this isn't just an online campaign. Patriots across the country are organizing events and activities to support the SAVE Act throughout August. Additionally, we're taking your voice straight to Washington. In just a few weeks, we'll be delivering signed petitions by hand to Members of Congress on Capitol Hill as part of our Only Citizens Vote Month Bus Tour. It's one of the most direct and powerful ways we can show lawmakers that the American people are watching--and we expect action. **It 's time to build pressure from the ground up.**
* If you haven't yet, [**sign up here**](https://qcgp-cmpzourl.maillist-manage.com/click/1edb9794acf909ef/1edb9794acef7996) to take part in grassroots activities in your area--from petition drives and sign-waving events to gatherings with neighbors and friends.
* You can also **[let us know](https://qcgp-cmpzourl.maillist-manage.com/click/1edb9794acf909ef/1edb9794acef7998 "https://www.teapartypatriots.org/onlycitizensvotetour/")** if you might be able to attend one of our bus tour stops--we'd love to see you there and stand together for election integrity.
* Haven't signed the petition yet? [**Sign it today** ,](https://qcgp-cmpzourl.maillist-manage.com/click/1edb9794acf909ef/1edb9794acef799a)**** and add your name to the wave we're delivering to D.C.
* **Need help organizing or want to learn more about one of the specific actions we are asking you do?**[**Access our on-demand, deep-dive activism training**](https://qcgp-cmpzourl.maillist-manage.com/click/1edb9794acf909ef/1edb9794acef799c)**and get equipped to lead effectively.**
Every voice counts--and your leadership can make all the difference. **Let 's make August the month we turn the tide and ensure that _only American citizens vote in American elections._** In liberty, Jenny Beth Martin __**** ****

__ **__****__****__****__** __ **__** **** ************

name: Young Kim
subject: Throwing in the towel
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Young Kim for Congress
body:
The truth is, my campaign is in BIG trouble

It could be time to raise the white flag, Friend.
This is the LAST thing I want to be sending you right now.
I wish I could tell you that everything is going to be okay. But the truth is, my campaign is in big trouble.
For years, the Democrats have tried every dirty trick in the book to take me down. But time after time, I've come through thanks to people like you, Friend.
But this time, I fear the writing is on the wall...
The Democrats have launched an unprecedented attack on our GOP House Majority.
A major Democrat campaign operation has labeled my seat as a TOP TARGET. They're spending millions of dollars to replace me with a far-Left radical. I'm not exaggerating when I say that if we lose my seat, our GOP House Majority is finished - FOR GOOD!
But all hope isn't lost.
We still have a shot at saving our House Majority, and that's by hitting our major fundraising goal tonight.
As a woman who knows the value of a hard-earned dollar, I don't ask this lightly. But if I'm going to be able to keep up the fight for the American Dream, I'm going to need your support.
[So what do you say, Friend? Can I count on you?](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zb6q0elp9r6373k7u8vg1rkkksl3993of2t0pa7g_rp22sh2s8i6epb1chj64ob2cdh2bs)[DONATE

subject: This is Trump Country
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
The left is coming at me with everything they have. Will you fight with me?

Friend,

The moment I announced my run for U.S. Senate, the Left went into full-blown meltdown.

They know I helped deliver North Carolina for President Trump, **[THREE TIMES.](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zbl0md6jjqvrtrje5qv6m3jsie820srd2bjkmuso_rp22sh2s8i6epb1chj64ob2c5h2bs)**

They know I've fought to secure our elections, defend the Second Amendment, and stand up to the globalist elites.

And they know I won't back down once I get to the Senate.
[STAND WITH MICHAEL](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zocu2gkb94gbii2c40b0lebj0ufblrbs3j7b1j88_rp22sh2s8i6epb1chj64ob2c5h2bs)
**[That's why they're already dumping MILLIONS into this race to try to stop me. Biden's allies. Hollywood liberals. Radical activists. They're ALL coming for North Carolina.](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z04dbvm7c42uaib1db7ihdic5kof25520b254ab0_rp22sh2s8i6epb1chj64ob2c5h2bs)**

But here's what they don't get:
**[NORTH CAROLINA IS TRUMP COUNTRY. And we're just getting started.](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2znbqglp4nc03qsgd3lmorrukflnc6dmhces52rs8_rp22sh2s8i6epb1chj64ob2c5h2bs)**
With President Trump's full endorsement and YOUR support, we're going to flip this race on its head and send a clear message:
**[The America First movement is stronger than ever.](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z066a09kc122c6k5q0mdukb18dr55lib0putjivg_rp22sh2s8i6epb1chj64ob2c5h2bs)**
I need grassroots patriots like you with me from Day One. Every dollar matters. Every supporter counts.

**[Donate $10, $25, or whatever you can right now and help me FIGHT BACK.](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zvloahkq166os0n7ok8l7a46jiqt9eheit0clfp0_rp22sh2s8i6epb1chj64ob2c5h2bs) **

[DONATE NOW](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2ze05q5dg3bk9vpsvghpale0tobs4gc1r09srod00_rp22sh2s8i6epb1chj64ob2c5h2bs)
Let's win this together and keep the Left out of North Carolina.

Thank you,

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Families need to hear that our country and our God is good
body:
I wanted you to be one of the first to hear this awesome news.

| | |
---
| |
---
Dear Fellow Conservative,I wanted you to be one of the first to hear this awesome news. BRAVE Books has been invited by President Trump’s DOE to host our **SEE YOU AT THE LIBRARY** **DAY** at the Library of Congress! Friend, talk about taking back our libraries! Just three years ago, we were fighting to get into local public libraries across the country to counter the Left’s “Drag Queen” Story Hours. Radical librarians sabotaged our efforts. Leftists cursed us with insults. And now, thanks to unwavering support from patriots like you, on August 16th, we’ll be sharing lessons in humility, freedom, and patriotism with children and parents at the largest library in the world -- America’s Library. But as excited as I am to announce our Library of Congress event, it's also a little daunting. **SEE YOU AT THE LIBRARY DAY** just got huge. **[And that’s why I’m sending you this email with a 24-hour deadline.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zurnfaupvdbv4thottv98c9cincpgi96qb6ko3cg_rp22sh2s8i6epb1chj64ob2c5h2bs)** Friend, I’m praying you will help BRAVE Books make the most of this incredible opportunity.
---
* Hosting **SEE YOU AT THE LIBRARY DAY** at the Library of Congress helps us reach hundreds more children and their families in person.
* The media coverage gets our conservative message in front of untold numbers of children and families who need to hear that our country and our God are good.
* And our presence at the Library of Congress sends a powerful message that America is about faith, family and freedom.

---
For too long the Left has filled the hearts and minds of children with lies. What a blessing it will be to share God’s truth on August 16th at the Library of Congress. But friend, the date is barreling towards us and our budget just skyrocketed. The new audio/visual needs alone for an event of this magnitude are more than BRAVE Books can handle without your help. [**Friend, I hope you’ll rush back your crucial gift in the next 24-hours.**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zmm4ulme4rircq0k1t3gkuo2ke7gm3u3n6tfcumo_rp22sh2s8i6epb1chj64ob2c5h2bs) We simply can’t make the most of this opportunity without you. **SEE YOU AT THE LIBRARY DAY** at the Library of Congress will be our most impactful event yet to counter the radical librarians and leftist school boards who are filling our children’s hearts and minds with horrible books like:
---
| | _A is for Activist._ _Occupy Wall Street_ says this ABC board book is “like reading Howard Zinn’s A People’s History of the United States, but for two-year-olds.” Friend, A People’s History of the United States brainwashed a generation of high school and college students to hate America!
---
| [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z5ggv5mm8b1i22vr7ln7c60b030q7uetapkbuhho_rp22sh2s8i6epb1chj64ob2c5h2bs)
---
| | _A is for Activist_. _Occupy Wall Street_ says this ABC board book is “like reading Howard Zinn’s A People’s History of the United States, but for two-year-olds.” Friend, A People’s History of the United States brainwashed a generation of high school and college students to hate America!
---
[](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zluioef3i5qdhd65fqakcva57uagv5lpsm3em908_rp22sh2s8i6epb1chj64ob2c5h2bs)
---
| | The 1619 Project: Born on the Water by Nikole Hannah-Jones. This book teaches 6-8-year-olds about the Black Resistance movement in the United States. And then of course, there are the Scholastic Books. Scholastic has been holding schools hostage for generations with their “fundraising” promises while warping young minds in return. The school Book Fairs you may remember are now filled with disgusting books you don’t want anywhere near your grandchildren. Scholastic has a whole series of books written by former football player Colin Kaepernick who found fame by taking a knee during our National Anthem. And their current LGBTQ selections for children are pure evil. From Run Away with Me, one of their many books about an illicit affair between two high school boys, to Escape from St. Hell which tries to normalize a girl’s transition into a boy... and with thousands of titles in between... Friend, in the face of all this it’s hard to imagine that a small Christian publisher like BRAVE Books could make a difference. But listen to this... God’s design is so perfect. Did you know that the British burned our Library of Congress to the ground on August 24, 1814? Then five months later, Congress purchased Thomas Jefferson’s personal library of 6,487 books as the foundation of a new American Library. And for decades, the Left has been dragging our country further and further away from Thomas Jefferson’s original vision for our nation. But on August 16, 2025, “we the people” will bring that vision back to the Library of Congress -- back to America. We can’t do it without you. [**Please help us make SEE YOU AT THE LIBRARY DAY a success by rushing back your best emergency gift of $35, $50, or even $500.**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zhh7ic1m8gmqtd97ahjmis3cueev482ieim3jvro_rp22sh2s8i6epb1chj64ob2c5h2bs) And because it’s so critical that you get your **crucial** gift back in just 24 hours, as a “Fast Response Bonus” for your gift of $100 or more, I’d love to send you the first book I wrote with BRAVE called As You Grow. As You Grow tells the story of a tiny seed that, through the fruit of the Spirit, turns into a mighty tree. Friend, that’s BRAVE Books. All that we do is only possible through God’s grace and your generosity. **[Now we’re at a watershed moment and I’m asking for your support.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z7pj7i8sma6tbgel4tb909h6rqdi2ek66oqjoj6o_rp22sh2s8i6epb1chj64ob2c5h2bs)** Whether your emergency gift is $35, $50, $100 or anything higher or lower -- what’s most important is that you respond in the next 24 hours because August 16th is just weeks away. The Holy Spirit has opened a door for us to host an incredible **SEE YOU AT THE LIBRARY DAY** at the Library of Congress. Please help us seize this opportunity to bring our message of freedom, America’s greatness, and God’s love to our nation’s capital while we have the chance. BRAVE Books is on a mission to help parents raise children who love God, love freedom, and love America! And we’re so happy you’re with us.
---
Thank you!

name: Hillsdale College via American Action News
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict

This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ziale90kd4tikrg44dijumm4jk3284cjqbbaq300_rp22sh2s8i6epb1chj64ob2c5h2bs) Dear Fellow American,
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important.
To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course called **“The Second World Wars.”**
**Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson** , this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zbc4k3d05kb7vd5duq4487klkohgtnoi40c2ep0o_rp22sh2s8i6epb1chj64ob2c5h2bs) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.
Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of **“The Second World Wars”** on DVD:
**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z6ih6r25nvabhj33ce749r79m32ebvtq9hm2sjho_rp22sh2s8i6epb1chj64ob2c5h2bs)**
Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College!
Best regards,
Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D. Executive Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
P.S. The **“The Second World Wars”** DVD set is great as a homeschool curriculum or for independent study. Plus, it makes a perfect gift for anyone who wants to know more about the Second World War. **[Reserve your copy now.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zo13fh6b5ntl95efjbrn41uol53vhgrd43evc1bo_rp22sh2s8i6epb1chj64ob2c5h2bs)**

| | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z2974ujj6r1g6u3sklhmbm2enaig6fb9beeas1m0_rp22sh2s8i6epb1chj64ob2c5h2bs)
---
Friend - it’s Dinesh D’Souza. I spent time writing you this urgent note. There’s a lot that needs to be said, so this message may be longer than usual. _**[But I’m humbly asking that you take just a few minutes to read until the end!](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z1as6oklmb2qho3t0cthsecmnujjtk3riefudc58_rp22sh2s8i6epb1chj64ob2c5h2bs)**_ _The radical left has made it their sole mission to blow up the entire MAGA movement and drag America into TYRANNY._ Whether it’s the deep state working behind the scenes, federal district judges employing lawfare, or Democrat elected officials calling for BLOOD to be spilled in the streets in resistance against ICE, they’ll stop at nothing to tear our country apart and use every power afforded to them to BLOCK the plan President Trump has promised to deliver. **Even after the recent SCOTUS ruling struck down nationwide injunctions, an activist judge has launched an attack, this time not against Pres. Trump, but instead in an attempt to BLOCK Congress from being able to make critical funding cuts that prevent your hard-earned tax dollars from being funneled to the WOKE agenda.** **Democrats are now even inspiring domestic terrorism against ICE, inciting deranged lunatics in the streets and telling them they must be willing to get SHOT. ** _Look, I’ve been called a fascist, a conspiracy theorist and been mercilessly attacked for fighting for the truth. It’s never stopped me before and it won’t stop me now._ **You see, I’m also an immigrant. I came to America with nothing. And I believe in doing everything we can to save this country from insanity. I’m not afraid to stand up for it no matter what the cost. ** **I say all this because today I want to tell you about another fearless warrior for the truth.**_**My son-in-law, Rep. Brandon Gill has been smeared by the radical left again and again.**_ Years ago, Brandon started one of President Trump’s TRUSTED NEWS OUTLETS, the DC Enquirer to **_cancel out the FAKE NEWS smear campaigns against Trump_** and give a real voice to the American people. To every rancher, every farmer, every small business owner, every worker who built this country with their bare hands. Then, Brandon helped me **_EXPOSE the STOLEN 2020 election_** , working on my film “2000 Mules.” While the fake news media refused to report the truth, we made sure millions of Americans knew what really happened. **That’s why Brandon and I are two of the mainstream media’s biggest enemies. They DESPISE everything we fight for because they DESPISE the truth itself.** _Brandon is my son-in-law. But I know him to be much more than that. He is a true conservative WARRIOR who has proven again and again he will never back down from anything._ At this moment, he’s fighting tooth and nail to permanently codify DOGE cuts & he’s willing to take a stand against any activist judge that gets in his way! **America needs conservative warriors who are unafraid and unwavering in their mission to wage war on the forces that seek to reduce America to TYRANNY!** _**_[I’m asking you, if you do anything today, please consider rushing an immediate contribution today to help us to fight back against this TYRANNY and continue to stand for the TRUTH!](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zb9rg697qq8i4nr9l50p22uquq8rlhj3t9l0lkm8_rp22sh2s8i6epb1chj64ob2c5h2bs)_**_ **_And with the current state of our country, I can’t stress enough how crucial your generous support is._** For America,

Dinesh D’Souza
