name: Team WisGOP
subject: WisGOP Update 8.1.2025
body:
No images? [Click here](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-e-qgyhik-didthutlhu-yd/) [](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-qgyhik-didthutlhu-r/) While many will call this an off-year, the 2026 cycle is already fully underway. We must continue fighting, working, and supporting Republican candidates. We've already moved from a [lean Dem to a TOSS-UP](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-qgyhik-didthutlhu-y/) for the Governor's race! We can't stop there, though; we must keep moving the needle in the right direction.So many of you are already putting in the work to build the Republican Party! YOU will be the reason we win next year, but there is still more work to be done. Support our movement by signing up to be a Letter to the Editor signer to fight back against the Democrat messaging machine, or sign up to be a REPUBLICAN POLL WORKER and help secure our elections!-Team WisGOP **Take Action!****We need Letter to the Editor Signers!**
Become a Letter to the Editor (LTE) signer and help get the Republican message out to every community across the state. LTE volunteers are critical to continuing to advance our Republican values. Our goal is to have groups in every county who submit LTEs regularly. These groups will have resources provided from our team, including talking points, draft LTEs, and submission instructions. If you have any questions, please reach out to our Communications Director, Anika Rickard, at [arickard@wisgop.org](mailto:arickard@wisgop.org). [BECOME A LTE SIGNER!](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-qgyhik-didthutlhu-j/) **Become a Poll Worker!**
Every two years, the Republican Party of Wisconsin submits poll workers to municipalities across the state. These 2 year appointments will be critical to keeping the 2026 elections safe and secure. Learn more about being a poll worker by signing up for a training below! [BECOME A POLL WORKER!](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-qgyhik-didthutlhu-t/)
# **In Case You Missed It**
[**ICYMI: WisGOP Launched Dual Language Poll Worker Initiative**](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-qgyhik-didthutlhu-i/)
In case you missed it, the Republican Party of Wisconsin launched its dual language poll worker initiative last night at Milwaukee GOP Headquarters. This initiative was created due to a continued need for more bilingual poll workers in Milwaukee County and across the state.[**WisGOP Condemns Hakeem Jeffries ' Milwaukee Visit and Anti-ICE Stance**](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-qgyhik-didthutlhu-d/)
Radical Hakeem Jeffries is visiting Milwaukee on June 28 for an event hosted by the far-left Wisconsin Education Association Council (WEAC) and organized by the progressive activist group People for the American Way. This event is a blatant attempt to push a radical agenda.[**ICYMI: Chris Taylor Is The Left 's Anti-ICE, Pro-Sanctuary State Candidate For WI Supreme Court**](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-qgyhik-didthutlhu-h/)
In case you missed it, a recent article from [_The Federalist_](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-qgyhik-didthutlhu-k/) exposes Wisconsin Supreme Court candidate Chris Taylor's troubling history of far-left activism, including her opposition to Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) and support for sanctuary state policies, raising serious concerns about her candidacy for the state's highest court.[**ICYMI: Extreme Left Wisconsin Supreme Court Circumvents the Will of the People**](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-qgyhik-didthutlhu-u/)
In case you missed it, last week the extreme left Wisconsin Supreme Court ruled that unelected bureaucrats have the ability to circumvent the will of the people and their duly elected legislators when creating administrative rules.
# **Worth the Read**
[](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-qgyhik-didthutlhu-o/) [](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-qgyhik-didthutlhu-b/)
# **Top Shareable Content**
[](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-qgyhik-didthutlhu-n/) [](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-qgyhik-didthutlhu-a/) [](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-qgyhik-didthutlhu-f/) [](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-qgyhik-didthutlhu-z/) [](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-qgyhik-didthutlhu-v/)[](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-qgyhik-didthutlhu-e/)[](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-qgyhik-didthutlhu-g/)[](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-qgyhik-didthutlhu-w/) | [ Share ](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-fb-qgyhik-didthutlhu-yh/) | [ Tweet ](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-tw-qgyhik-didthutlhu-yk/) | [ Forward ](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.forwardtomyfriend.com/y-didthutlhu-931243C5-qgyhik-l-yu)

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Will I see you August 16th?
body:
I wanted you to be one of the first to hear this awesome news.

| | |
---
| |
---
Dear Fellow Conservative,I wanted you to be one of the first to hear this awesome news. BRAVE Books has been invited by President Trump’s DOE to host our **SEE YOU AT THE LIBRARY** **DAY** at the Library of Congress! Friend, talk about taking back our libraries! Just three years ago, we were fighting to get into local public libraries across the country to counter the Left’s “Drag Queen” Story Hours. Radical librarians sabotaged our efforts. Leftists cursed us with insults. And now, thanks to unwavering support from patriots like you, on August 16th, we’ll be sharing lessons in humility, freedom, and patriotism with children and parents at the largest library in the world -- America’s Library. But as excited as I am to announce our Library of Congress event, it's also a little daunting. **SEE YOU AT THE LIBRARY DAY** just got huge. **[And that’s why I’m sending you this email with a 24-hour deadline.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zp4joft4fasctkua82m3j8ld11pdcjm9cq1l14ao_rp22sh2s8i6epb1chj66o32cth2bs)** Friend, I’m praying you will help BRAVE Books make the most of this incredible opportunity.
---
* Hosting **SEE YOU AT THE LIBRARY DAY** at the Library of Congress helps us reach hundreds more children and their families in person.
* The media coverage gets our conservative message in front of untold numbers of children and families who need to hear that our country and our God are good.
* And our presence at the Library of Congress sends a powerful message that America is about faith, family and freedom.

---
For too long the Left has filled the hearts and minds of children with lies. What a blessing it will be to share God’s truth on August 16th at the Library of Congress. But friend, the date is barreling towards us and our budget just skyrocketed. The new audio/visual needs alone for an event of this magnitude are more than BRAVE Books can handle without your help. [**Friend, I hope you’ll rush back your crucial gift in the next 24-hours.**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zgpt0s3mimkvj1snojjqho4u569rhdiltoaljhqo_rp22sh2s8i6epb1chj66o32cth2bs) We simply can’t make the most of this opportunity without you. **SEE YOU AT THE LIBRARY DAY** at the Library of Congress will be our most impactful event yet to counter the radical librarians and leftist school boards who are filling our children’s hearts and minds with horrible books like:
---
| | _A is for Activist._ _Occupy Wall Street_ says this ABC board book is “like reading Howard Zinn’s A People’s History of the United States, but for two-year-olds.” Friend, A People’s History of the United States brainwashed a generation of high school and college students to hate America!
---
| [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2ztvgrld2qic2bkkn9sd7tjjfcmdkmlo5b5snbj3g_rp22sh2s8i6epb1chj66o32cth2bs)
---
| | _A is for Activist_. _Occupy Wall Street_ says this ABC board book is “like reading Howard Zinn’s A People’s History of the United States, but for two-year-olds.” Friend, A People’s History of the United States brainwashed a generation of high school and college students to hate America!
---
[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z8inufm7m6jhn8i1c80b75fg53esss9hp0aav7mg_rp22sh2s8i6epb1chj66o32cth2bs)
---
| | The 1619 Project: Born on the Water by Nikole Hannah-Jones. This book teaches 6-8-year-olds about the Black Resistance movement in the United States. And then of course, there are the Scholastic Books. Scholastic has been holding schools hostage for generations with their “fundraising” promises while warping young minds in return. The school Book Fairs you may remember are now filled with disgusting books you don’t want anywhere near your grandchildren. Scholastic has a whole series of books written by former football player Colin Kaepernick who found fame by taking a knee during our National Anthem. And their current LGBTQ selections for children are pure evil. From Run Away with Me, one of their many books about an illicit affair between two high school boys, to Escape from St. Hell which tries to normalize a girl’s transition into a boy... and with thousands of titles in between... Friend, in the face of all this it’s hard to imagine that a small Christian publisher like BRAVE Books could make a difference. But listen to this... God’s design is so perfect. Did you know that the British burned our Library of Congress to the ground on August 24, 1814? Then five months later, Congress purchased Thomas Jefferson’s personal library of 6,487 books as the foundation of a new American Library. And for decades, the Left has been dragging our country further and further away from Thomas Jefferson’s original vision for our nation. But on August 16, 2025, “we the people” will bring that vision back to the Library of Congress -- back to America. We can’t do it without you. [**Please help us make SEE YOU AT THE LIBRARY DAY a success by rushing back your best emergency gift of $35, $50, or even $500.**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z0bcee47smi2ktlsbre5bbbntcu0net4gpl03330_rp22sh2s8i6epb1chj66o32cth2bs) And because it’s so critical that you get your **crucial** gift back in just 24 hours, as a “Fast Response Bonus” for your gift of $100 or more, I’d love to send you the first book I wrote with BRAVE called As You Grow. As You Grow tells the story of a tiny seed that, through the fruit of the Spirit, turns into a mighty tree. Friend, that’s BRAVE Books. All that we do is only possible through God’s grace and your generosity. **[Now we’re at a watershed moment and I’m asking for your support.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zosilm4ut55lmcs7c37thd5j1uqp6b47nvhblevg_rp22sh2s8i6epb1chj66o32cth2bs)** Whether your emergency gift is $35, $50, $100 or anything higher or lower -- what’s most important is that you respond in the next 24 hours because August 16th is just weeks away. The Holy Spirit has opened a door for us to host an incredible **SEE YOU AT THE LIBRARY DAY** at the Library of Congress. Please help us seize this opportunity to bring our message of freedom, America’s greatness, and God’s love to our nation’s capital while we have the chance. BRAVE Books is on a mission to help parents raise children who love God, love freedom, and love America! And we’re so happy you’re with us.
---
Thank you!
---
[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z88m3cvlcbdunj2ijuc1nl0ou4gdh4736poh4kk8_rp22sh2s8i6epb1chj66o32cth2bs)
---
Kirk Cameron
---
[ **DONATE ** ](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zv0vl6nrp4ska3ap01f1402gnc9adrsb14g3blj8_rp22sh2s8i6epb1chj66o32cth2bs)
---
P.S. Friend, we began this journey to take back our libraries and help parents pour conservative values into their children just three years ago. Now, this August 16th, we’ll be holding **SEE YOU AT THE LIBRARY DAY** at the Library of Congress! What a way to turn back the Left! But time is short, and we can’t make this day a success without you. [**Please rush back your emergency gift in just 24 hours.**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zofsbvp1ccqgid6japacqukav5ipvl3n666iitrg_rp22sh2s8i6epb1chj66o32cth2bs) When you reply quickly with a gift of $100 or more, I’ll send you As You Grow for a child in your life or you can take it and leave it at your local school, charity shop, doctor’s office or library to reach a child who doesn’t have someone to teach them conservative values. Thank you, Friend! -- Kirk
---
|
---
| | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zoi9u3a7e46326v2se7gd84ohocinueisd7cq7ro_rp22sh2s8i6epb1chj66o32cth2bs)
---
**Brave Books** 3528 S Loop 336 E Suite CConroe, TX 77301
---
| |
---|---

Pop Acta Media | Your America
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zeqmno83b5a30b11fjsulbqgl8vu71hf6ah0898o_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9tge5rrasbjkjrrasjk6mqj4t5m6gpq7d9neprqastmelp3cthieip3adt7skqu2c3neior3d5medjm05plmgqb3ct66uqr695lshgmeor4stge48d245p25oh4ctim2p36cdg64pr24no)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zsnorijisa6v1joevcjo9383vgn2t7rj1vshc4h8_rp22sh2s8i6epb1chj66o32cth2bs)_

[](http://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zi37lh9mrsn7thig5rvsecu9hk2787dammk7vhe0_rp22sh2s8i6epb1chj66o32cth238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

name: Hillsdale College via Conservative Broadcast
subject: Learn from Victor Davis Hanson
body:
This fact means that we're losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict

This sponsored message from Conservative Broadcast is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/SlwXZEazosfjtQP2hQG-HQ~~/AARclBA~/Um_orx5gzb0MpboA-IEUqrRKAIylDeIUHNeN82SISy2RCI7dlK3oEYm4NJVKKDpw1OE8bPyES-XJSR8ohAmGDriGoR5tYyXgKQikWaKUEGC6Qhd69KwijD1WvqTNHy6OCt8IukAxshavu2MYdHetHu21Lpo7PtTzkNPXbbdmLhjov4tI_RfzOgZ0QjcuvfzPNLlVT9N-fSsryzGPVf60aANPZTM2TQtIj5O6gvfN34ABxIwS4vJQzZ-JTJZL4CERkHS0dB4BiF2ads3-vFKnPaYipk7-PtVLB-Zhk-_Q_xZc2hTZoU3BTcPnynbWru6gMyBT-VF8MCsFm5BtL4yeWQ~~) Dear Fellow American,
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we're losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important.
To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course called **" The Second World Wars."**
**Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson** , this course explores how the conflict's diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/SlwXZEazosfjtQP2hQG-HQ~~/AARclBA~/Um_orx5gzb0MpboA-IEUqrRKAIylDeIUHNeN82SISy2RCI7dlK3oEYm4NJVKKDpw1OE8bPyES-XJSR8ohAmGDriGoR5tYyXgKQikWaKUEGC6Qhd69KwijD1WvqTNHy6OCt8IukAxshavu2MYdHetHu21Lpo7PtTzkNPXbbdmLhjov4tI_RfzOgZ0QjcuvfzPNLlVT9N-fSsryzGPVf60aANPZTM2TQtIj5O6gvfN34ABxIwS4vJQzZ-JTJZL4CERkHS0dB4BiF2ads3-vFKnPaYipk7-PtVLB-Zhk-_Q_xZc2hTZoU3BTcPnynbWru6gMyBT-VF8MCsFm5BtL4yeWQ~~) If you'd like to secure a DVD set before they're all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.
Here's a secure link to reserve your copy of **" The Second World Wars"** on DVD:
**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/SlwXZEazosfjtQP2hQG-HQ~~/AARclBA~/Um_orx5gzb0MpboA-IEUqrRKAIylDeIUHNeN82SISy2RCI7dlK3oEYm4NJVKKDpw1OE8bPyES-XJSR8ohAmGDriGoR5tYyXgKQikWaKUEGC6Qhd69KwijD1WvqTNHy6OCt8IukAxshavu2MYdHetHu21Lpo7PtTzkNPXbbdmLhjov4tI_RfzOgZ0QjcuvfzPNLlVT9N-fSsryzGPVf60aANPZTM2TQtIj5O6gvfN34ABxIwS4vJQzZ-JTJZL4CERkHS0dB4BiF2ads3-vFKnPaYipk7-PtVLB-Zhk-_Q_xZc2hTZoU3BTcPnynbWru6gMyBT-VF8MCsFm5BtL4yeWQ~~)**
Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College!
Best regards,
Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D. Executive Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
P.S. The **" The Second World Wars"** DVD set is great as a homeschool curriculum or for independent study. Plus, it makes a perfect gift for anyone who wants to know more about the Second World War. **[Reserve your copy now.](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/SlwXZEazosfjtQP2hQG-HQ~~/AARclBA~/Um_orx5gzb0MpboA-IEUqrRKAIylDeIUHNeN82SISy2RCI7dlK3oEYm4NJVKKDpw1OE8bPyES-XJSR8ohAmGDriGoR5tYyXgKQikWaKUEGC6Qhd69KwijD1WvqTNHy6OCt8IukAxshavu2MYdHetHu21Lpo7PtTzkNPXbbdmLhjov4tI_RfzOgZ0QjcuvfzPNLlVT9N-fSsryzGPVf60aANPZTM2TQtIj5O6gvfN34ABxIwS4vJQzZ-JTJZL4CERkHS0dB4BiF2ads3-vFKnPaYipk7-PtVLB-Zhk-_Q_xZc2hTZoU3BTcPnynbWru6gMyBT-VF8MCsFm5BtL4yeWQ~~)**

subject: U.S.-Russia War of Words, Tariffs Delayed, and a CatVideoFest
body:
President Trump on Friday [ordered nuclear submarines close to Russian waters](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkD2O3DAMRk8jdxpI8u8WLiYIXCTYNClSGhyJ2lGgH4OUR9jbB06OkPoBj_zer_f9HUIM-eMHJFyrL3vGxhFrRdpPppM5QAMqvhVyXIGC97wbZUapFqnM7iDEz33o3OoRDfYdrnoeB23e9DR2z3XR2k_TbMAOiwN4DJOa5zfv5nFZBvPQXVgvm1qU0UpNqr8Ni7bazMqOOPfgtRgUulAL3X6XkOsTffwsL6SbLamL67PWg0V_F2YTZmut3RLniwmzYZYnC7Ndoy5YKDphtkpnOmQhh8QynzYikOTzkYBCRpY2FkaStch_AeR1Th5UXsVCDS-UXKFiwlwvLZC83_W373Am0W_FBif6r1-uqNj4J9LR0eqOFmIMPM1iUB8JQvz7fv2v5q_V_AkAAP__DBWZcQ) in response to what he termed “highly provocative” threats of war from former Russian President Dmitry Medvedev.

| | |

# Saturday, August 2, 2025
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1776, John Hancock, the President of the Continental Congress, [signed the newly engrossed Declaration of Independence](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0EFuhCAUgOHT4E4DDxVnwaIbd9Ntl4aBx_gahAmgZG7ftFfoBf4_-b7u291QoPj8NAfq6tMWsZWAtWLezpLPUsg0k5NvKbtSTSbvywYcpp4vPYfNGQrvbeyc9oiAskMt1DQKuIl56nbtLMxq4ejMIuVD-Ye0DmcrZvTyNqqlI_1b4wsHwfnM5TAuwgpQ3E6opPGCjRwd1ZSH70Sx7ujDO12YB5uOLui91ldh8oPBymBtrQ0m250uLMMzXQzWgwKWmiL2LtnzwFgLg9WhDSabSin2yfcUHb4wOowWu6zdq1EIVGbFRv48DIW_W_0X0aXhJwAA__9G7324) with a bold signature. Fifty-five other delegates also signed. Today is National Ice Cream Sandwich Day, and if you're looking for the best store-bought sandwich to cool you down on this hot August day, we've got you covered: Here's _Parade Magazine's_ [ranking of the nine best brands](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LFuwyAQgOGnwZsjOIztDAxdvKVrR3SFI74KGwtIrLx9lb5C51_6hv_r5m7Iiff7J25kW8xup7Mmao2Ke9TyqJXxxJLjmUuoDQvHWB1IML2cewkuIKeXG7pgIxGQ7siqyQwKrmo03WohaLqSAROMCjpO2vgrqknpeVZE49CxfWtylqCkHKW-DLPyCibpDU0aoxKDpMAtl8tP5r2tFNMrP6lcfN66ZNfWjir0h4BFwHJgwUDvJGCJOQcByzfV1rOn3hfCra-4h5P9SrUrNhwnp8R1nMQg7xty-mPbv148LfwGAAD__xJLc0U).

Stay hydrated and stay sharp this summer with today's sponsor, [LMNT](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykz7FuwyAQgOGnMVus48AxHRi6ZEvXjgibI7kWmwhIUN6-StU36P7rk_7Pszt7TrxfPvxGtsXsduo1UWtU3L2We63suy859lxCbb5wjNUh4HQAcwB0wXN6Oi2CjURISpCV86QlvsnjJK5W6aBARwmrMQstCqOGJS7RaAKvFAi2Lw0MoAQ4ghq1kavEGdaJZuWjHDRQ4JbL-JV5b1eK6ZkfVMY1byLZa2u3Oqj3AU8DnnrvYyi8f6dtb69iwNNfL4oNt84pcT3Og4bL5jn9Iu1f5w-LPwEAAP__1tZt2Q), offering a free sample of their electrolyte hydration drink mixes in today's edition.

|
---
## Trump Sends Nuclear Subs Toward Russia
President Trump on Friday [ordered nuclear submarines close to Russian waters](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkD2O3DAMRk8jdxpI8u8WLiYIXCTYNClSGhyJ2lGgH4OUR9jbB06OkPoBj_zer_f9HUIM-eMHJFyrL3vGxhFrRdpPppM5QAMqvhVyXIGC97wbZUapFqnM7iDEz33o3OoRDfYdrnoeB23e9DR2z3XR2k_TbMAOiwN4DJOa5zfv5nFZBvPQXVgvm1qU0UpNqr8Ni7bazMqOOPfgtRgUulAL3X6XkOsTffwsL6SbLamL67PWg0V_F2YTZmut3RLniwmzYZYnC7Ndoy5YKDphtkpnOmQhh8QynzYikOTzkYBCRpY2FkaStch_AeR1Th5UXsVCDS-UXKFiwlwvLZC83_W373Am0W_FBif6r1-uqNj4J9LR0eqOFmIMPM1iUB8JQvz7fv2v5q_V_AkAAP__DBWZcQ) in response to what he termed “highly provocative” threats of war from former Russian President Dmitry Medvedev. The move comes a week before the deadline Trump set for Russia to agree to a Ukraine ceasefire. Medvedev warned Trump that the deadline was a step toward war, saying, _“Don’t go down the Sleepy Joe road!”_

Trump responded on Truth Social: _“I have ordered two Nuclear Submarines to be positioned in the appropriate regions, just in case these foolish and inflammatory statements are more than just that."_ Trump last Monday cut the deadline for a Ukraine ceasefire [from 50 days to just two weeks](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkD1uxCAUhE-DO1uP5x_YgiKNu02b0sLwWBNhswK8aG8fOTlCmmlG-kbzfd2Xu_bBH49PvZMqLi4H1RyoFErLmdOZs9dVp-hqTDYXnbxzeUHAsQXZAi5W-_BehsYqR4TUN6S4GAeONz6Nzab0KmE0WqxiwBsIg9wKkHqS1E9gR9l4ddFAAnKACfpukNxwFGBGEr12nA1A1peYuu_oj7KRC-_4otSZuDdBbaU8M-s_GM4M51prZ47VXCXD-UIznEFewRnOJZ37s_371R6nCaRTm89118kflLut7KFJyj6rD8HnSbABHrv24Xet_EvRS-FPAAAA___LvXnf), which Medvedev, now the deputy chairman of the Russian security council, called “ _a threat and a step towards war—not between Russia and Ukraine, but with his own country.”_
## Biden Aide Had $8 Million Re-Election Incentive
Former President Biden's top political aide, Mike Donilon, told congressional investigators Thursday that he was paid $4 million for his work on Biden's 2024 re-election campaign and would have made [an additional $4 million if Biden had won](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkM-KHCEYxJ_GvtnoZ_9xDh4mhA4ENpcccmxc_dz5gq2NOivz9qHzCnsrKKqo-v15298sRUofv-yBpoW8J-w1YmtY9mctz1rJdlty6Ln42myhEOoOAmYuNBewe0vxtU-DNwERUA1o5DpPEm5ymYeHWZSTFkHctHLe6slrp71a_fvq9LysOJC52oQWIIVYhBonLZ2EVbgZV2WDZJNATy2X8W-m1B4Y4it_YhldPoZoHq2dlak7g43B1nsfj5ouj8GGiT8rg-06xWA7c6RG7pLV5Xzylk_-Th4Tt-SRd1v5WfJBFT3X_KAYKScecuEgYOKdEoPNFn6_y58_5n5jasuOPFPfv10MsdffWM6hGH_2K1yXlU3i47AU_69tX0L8aeBfAAAA__8BQJCw). Donilon's salary has been reported, but the additional $4 million bonus wasn’t previously known. Investigators said this shows Donilon had a financial incentive to push Biden to run for re-election despite growing doubts about the president's ability. Donilon is the latest ex-Biden administration official to be questioned by Congress as it investigates whether the former president's [inner circle covered up evidence of alleged mental decline](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL2q3DAQRp9G7rRII_9t4WJDcCBw04SQ0mit0XqCLBlpfMW-fXBeId2BYT445_fH8mEpUHz9sDtO7NMSsZaAzJiXs-SzFLLV5uRryq6wzeR9WUBBJ9UoFSzOUngvbeMmjwhoGpz00LUa7rrvmm0yRsGowIzw7Lt7fx9B3-3z2bVO9X7AtqHpWlOjAq1Ur8ytHfWqYVBrh4OxXotWoSNO-fYnUeQNfXinT8y3Ne1NmDbmowjzEDALmGutt73E6yZgxijPImC-pATMRwrEtF4YUnwx7Sif5DBKSw4lY2HyhEVuKAun5CQniTZHeR4XjrvcrJNHxnJ9sawpyowSA65MKQqYbZaPh_7-7Rx_CTOnlZwwX79cgbGWn5iPJk_uqBQClX4QrXrtlsI_Ff6v_p8T_A0AAP__cPmbaQ), and if executive actions were signed via autopen without Biden's full awareness. Donilon said he did not know what the autopen was used for and did not recall having any knowledge of the autopen.

On this day in 1776, John Hancock, the President of the Continental Congress, with a bold signature. Fifty-five other delegates also signed. The move comes a week before the deadline Trump set for Russia to agree to a Ukraine ceasefire. Medvedev warned Trump that the deadline was a step toward war, saying, “Don’t go down the Sleepy Joe road!” Trump responded on Truth Social: “I have ordered two Nuclear Submarines to be positioned in the appropriate regions, just in case these foolish and inflammatory statements are more than just that." Trump last Monday cut the deadline for a Ukraine ceasefire , which Medvedev, now the deputy chairman of the Russian security council, called “ a threat and a step towards war—not between Russia and Ukraine, but with his own country.” Biden Aide Had $8 Million Re-Election Incentive Former President Biden's top political aide, Mike Donilon, told congressional investigators Thursday that he was paid $4 million for his work on Biden's 2024 re-election campaign and would have made . Donilon's salary has been reported, but the additional $4 million bonus wasn’t previously known. Investigators said this shows Donilon had a financial incentive to push Biden to run for re-election despite growing doubts about the president's ability. Donilon is the latest ex-Biden administration official to be questioned by Congress as it investigates whether the former president's , and if executive actions were signed via autopen without Biden's full awareness. Donilon said he did not know what the autopen was used for and did not recall having any knowledge of the autopen. # Saturday, August 2, 2025
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1832, Texas settlers refused an order to surrender their arms to José de las Piedras, commander of the Mexican battalion at Nacogdoches. The ensuing [two-day conflict](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0DFuwyAUgOHT4M0WYGLHA0MXb-na0cLwsJ9KeBE8heT2VXuFXuD_pe_rtt0cJszHp7uD5VekLUOrCZihbM0xFE85JvScqHmq7JERNi31pZfXXuotOEzvzXTB7jIsqgOr5otRozaL6U5rFg-jUdHA4hQoJd2kLirGeYp-Gf3eof2NyavUSkk1qmGSu75G7fYZJMDuhZEQkKkMfALDy9WY3vSEMni6d8mezI8qxg-hV6HX1trA9XSUE2YYqBxCr6fLYSf6FnqFzAWhCr1m5-kI5E-o_e6YE_QUu2LDo2FKWKdZGHncHaa_Ef-P52n1TwAAAP__hq18HQ) freed East Texas from military rule. As we report below, 28 Texas companies landed on _U.S. News & World Report_'s ranking of the country's [best companies](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2ypCAQhZ8GM62mUdGAYBOz2XRDC7EdqUKxoHeYeftbzivc-PzV-f495of1wZ_Pv_Ygw-8tzieVHIiZ0lwsU3Lx3IJ3HGJxMbPz7GlGwK6GoQacV-vDZ26r1SywjrIiI3XXSoXt2Fa7ATVuo9XYd3rrJCk1KMDe9oAwqBWx8uYugwFQSpBKNj0sOGxoF01AtDjRAq2eY2p4J6a3zVv4xBelxsWjCmZnvrJQfwROAqdSSnMkvjWB031G4GQTexdI4PTN1wtlrl08Lnt6yvX_XN_GGkGPIEE3135VyaxX8SH43GvRwvOwPnwX-XecXgZ_AgAA___SinxA) to work for. Do you work for one of them? Stay hydrated and stay sharp this summer with today's sponsor, [LMNT](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykz7FuwjAQxvGnSTbQ-ewQGDx0YaNrR-tiX-BUJ0b2icDbV1R9g87fp5_0_7qEC0mW9fpJC3t9ziWsvLXMqlzDRso1lnXOEjWXLZamUVQ4IOCwg-MOMCSS_AquT36CdDI9ezMOzlh0J9ffvGM70OSQaDCziYeYRmch2RM7soZSL_6NwRHQGDDW7A8w4XFGmkYG5il2DjiJlrrXGys_qc35VR5c97EsffY31Xvr7EeH5w7Pqcr6nZdV32uH579vU1Luq0_3TXKWdhg7B9eFJP8q-r_2h8efAAAA__-Vx2-_), offering a free sample of their electrolyte hydration drink mixes in today's edition.

## Data Centers Battle Residents for Water
Two San Antonio data centers have used 463 million gallons of water over the past two years, while city residents are under [water restriction rules.](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLFu5SAQRb_G7uYJMMZOQbGNu2y7pTWGwUbCEMG8OMnXr_x-If29V_ecf-_rO8YU8_4XT7L8Fcqa6WqJmKmuFzJVV3JI0XEqlyuNXeRIqxJqBDGDUKvHmL5X3Xu7Cf8me7JyGrUclH7T_WG3YIT3oxazCUg0eqFI6UkGozca9dRHe4-JWSgphRzkw4hNzUHhNpEg2lynBfnIpT74IKYvbCF9l0-qD1fOPtmD-aN1w59OLZ1arut6NHTPWinznejUciN1ammYATOXHAt4ZARHmak22J8_P4k8aDPAGVOKJcOOKZXcoAR4aQBsgJUQAjry4Gt57gfDMEtpzCT6av3HdXebmTot9hNjeh3k32n9tOp_AAAA__-DIY8q) The data centers, owned by Microsoft and the Army Corps, are using volumes of water equivalent to tens of thousands of local households, primarily to cool massive banks of servers that power artificial intelligence tools. In 2025, data centers across the state are projected to use 49 billion gallons of water, [enough to supply millions of households,](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLuu4jAQhp8m6RyNJ86FwsU2dGy7ZTRxxjBaEyNnhOHtj-AVTv9f9H3_LsuFJMl-_Ut39vqKedm5HolVuSyVlEvIe0wSNOUa8qFBVHhBwMHAbACXjSS9F9dufoXtZFv2dhqc7dGdXHvzMAIhDfHUh4iunyfEQI6tgzDO4zy34j9jMANaC7a33QgrzhFpnRiY19A44E00l05vrPyiI6Z3fnLpQr63yd9UH0fT_2nw3OC51tp9ECrz_0-gwfO3YzZSMoF35WK-YIaKSpQglIzsyinJlffABi1MA0Bb_PaokpIc49Q4uN5J0vdTf2fq6fEnAAD__wqOfsA) even as the state faces drought conditions in many areas. _"These centers are showing up in places that are very water-stressed,"_ said Margaret Cook, a water policy analyst at the Houston Advanced Research Center. _"There's no requirement for them to have conversations with communities about how much water they'll use."_
## Ghislaine Maxwell Moved to Texas 'Club Fed'
Ghislaine Maxwell, convicted accomplice to Jeffrey Epstein, was moved from Florida to [Federal Prison Camp Bryan in Texas](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkM-OqyAUh58Gdxg4YsUFi5vcuOtsJpNZGsCjngTFAK3t20_azBvM-kt-f77v63i1FGhfPuyGpjzmOO545oClYBpPWzD5uM-BfAnx9DEXT4VwBAEtF5oLGCdL4TmqajJOTL2s0MiuVbIB1atqNXqSs7AzatU77TrVQAtNLy6tF74X3ldkXmFCC5BSyEbWF-FAz2BdhwLReaYETlRiqsuKBR82z-EZ75hqH7cqmLWUI7PmH4OBwWCdfz2ol_jCDIavTwaDuyW0N34kynHPfIt3zHxZKQdLO_LNPk4M4Zdzb7eDv5sYDLnE9GTNQBNr_ktQoKXWXZXMdJwUAuVLx5RYNkvhPaj8TePdwE8AAAD__9WgiD0) Friday, following a two-day meeting with Deputy Attorney General Todd Blanche in Tallahassee. Maxwell, serving a 20-year prison sentence for sex trafficking in connection with Epstein, discussed "about 100 names” with Blanche, but the Justice Department is yet to disclose further details from the talks. The move takes Maxwell from a low-security prison for men and women to a minimum-security facility for women only in Bryan, sometimes referred to as “[Club Fed](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkbGyozAMRb_GdHpjO0BIQbEN3dt2S8Y2ImhGYBYpIfz9jt8vbKNG0rlz5v75Hr8DMW3P32HFXj9zHjc8hVEVj_EMikfK28yUlPOZsmgiJRy99Q3YDqwfp0B8jXU19dFOD1dh7-5N7W6-ftTV0rs51Y3FgI-6TRgjYtPEgKmN8dHdQ1tRX2C2s945627uq7XRd7MP8Y4WMSZTW5xI8_GlCyp-gsx85TceXymvFfeL6i7m9sv4wfhhu_YsWlbGD4Vs_GC7Mpzxw0ug-Bk_PBcSDrQhrOFzIjP8fREqX7DmN06gGdJLlqvcw08q7AdJ3iAIyIKwv2RBgTkfMGHg8qAFE5ghb4C7KNIGCwkEkZwoKJbg6uin_SRmkvZuavtcA_GPiv5fAe_e_wsAAP__WhGe0g)” for its comfortable conditions. Maxwell has reportedly been seeking immunity in exchange for revealing information about Epstein’s child sex abuse and trafficking case. Her case is currently up for [appeal to the Supreme Court,](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDvO4yAUhVeDOyzA-FVQTOMu005pYbjEd4SNBVch2f0vZwt_d6Qjncf377E-LEY8n3_tAYbeIa0n1BKBCPJaLUF26QwRHcVUXSrkkBBWJVTPxcSFWr3F-Fl1480m_CwbMHLsteyUnnWzG9mPnbXd1AfptnGYhRPa-3GYZqv1NnYNmjtMTEJJKWQn20FsagrKbiMIgM0xLcAjpdzSDgRvW0L8pBfk1qWjiWYnugrr_jC1MLXUWlu3lfvF7TO13JKp5bljiRZP4Id9V4iR_4cQMnw4XIUAT25LSQ4tAT_SCzwP4CHbyK-MJZ0cT_5tZ2ppsvFXxRixDCPT4nlYjN859DuIL6N-AgAA___G2IoG) where it is scheduled for closed-door discussion in September.
## List: Texas Cities High on Low-Cost Ranking
Eight Texas cities were recently ranked among the best cities in the U.S. with a [low cost of living](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGunDAQRb_GdCB7DAtbuIj0RLdpU1pjM4AVg5E9u-z-fUTSpnvdSOdodO_99bAPDDHsy0_cyPB7Tnans0RipmxPZMo-7XMMnmM6fSrsAweyIKGr5VBLsBOG-LFtNRknp7uqyKi-a5WG9t5Wq3HtvdPdTIQwy0m7zmvEbu6BnBrQQRXM9UwOEpSSSqvmJh0MM6DrSRI5L1pJU-CUG16J6Y1ljp_0otz4tFXRrMxHEfqHgFHAmAkjFUam5lmuLpclYDwieiqXgPvvsC_X6ahw_Q_UnOoYXiRg9Cvh8R-ix5IyC_21IftVwG0Ny2o52ZhOob84P6nKZjrOEGMot160ctkwxL8x-Xvjvgz8CQAA__-wuJKB), gaining by far the highest representation of any U.S. state on the list of 25 cities. Mission led the way for Texas with a No. 5 overall ranking, while Eagle Pass, at No. 7, rounded at Texas’ representation in the top 10. Laredo, League City, Katy, Wichita Falls, Harlingen, and McAllen also made the cut on the list that analyzed median home value, monthly rent, and household income, among other factors. Decatur, Illinois, took No. 1 on the list, which you can see [in full here](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGunDAQRb_GdCB7DAtbuIj0RLdpU1pjM4AVg5E9u-z-fUTSpnvdSOdodO_99bAPDDHsy0_cyPB7Tnans0RipmxPZMo-7XMMnmM6fSrsAweyIKGr5VBLsBOG-LFtNRknp7uqyKi-a5WG9t5Wq3HtvdPdTIQwy0m7zmvEbu6BnBrQQRXM9UwOEpSSSqvmJh0MM6DrSRI5L1pJU-CUG16J6Y1ljp_0otz4tFXRrMxHEfqHgFHAmAkjFUam5lmuLpclYDwieiqXgPvvsC_X6ahw_Q_UnOoYXiRg9Cvh8R-ix5IyC_21IftVwG0Ny2o52ZhOob84P6nKZjrOEGMot160ctkwxL8x-Xvjvgz8CQAA__-wuJKB).

New episodes drop daily—watch on YouTube or listen on Spotify and Apple Podcasts, all in under 15 minutes. | | Data Centers Battle Residents for Water Two San Antonio data centers have used 463 million gallons of water over the past two years, while city residents are under The data centers, owned by Microsoft and the Army Corps, are using volumes of water equivalent to tens of thousands of local households, primarily to cool massive banks of servers that power artificial intelligence tools. In 2025, data centers across the state are projected to use 49 billion gallons of water, even as the state faces drought conditions in many areas. "These centers are showing up in places that are very water-stressed," said Margaret Cook, a water policy analyst at the Houston Advanced Research Center. "There's no requirement for them to have conversations with communities about how much water they'll use." Ghislaine Maxwell Moved to Texas 'Club Fed' Ghislaine Maxwell, convicted accomplice to Jeffrey Epstein, was moved from Florida to Friday, following a two-day meeting with Deputy Attorney General Todd Blanche in Tallahassee. Maxwell, serving a 20-year prison sentence for sex trafficking in connection with Epstein, discussed "about 100 names” with Blanche, but the Justice Department is yet to disclose further details from the talks. The move takes Maxwell from a low-security prison for men and women to a minimum-security facility for women only in Bryan, sometimes referred to as “” for its comfortable conditions. Maxwell has reportedly been seeking immunity in exchange for revealing information about Epstein’s child sex abuse and trafficking case. Her case is currently up for where it is scheduled for closed-door discussion in September. List: Texas Cities High on Low-Cost Ranking Eight Texas cities were recently ranked among the best cities in the U.S. with a , gaining by far the highest representation of any U.S. state on the list of 25 cities. Mission led the way for Texas with a No. 5 overall ranking, while Eagle Pass, at No. 7, rounded at Texas’ representation in the top 10. Laredo, League City, Katy, Wichita Falls, Harlingen, and McAllen also made the cut on the list that analyzed median home value, monthly rent, and household income, among other factors. name: Douglas Carswell
subject: Speaker White: Game On for School Choice in Mississippi!
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/gameonforschoolchoice?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
| _**If you're not in front of our Saturday email, you're behind.**_
---
| Dear Friend, **The Neshoba County Fair is a Mississippi tradition, bringing together thousands of folk at the height of summer for a week of Southern celebration** —music, dancing, food, cattle shows, horse racing, and, of course, politics. Ever since Ronald Reagan kicked off his 1980 presidential campaign at the Fair, it’s been _the_ place where public officials in our state go to share their vision.
---
|
---
_Historic speech - Ronald Reagan at Neshoba_
| Of course, not every speech I’ve heard at Neshoba was always memorable or historic. This Thursday was different. **House Speaker Jason White delivered a powerful speech making the case for universal school choice, which may mark a turning point for Mississippi. **

**Reflecting on his promise last year to eliminate the income tax—a promise he kept—Speaker White made it clear that we can expect to see a comprehensive bill to extend school choice in 2026. **“Every child regardless of their zip code,” he said “deserves a fair chance to succeed. .... Parents know what’s best for their children”.

White emphasized that Mississippi families should control their child’s share of state education funds, empowering them to choose the best education—public, private, or homeschool—for their children.
---
|
---
_Jason White at the podium hit a home run_
| **White’s speech was frequently interrupted by prolonged applause from the crowd.** Enthusiasm was obvious when the Speaker framed school choice, or what President Trump calls “Parent Power,” as a cornerstone of conservative policy.

**_The Trump White House, Speaker White noted, is fully supportive of his push for Parent Power. _**

Governor Reeves, who followed Speaker White at the podium talked about school choice at the press huddle afterwards. **Reeves made it clear he is 100 percent onboard with White’s plan.** The Governor suggested that Mississippi needed to prioritise school choice now that so many other southern states had done so.
---
|
---
_Trump and Tate both back Jason White on school choice_
| Every neighboring state—Arkansas, Alabama, Tennessee, and Louisiana—has embraced school choice, giving families choices for their kids that once only rich people had.

**The 2025 Neshoba County Fair could go down in history as the occasion where the House Speaker came out clearly for School Choice – and the conservative movement, urged on by the Trump White House, rallied in support. **

I might not have been at Neshoba for Reagan in 1980, but I was there for Jason White in 2025. A historic inflection point for our state.
---
| [Forward this email to a friend!](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=6a5657ff07&e=5703353baa "Forward this email to a friend!")
---
| |
---
Warm regards,

Douglas Carswell
President & CEO
---
|
---
| | _ _

Mississippi Center for Public Policy520 George StJackson, MS 39202-3013

Did you see this message, Peter?

**There are eight candidates vying to represent Michigan's 10th District in Congress – seven of them are men. Christina Hines is the only woman.

This seat was rated a Tossup in 2026 by Larry Sabato’s Crystal Ball, and it is one of the DCCC’s targeted races for 2026. It’s currently held by Republican darling John James. **

In the 2022 election for this seat, Republican John James won by 0.5% – not even a full 1%. Now, John James is running for Governor, which makes this an open and highly competitive seat. All of the other U.S. House races in swing districts have Republican incumbents, which makes it tougher for a Democrat to break through.

In 2018, John James said he is “100% Pro-Life” and compared abortion to “genocide.” Most recently, **Representative James proudly voted YES on Trump’s “Big Beautiful Bill** ,” which is one of the worst bills to become law in modern history.

Here’s how Christina responded:

_“The Republicans passed their bill. It's a direct hit to the people who work the hardest and carry the heaviest burdens – and it will make life more expensive for almost all of us. As a prosecutor and as an advocate, I believe that public servants are supposed to work FOR the people, not against them.

I’m running for Congress because I want to make sure my neighbors - the working families in our community - have affordable healthcare, housing, groceries, and daycare. We have a lot of work to do, but together, we can continue to fight for a better future.” _**

Larry Sabato’s ‘Crystal Ball’ has rated MI-10 as a Tossup in 2026, and this district is one of the DCCC’s targeted races for 2026.** When Christina was on the ballot as the Democratic Nominee for County Prosecutor in 2024, she **outperformed** both the Democratic congressional nominee AND Kamala Harris. Now, it's time to ensure she has what she needs to replace John James and get us a step closer to regaining control of the House.

**This is our _most realistic opportunity_ of the entire 2026 cycle to flip a House seat from red to blue – and we need your help to make that happen.**

[****This is the time that Christina needs the most help, as institutional support groups are evaluating where to invest. Help us ensure Christina has what she needs to catch up to her all-male opponents and get her as much attention as possible by rushing a contribution to her campaign today. →**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hbm-hines/?refcode=EM_F_250731FWDC_N_C_NO_5_G_N_L3&amount=20.26)

Together,

Erica Henry
Senior Political Advisor
Her Bold Move

clean_body: The recent history of this district tells a pretty encouraging story...| | | | | = Did you see this message, Peter? There are eight candidates vying to represent Michigan's 10th District in Congress – seven of them are men. Christina Hines is the only woman. This seat was rated a Tossup in 2026 by Larry Sabato’s Crystal Ball, and it is one of the DCCC’s targeted races for 2026. It’s currently held by Republican darling John James. = Christina is highly qualified, but she’s lagging behind her male competitors in fundraising. Although it seems early to be thinking about 2026, this is the time that she needs the most help, as institutional support groups are evaluating where to invest their dollars for 2026. Historically, a disproportionate amount of this funding goes to men. This is the only open, competitive House seat on the entire electoral map. This race provides a truly realistic opportunity for Democrats to regain the House , and we cannot let it slip away → Together, Colleen Davis Endorsements Manager Her Bold Move \----------- Forwarded message --------- Hi Peter, Did you hear the news? Her Bold Move is proud to endorse Christina Hines for the congressional race that will likely decide which political party will have control of Congress in the 2nd half of Trump’s term. Eight candidates are vying for this seat – and Christina is the only woman. You read that right: This is the ONLY OPEN COMPETITIVE HOUSE SEAT on the entire electoral map. This race offers a great chance for Democrats to regain the House, and we absolutely cannot let it slip away. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately and automatically split between Her Bold Move and Christina Hines: | | = | | = | = | | = | = | | = In the 2022 election for this seat, Republican John James won by 0.5% – not even a full 1%. Now, John James is running for Governor, which makes this an open and highly competitive seat. All of the other U.S. House races in swing districts have Republican incumbents, which makes it tougher for a Democrat to break through. In 2018, John James said he is “100% Pro-Life” and compared abortion to “genocide.” Most recently, Representative James proudly voted YES on Trump’s “Big Beautiful Bill ,” which is one of the worst bills to become law in modern history. Here’s how Christina responded: “The Republicans passed their bill. It's a direct hit to the people who work the hardest and carry the heaviest burdens – and it will make life more expensive for almost all of us. As a prosecutor and as an advocate, I believe that public servants are supposed to work FOR the people, not against them. I’m running for Congress because I want to make sure my neighbors - the working families in our community - have affordable healthcare, housing, groceries, and daycare. We have a lot of work to do, but together, we can continue to fight for a better future.” Larry Sabato’s ‘Crystal Ball’ has rated MI-10 as a Tossup in 2026, and this district is one of the DCCC’s targeted races for 2026. When Christina was on the ballot as the Democratic Nominee for County Prosecutor in 2024, she outperformed both the Democratic congressional nominee AND Kamala Harris. Now, it's time to ensure she has what she needs to replace John James and get us a step closer to regaining control of the House. This is our most realistic opportunity of the entire 2026 cycle to flip a House seat from red to blue – and we need your help to make that happen. Together, Erica Henry Senior Political Advisor Her Bold Move | | Her Bold Move is the fastest-growing support network for women running for political office in America. As dangerous laws about women get passed in states with the lowest numbers of women in government (11%, 12%....), we're BREAKING the male supermajorities across those states. name: Paula Scanlan
subject: Lia Thomas Vows to Fight Trump
disclaimer_text: Paid for by American Principles Project
body:
[https://secure.winred.com/american-principles-project/app_don_mawco_wmb_psc-lts_rs_20250802?recurring=true&utm_campaign=paula-thomas&utm_term=lrm-active]

[https://secure.winred.com/american-principles-project/app_don_mawco_wmb_psc-lts_rs_20250802?recurring=true&utm_campaign=paula-thomas&utm_term=lrm-active]

Friend, in 2022, I was forced to share a locker room, bathroom, and
swimming team with Lia Thomas, a mentally ill man who couldn’t
compete with men so he started insisting he was a woman.

I poured my life into swimming, years of grueling training and
sacrifice, and I watched Lia Thomas smirk when we were told we had to
change in and out of bathing suits in front of_ HIM_ by our
University, or risk being kicked out of the athletic program all
together.

I saw girls in the locker room freeze, terrified, forced to strip down
next to a 6’4” man insisting he was a woman.

And I watched them get shattered when they missed going All-American
by one spot, a spot they’d have owned if they weren’t being forced
to compete against a delusional man.

_THE INJUSTICE STILL BURNS._
[https://secure.winred.com/american-principles-project/app_don_mawco_wmb_psc-lts_rs_20250802?recurring=true&utm_campaign=paula-thomas&utm_term=lrm-active]

_IT WASN’T FAIR THEN, AND IT’S NOT FAIR NOW._
[https://secure.winred.com/american-principles-project/app_don_mawco_wmb_psc-lts_rs_20250802?recurring=true&utm_campaign=paula-thomas&utm_term=lrm-active]

President Trump saw the injustice for what it was. That’s why he
signed an Executive Order BANNING BIOLOGICAL MEN FROM WOMEN’S
SPORTS, delivering justice when spineless bureaucrats and woke cowards
wouldn’t.

_WE THOUGHT THE FIGHT WAS OVER - WE WERE WRONG.
[https://secure.winred.com/american-principles-project/app_don_mawco_wmb_psc-lts_rs_20250802?recurring=true&utm_campaign=paula-thomas&utm_term=lrm-active]_

Now, Lia Thomas - _with the backing of the radical mob_, _woke
corporations_, and_ far-left Universities_ - just came out and said
_HE_ will do everything in his power to fight against President
Trump’s Executive Order...

[https://secure.winred.com/american-principles-project/app_don_mawco_wmb_psc-lts_rs_20250802?recurring=true&utm_campaign=paula-thomas&utm_term=lrm-active]

DEFEND WOMEN
[https://secure.winred.com/american-principles-project/app_don_mawco_wmb_psc-lts_rs_20250802?recurring=true&utm_campaign=paula-thomas&utm_term=lrm-active]

Lia Thomas isn’t just fighting by himself. He’s vowing to drag
this battle back into the courts, backed by deep-pocketed extremists
who don’t care about fairness, science, or the girls who’ve
trained their whole lives for a shot that he wants stolen from them.

I’m not standing by while Lia Thomas and his allies try to tear down
what’s right... I’m fighting back!

AND I NEED YOU WITH ME.

Fellow patriot, I am launching a campaign to crush Lia Thomas before
he can even begin. It’s not just about me, it’s about every girl
who dreams of competing fairly.

_IF LIA THOMAS SUCCEEDS IN HIS CHALLENGE OF PRESIDENT TRUMP’S
EXECUTIVE ORDER, THE NEXT VICTIM COULD BE A YOUNG WOMAN THAT YOU LOVE
HAVING HER VICTORY SNATCHED AWAY OR EXPERIENCING A LIFE ALTERING
INJURY AT THE HANDS OF A MAN ON THE FIELD.
[https://secure.winred.com/american-principles-project/app_don_mawco_wmb_psc-lts_rs_20250802?recurring=true&utm_campaign=paula-thomas&utm_term=lrm-active]_

DEFEND WOMEN
[https://secure.winred.com/american-principles-project/app_don_mawco_wmb_psc-lts_rs_20250802?recurring=true&utm_campaign=paula-thomas&utm_term=lrm-active]

I’m throwing everything I’ve got at this but I can’t stop _HIM_
alone.

The deep-pocketed extremists behind _HIM_ are counting on us to back
down. They’re wrong. With your help, we’ll win this fight.

I’m staring down Lia Thomas and his army of woke elitists - just
like I did in March of 2022. For the outcome to be different than it
was back then, I need your help.

We can't let them steamroll us and torch every girl’s shot at
fairness.

FRIEND, PLEASE HELP ME TODAY TO DEFEND WOMEN FROM THESE RADICALS
[https://secure.winred.com/american-principles-project/app_don_mawco_wmb_psc-lts_rs_20250802?recurring=true&utm_campaign=paula-thomas&utm_term=lrm-active].

_With courage,_

PAULA SCANLON

American Principles Project

[https://secure.winred.com/american-principles-project/app_don_mawco_wmb_psc-lts_rs_20250802?recurring=true&utm_campaign=paula-thomas&utm_term=lrm-active]

clean_body: [] [] Friend, in 2022, I was forced to share a locker room, bathroom, and swimming team with Lia Thomas, a mentally ill man who couldn’t compete with men so he started insisting he was a woman. I poured my life into swimming, years of grueling training and sacrifice, and I watched Lia Thomas smirk when we were told we had to change in and out of bathing suits in front of HIM by our University, or risk being kicked out of the athletic program all together. I saw girls in the locker room freeze, terrified, forced to strip down next to a 6’4” man insisting he was a woman. And I watched them get shattered when they missed going All-American by one spot, a spot they’d have owned if they weren’t being forced to compete against a delusional man. THE INJUSTICE STILL BURNS. [] IT WASN’T FAIR THEN, AND IT’S NOT FAIR NOW. [] President Trump saw the injustice for what it was. That’s why he signed an Executive Order BANNING BIOLOGICAL MEN FROM WOMEN’S SPORTS, delivering justice when spineless bureaucrats and woke cowards wouldn’t. WE THOUGHT THE FIGHT WAS OVER - WE WERE WRONG. [] Now, Lia Thomas - with the backing of the radical mob, woke corporations, and far-left Universities - just came out and said HE will do everything in his power to fight against President Trump’s Executive Order... [] DEFEND WOMEN [] Lia Thomas isn’t just fighting by himself. He’s vowing to drag this battle back into the courts, backed by deep-pocketed extremists who don’t care about fairness, science, or the girls who’ve trained their whole lives for a shot that he wants stolen from them. I’m not standing by while Lia Thomas and his allies try to tear down what’s right... I’m fighting back! AND I NEED YOU WITH ME. Fellow patriot, I am launching a campaign to crush Lia Thomas before he can even begin. It’s not just about me, it’s about every girl who dreams of competing fairly. IF LIA THOMAS SUCCEEDS IN HIS CHALLENGE OF PRESIDENT TRUMP’S EXECUTIVE ORDER, THE NEXT VICTIM COULD BE A YOUNG WOMAN THAT YOU LOVE HAVING HER VICTORY SNATCHED AWAY OR EXPERIENCING A LIFE ALTERING INJURY AT THE HANDS OF A MAN ON THE FIELD. [] DEFEND WOMEN [] I’m throwing everything I’ve got at this but I can’t stop HIM alone. The deep-pocketed extremists behind HIM are counting on us to back down. They’re wrong. With your help, we’ll win this fight. I’m staring down Lia Thomas and his army of woke elitists - just like I did in March of 2022. For the outcome to be different than it was back then, I need your help. We can't let them steamroll us and torch every girl’s shot at fairness. FRIEND, PLEASE HELP ME TODAY TO DEFEND WOMEN FROM THESE RADICALS []. With courage, PAULA SCANLON American Principles Project [] Paid for by American Principles Project []

My Fellow Concerned American,, I was one of the first savagely beaten by lawless, violent Antifa thugs. And unless we do something to stop them today, I won’t be the last. **[I’m asking you to donate $35 or more today to help me bring Antifa and its members who assaulted me to justice.](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.) ** **I was at Antifa's "ground zero" in Portland, Oregon during the summer of 2019.** This was before most Americans had ever heard of the Antifa movement, but they'd caused havoc and violence before. I went to an Antifa "protest" as a journalist to document and report on their “protest.” As soon as I arrived, I feared for my safety. The mob was angry, and violence always follows Antifa. Most of them wore masks to prevent being identified when they commit crimes. Many had on helmets and carried riot gear. Some, I later learned, secretly had weapons like baseball bats, brass knuckles and even bricks. I was scared, but I had a job to do, so I pressed on. **People like you needed to know what was happening.** But I didn't go unnoticed for long. Somebody recognized me and bashed me on the back of my head in an ambush. "F*** you, Andy Ngo!" shouted voices around me. "Go home, fascist!" **Fists started flying at my face and head. Then came the projectiles.** Before I knew it, I was being repeatedly punched, kicked, and hit with objects. I tried to protect my head. I did not strike back as I knew that would only escalate the situation and put me in more danger. The thugs robbed me of my camera so that I wouldn’t have evidence of the assault. What they did to me is unacceptable and criminal. And now they're trying to do the same to other innocent Americans like you. That's why I sued members of the Rose City Antifa organization to bring them to justice and send the loud clear message that they are NOT above the law. Now I need your help to hold their feet to the fire and make sure justice is served. [**Will you donate $35 or more to help me hold Antifa accountable?**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.) This is bigger than me alone. After I got away from the mob, police finally showed up when I was in the hospital. But my attackers stole my evidence and nearly silenced me permanently with a traumatic brain injury. Later, cell phone footage from a bystander surfaced online. Thank goodness! The video captured part of the attack, clear as day. I hoped I'd get the justice I deserved. Wrong. To this day, six years later, the Portland Police have done nothing. **No charges. No arrests. No suspects questioned.** It's not much of a surprise, though. Radical politicians have long since bowed to the dangerous left-wing mobs that terrorize their streets. That’s why the Center for American Liberty helped me file a lawsuit against my attackers. A judge ordered three of them to pay damages – but more than a year later and they have not paid a dime. So now the Center for American Liberty is helping me track them down and make them pay for nearly killing me and trampling upon the First Amendment. Unfortunately it’s going to cost at least $20,000 to get justice. [**That's why I hope you'll join the fight by donating $35 or more to fund my efforts to hold Antifa and its members accountable.**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.) We have to stop Antifa and make them face real, legal consequences for their destructive actions before they get to you and your family. Antifa wants the literal end of America -- and they'll stop at nothing to get it. Believe me when I say that's not an overstatement. Some members are avowed socialists or communists. But many are much worse – open violent anarchists who want to tear down civilization and remake it in their own twisted vision with no law and order. By any means necessary. **_Rioting. Destruction. Mayhem._** And they know, as long as they choose politically favored protests to co-opt, the media and politicians will never have the guts to denounce their violence or hold them accountable. They did that with BLM. They’re doing it now against ICE. It's a sick strategy, but very smart – because so far, they've been successful. **For the most part, they've gotten off scot-free.** Our politicians and media are treating this terrorist group like peaceful protestors! As we saw in Los Angeles earlier this summer, their riots will only spread and intensify if Antifa continue to escape consequences. **So now I'm taking justice into my own hands – with the help of the talented lawyers at the Center for American Liberty.**

[**You can be a part of bringing Antifa to justice with a donation of $35 or more today.**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.) Though I'm seeking justice for myself, the impact of this case could be so much larger. This is about standing up for our country when our own leaders won't. This is about saving America as we know it and keeping you and your family safe. And this is just the first blow we intend to deliver. By taking them to court for the attack against me we can prove they are NOT untouchable. **[Can I count on you to donate $35 or more to help me get justice from Antifa?](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.) ** Please don't wait – if we don't fight back and win now, **these violent thugs will be in EVERY city across America** , destroying everything and everyone in their path. Thank you in advance for your support.
---
| | Sincerely,
---
| | [](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
**Andy Ngo**
---
|
---
| | P.S. I know firsthand that America's troubles with Antifa aren't over -- **they're just beginning**. Just look at what happened in Los Angeles earlier this summer. Today, we can make them face the consequences that left-wing politicians refuse to dole out. [**Please donate as generously as you can right away.**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
[ **DONATE** ](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)

name: Maximum warfare
subject: A dark escalation in the redistricting arms race
body:
We can gerrymander every blue state and they can gerrymander every red state but if they gerrymander the purple swing states, simple arithmetic shows we lose.
| | | | | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001JYOKidD0GBL-zi1LxA1YfK8BuhORoYCJ994Md1OrgdGKO2p62iS713XM_1k8J_lvvaATXmj9YFHAlH0yLtGjhj7-gdiwQR-TI25Slcx69C9YoPugu6s9HTQPG35EicnY0EIWHMFTBRyav02xBMagtW3T5phtwuYYtnTkv-Ye-y8oPFSMWEzPMFxtGrRypqGyxwdF1CyKZWp75DpWaVismdoeqWXAPCcKia-R11SlWLA=&c=9pR1YBE4PzwgbE0e6NJK78JiB76AHQv9IQrAcj_JgZqFBDhzBDa3bA==&ch=_ObuSl_i9CqXnMrC94uZ2m5cXe6h_JLcjrOC8ndYr2qVEsNf07oRsw==)
---
| Peter,
First: Panicked over losing the House in 2026, Trump came to Republicans in the Texas Legislature and demanded that they redistrict blue seats into red ones. They delivered. One map they are suggesting eliminates all 12 of Texas's blue Congressional districts.
Then: California Democrats fired back by declaring that if Texas goes through with their plan, California will fire back by redistricting Republican districts.
Now: Republicans, trying to gain an edge in the rapidly escalating redistricting arms race that they started, have launched a massive operation to seize the PA Supreme Court in an obscure 2025 election so they can ram through maps that eliminates all of PA's blue districts.
---
| | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001JYOKidD0GBL-zi1LxA1YfK8BuhORoYCJ994Md1OrgdGKO2p62iS713XM_1k8J_lvvaATXmj9YFHAlH0yLtGjhj7-gdiwQR-TI25Slcx69C9YoPugu6s9HTQPG35EicnY0EIWHMFTBRyav02xBMagtW3T5phtwuYYtnTkv-Ye-y8oPFSMWEzPMFxtGrRypqGyxwdF1CyKZWp75DpWaVismTlKbwJIA18ONJWXFn-fbeE=&c=9pR1YBE4PzwgbE0e6NJK78JiB76AHQv9IQrAcj_JgZqFBDhzBDa3bA==&ch=_ObuSl_i9CqXnMrC94uZ2m5cXe6h_JLcjrOC8ndYr2qVEsNf07oRsw==)
---
| This is how we lose our Democracy. One congressional map at a time.
Democrats can go tit for tat and eliminate GOP House districts in blue states, but the GOP is one step ahead of us... They are fixated on taking over State Supreme Courts in swing states like Pennsylvania and Wisconsin.
We can gerrymander every blue state and they can gerrymander every red state but if they gerrymander the purple swing states, simple arithmetic shows we lose.
We have three months until election day in Pennsylvania and Democrats are woefully unprepared. The GOP is fully mobilized and ready for all out war whereas Democrats in PA barely even know there's an election happening.
[Defend Our Courts is one of the only democratic groups ringing the alarm bell about this race and we are outnumbered and outgunned. Can you make a donation so we can show up in November with some real firepower to save the critical Dem majority on the PA supreme court?](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001JYOKidD0GBL-zi1LxA1YfK8BuhORoYCJ994Md1OrgdGKO2p62iS713XM_1k8J_lvvaATXmj9YFHAlH0yLtGjhj7-gdiwQR-TI25Slcx69C9YoPugu6s9HTQPG35EicnY0EIWHMFTBRyav02xBMagtW3T5phtwuYYtnTkv-Ye-y8oPFSMWEzPMFxtGrRypqGyxwdF1CyKZWp75DpWaVismcve6biqAPwXJRQDy07ou4Y=&c=9pR1YBE4PzwgbE0e6NJK78JiB76AHQv9IQrAcj_JgZqFBDhzBDa3bA==&ch=_ObuSl_i9CqXnMrC94uZ2m5cXe6h_JLcjrOC8ndYr2qVEsNf07oRsw==)

clean_body: We can gerrymander every blue state and they can gerrymander every red state but if they gerrymander the purple swing states, simple arithmetic shows we lose. | | | | | == | Peter, First: Panicked over losing the House in 2026, Trump came to Republicans in the Texas Legislature and demanded that they redistrict blue seats into red ones. They delivered. One map they are suggesting eliminates all 12 of Texas's blue Congressional districts. Then: California Democrats fired back by declaring that if Texas goes through with their plan, California will fire back by redistricting Republican districts. Now: Republicans, trying to gain an edge in the rapidly escalating redistricting arms race that they started, have launched a massive operation to seize the PA Supreme Court in an obscure 2025 election so they can ram through maps that eliminates all of PA's blue districts. | | == | This is how we lose our Democracy. One congressional map at a time. Democrats can go tit for tat and eliminate GOP House districts in blue states, but the GOP is one step ahead of us... They are fixated on taking over State Supreme Courts in swing states like Pennsylvania and Wisconsin. We can gerrymander every blue state and they can gerrymander every red state but if they gerrymander the purple swing states, simple arithmetic shows we lose. We have three months until election day in Pennsylvania and Democrats are woefully unprepared. The GOP is fully mobilized and ready for all out war whereas Democrats in PA barely even know there's an election happening. == | | | | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | == | == | == | | == | == | == | | | | == Thank you for coming to our aid in this moment of crisis. Team Defend Our Courts | | | | | | | | | | == | | | | | == | | | | Mail checks to: | | | | Defend Our CourtsP.O. Box 45569 Philadelphia, PA 19149 US | | | ==

Meet Coach Tuberville:

**Coach Tuberville was born in Camden, Arkansas, the third of three children of Olive and Charles Tuberville. College Football’s 2004 Coach of the Year and two-time SEC Coach of the Year, Tommy Tuberville is most often recognized for his success on the field. But it is the legacy of his father, a highly decorated WWII veteran and Purple Heart recipient, that motivates Coach Tuberville to give back to the brave men and women of the United States Armed Forces.

In 1989 Coach Tuberville met his future wife, Suzanne Fette, at the Sugar Bowl in New Orleans. They were married in 1991 and have two boys, Tucker and Troy, who continue to make their dad proud.

In his career as a College Football Coach, Tommy started a long and successful career at the University of Miami, starting as a graduate assistant and rising to the Hurricanes' defensive coordinator. He led the Canes to three AP national championships and coached future Hall of Famers Ray Lewis and Warren Sapp, as well as Dwayne "The Rock" Johnson.

In 1998, Coach Tuberville was announced as the next head coach for the Auburn Tigers. Tuberville’s time at Auburn was a success by any measure, as the Tigers captured eight consecutive bowl appearances, including five New Year’s Day bowl appearances, five SEC Western Division titles, one SEC Championship, and a 13-0 season in 2004, after which Coach Tuberville was once again named the AP’s SEC Coach of the Year. For his efforts during the perfect 2004 season, Tuberville would be named Paul “Bear” Bryant Coach of the Year, Associated Press Coach of the Year, Walter Camp Coach of the Year, Sporting News Coach of the Year, and AFCA Coach of the Year, among others.

_In 2020, Coach Tuberville became Senator Tuberville, winning his election to represent all Alabamians in the United States Senate with the full support of President Trump. Since then, he's supported President Trump's America-First policies while fighting off the Radical Left. In his first term as Senator, Tommy was one of eight Republicans to vote against certifying the 2020 election, has been a strong pro-life advocate, and called out Democrats for being pro-crime.

Now, Coach Tuberville is running for Governor so he can continue representing Alabamians and Americans in his homestate of Alabama. The Radical Left thinks they can flip Alabama blue and turn it into the California of the South. Can he count on your support? _

** [**HELP COACH TUBERVILLE**](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=345376993640443e860c2e1df45ff3a5&_e=crT7rtvDXaR08eIYzyz0Xfa_nLeeg2fozgUva7cc6qwHDu_f-toD7n1PspQOs8DAmUU35tBqbMxtcRcmabZJ1FGh0dc3rT9Tf4lqkuOcBUXpy4I21hVPL4yoeaqQq5OrzhqL8AnztP90JFQhGPvrZu7SROC-Ht3bP73rH7FhiqSu_RbkTisypcBvXAHNC-Sb08-ZGx5uUaeRepXkW0vDE8TQDl90g2dwjh7l7OBVgZltODxTdb-zGupKa8Apauak7khHE3uMQCKpA8dh5o_sihooSmGoi6Zc4_THPWQGgL2u-e8_dUADUlzvO9ziwR5EQgTeALkJIRmq5jbiKmWsS1zyhZGvmCDUR42XhQF-4UaN5-aUxjgpD408XBubxlZVfqmneMfuXcrKeb3mQQm9HRhp0ySNRiCoooezHJ3dwJ-V-MvEtSx9FfCaXf7mahrPunE90y1w1L8rNVPrLGIwO94WpTxTCcDJk-LMchhjEdohcx-hGLX3p7XiWlQC_gHhi0pD75DGlDtQhFrGLzDrpWMVs0GchV_4ORG8AAuHZRhXhCms8jJ5FNbp7bmJQiNi)

clean_body: Will you be one of them? | Peter, Today is a special day – it’s our Vice President’s birthday! JD Vance continues to exemplify what it means to be an American Patriot. From growing up with a single mother, who overcame drug addiction, to becoming the Vice President of the United States, I can’t think of a better American Dream story. | I’d like to send this list of Patriots to him before he slices his birthday cake this evening! Thank you, Coach Tuberville Meet Coach Tuberville: Coach Tuberville was born in Camden, Arkansas, the third of three children of Olive and Charles Tuberville. College Football’s 2004 Coach of the Year and two-time SEC Coach of the Year, Tommy Tuberville is most often recognized for his success on the field. But it is the legacy of his father, a highly decorated WWII veteran and Purple Heart recipient, that motivates Coach Tuberville to give back to the brave men and women of the United States Armed Forces. In 1989 Coach Tuberville met his future wife, Suzanne Fette, at the Sugar Bowl in New Orleans. They were married in 1991 and have two boys, Tucker and Troy, who continue to make their dad proud. In his career as a College Football Coach, Tommy started a long and successful career at the University of Miami, starting as a graduate assistant and rising to the Hurricanes' defensive coordinator. He led the Canes to three AP national championships and coached future Hall of Famers Ray Lewis and Warren Sapp, as well as Dwayne "The Rock" Johnson. In 1998, Coach Tuberville was announced as the next head coach for the Auburn Tigers. Tuberville’s time at Auburn was a success by any measure, as the Tigers captured eight consecutive bowl appearances, including five New Year’s Day bowl appearances, five SEC Western Division titles, one SEC Championship, and a 13-0 season in 2004, after which Coach Tuberville was once again named the AP’s SEC Coach of the Year. For his efforts during the perfect 2004 season, Tuberville would be named Paul “Bear” Bryant Coach of the Year, Associated Press Coach of the Year, Walter Camp Coach of the Year, Sporting News Coach of the Year, and AFCA Coach of the Year, among others. In 2020, Coach Tuberville became Senator Tuberville, winning his election to represent all Alabamians in the United States Senate with the full support of President Trump. Since then, he's supported President Trump's America-First policies while fighting off the Radical Left. In his first term as Senator, Tommy was one of eight Republicans to vote against certifying the 2020 election, has been a strong pro-life advocate, and called out Democrats for being pro-crime. Now, Coach Tuberville is running for Governor so he can continue representing Alabamians and Americans in his homestate of Alabama. The Radical Left thinks they can flip Alabama blue and turn it into the California of the South. Can he count on your support? PAID FOR BY TUBERVILLE FOR GOVERNOR, INC PO Box 43124 Birmingham, AL 35243 Copyright (C) 2025 Tuberville for Governor, Inc, All rights reserved.

name: Heather G.
subject: Your Democratic Membership Status Enclosed:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
Can you help us beat the summer slump?
| Hi friend, my name is Heather and I help run the Voter Protection Project!

**I’m reaching out because I noticed that you have yet to confirm your Democratic Supporter Membership to help us stop Trump and elect Democrats across the country.**

Summer months are always the toughest for fundraising — and with so our entire Democracy at stake, _we absolutely can’t afford to fall behind._

**There’s no better time to step up.** Trump is threatening to serve an unprecedented third term. MAGA Republicans are building their warchest to defeat Democrats in 2026. Grassroots support from Democrats like you is vital right now.

[So today, I hope you’ll help us kick off August strong: Will you confirm your Democratic Supporter Member so we can take back the House and Senate from the MAGA majority and save our Democracy? »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/92692?t=6&akid=20795%2E878179%2Ezb7bXN) | [CONFIRM YOUR DEMOCRATIC SUPPORTER MEMBERSHIP »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/92692?t=7&akid=20795%2E878179%2Ezb7bXN)
---
Thank you for all your support!

Heather G.
Executive Director
The Voter Protection Project
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=20795%2E878179%2Ezb7bXN). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=20795%2E878179%2Ezb7bXN).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=20795%2E878179%2Ezb7bXN) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=8&akid=20795%2E878179%2Ezb7bXN). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=20795%2E878179%2Ezb7bXN)
---
[Donate Just One Time »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/124?t=5&akid=20795%2E878179%2Ezb7bXN)

name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: I recently wrote an op-ed for Fox News, and I'd like to explain why
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Governor
body:
Virginians deserve a Governor who will put our Commonwealth first — and not take her marching orders from the White House.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112617701/561066828/830632682?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2025-08-02_2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDMyMmNkYWMtYTk2Zi1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=5lF1H6o-e7GM26V_7D2vICqYjajmUxuRcOEH6bVnixg=)
Peter, I recently wrote an op-ed for Fox News, and I'd like to explain why I'm taking my message everywhere.
Last month, Virginia was the only state in the country that saw a spike in unemployment claims. I've responded with a concrete plan for growing Virginia's economy.
_But my opponent's adopted a different approach._
Winsome Earle-Sears downplayed Trump's attack on our workforce. She's said "don't fret" to the thousands of career public servants laid off by DOGE, and suggested they update their resumes and log on to LinkedIn.
_Virginians deserve a Governor who will put our Commonwealth first — and not take her marching orders from the White House._
Every day as Governor, I will work to create family-sustaining jobs, rebuild our economic security, and protect working families from the chaos and cruelty coming out of Washington.
[_**Now, if you believe in our vision, I'm asking you to become a Founding Donor of our campaign by making a $25 contribution. Every dollar helps promote our agenda and hold our opponent accountable.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112617702/561066830/830632682?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2025-08-02_2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDMyMmNkYWMtYTk2Zi1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=5lF1H6o-e7GM26V_7D2vICqYjajmUxuRcOEH6bVnixg=)

clean_body: Virginians deserve a Governor who will put our Commonwealth first — and not take her marching orders from the White House. = Peter, I recently wrote an op-ed for Fox News, and I'd like to explain why I'm taking my message everywhere. Last month, Virginia was the only state in the country that saw a spike in unemployment claims. I've responded with a concrete plan for growing Virginia's economy. But my opponent's adopted a different approach. Winsome Earle-Sears downplayed Trump's attack on our workforce. She's said "don't fret" to the thousands of career public servants laid off by DOGE, and suggested they update their resumes and log on to LinkedIn. Virginians deserve a Governor who will put our Commonwealth first — and not take her marching orders from the White House. Every day as Governor, I will work to create family-sustaining jobs, rebuild our economic security, and protect working families from the chaos and cruelty coming out of Washington. = = = = = = = Thank you for standing with me, Abigail Spanberger P.S. I hope you will also take a moment to read the full op-ed. You can reply to this email with your thoughts or leave a comment on my social media pages. name: Adam Schwarze, former Navy SEAL
subject: A regular guy seeking a big job
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Schwarze for Senate
body:
As a former Navy SEAL, I thrive in tough fights. I’ve faced worse odds overseas and am ready to bring that same grit to Washington |

---

Fellow Conservative,

My name is Adam Schwarze, and I’m a former Navy SEAL, Marine Corps veteran, and proud Minnesotan **running for U.S. Senate against Tim Walz’s handpicked lieutenant governor—a politician even more radical than her boss.** I’m requesting your support in this critical battle to restore common-sense conservative values to Minnesota.

I hold a Master’s from Harvard, a Master’s Certificate from Johns Hopkins in Security and Nuclear Deterrence, and an MBA. But my proudest achievement is serving our country to make my parents, especially my mom, proud. I want to serve you in the U.S. Senate, fighting for the values that have made Minnesota and America great for generations.

[](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=c758d429257f456bb0b0b5353791027f&_e=2ZfpbzaE9VPT8RAg1UvIeOa91BmX6pnEVZw1zvB75Uy5-lrY-Zxsb8Pesk9gLXBfns7iIvxFYnhJysVA6eHW7pGNaaf3tGQ5sRGl1Lf1Zh0bGcMqFnCvP_S5hQ1v9O28_ftiLPWjaFDV5RGnhqSO-d8bFplQjmHTf6IfXbKj2CLOTRHhDnmhYTIij4viyHMl40y_3wqFv-oIAxtI460VlZIPjcUHRJ353m7FKPu7_biA3a3pYdE0ivDE0Uc8T9o-5R40plVaoqGBGCwz00R_3l9jkKNEKiJsHOvd_NxGJmSAsodhFlT30946u9Nz7Gr9cdK1qHeq02haLRNiOgQQQd9nFPY3k0u5lv8fSuxiCh3q-mxpaTJeQc1uYCQfLeyRp9FR-7fmxRiLZ90x1smnhqxLdJ2tyT8wYhka4W0sP6eQfTR-k17B-oONoop225l58y-P8v0JehOWwinqobu6AXXpRMAF7-CwaqlsSkGg8jeTllHlXvCVugEsMyQrnrntlf8FTMZ-ZU_puMqjHB5xSHZA-R7nUuHrtg6oB24TTJf5uLBm_ZdlRgzHtsHJ6SgWTF991uavaQAHHmgXWL_cJLORAeBA125IGkalYQeAxBxot4gJWwXQGykYl_Oie3BHIlOb2gs2DkIxwkQmNaGWhkrf4bo_Di0PupqlnNeRlaYAWNtwnRRxAUJC3R7atBv2K5cPnUP5lFxN4-qw7h5xkQSRj25IcEpqqRbXlEd2FPJtM7ftoGIoajAh2nmiTXQWnIFfJJr5JjqJqFCHvpDJzg%3D%3D)

**I’m starting this race with absolutely nothing** , but because of the enormity of the race's outcome, I figured there is no harm in asking for your help. At the end of the day, my request of you will end in one of two ways:
* 1.) **[you contribute to help elect a former Navy SEAL to the United States Senate](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=c758d429257f456bb0b0b5353791027f&_e=2ZfpbzaE9VPT8RAg1UvIeOa91BmX6pnEVZw1zvB75Uy5-lrY-Zxsb8Pesk9gLXBfns7iIvxFYnhJysVA6eHW7pGNaaf3tGQ5sRGl1Lf1Zh0bGcMqFnCvP_S5hQ1v9O28_ftiLPWjaFDV5RGnhqSO-d8bFplQjmHTf6IfXbKj2CLOTRHhDnmhYTIij4viyHMl40y_3wqFv-oIAxtI460VlZIPjcUHRJ353m7FKPu7_biA3a3pYdE0ivDE0Uc8T9o-5R40plVaoqGBGCwz00R_3hES5bLpU2TmeOGQlutMUndp-OsUnR0mWcqjCs9PNiaPnAl9xwwHX8QhP-rJUFxI6enSjjoBzgD-u0M0lR5e1Wn_DWC1OYbtlLruIFdYlal_qG728HG0SMQLeoTy8IrvUCzgQPO3Bu4wyoVoJ4V0RslZfcPbrOCuSAN8UINfFRXSL8JB5QllPj5DoWcZ5DvLyr2foNWOi9Xh-k22ZKGxvOvP1gF_nh4lsw9Xac2jePwABtcu2dlALNzcrcVzvuI8xtDHI98XZUp4sBrQtaQsrhDHgGUoGeKB5t5chJj1u3ISUmfwUvNPOUjdoB8eE8DRsdEmQxqis8G2Q45IMh5MPLe0YV0lEbPK8QkVoG1N4tnmj7Mqx50_0hXjFLaec-_u8Su4IBpG-pXoaRlxn958nl62F6TkOLak9L8nCpotMNXKRJLCAZj1t1glLqavVSOjxC_WJJwthrYHl-qYomcuvABA9-cCLgksTMUrSbfVPjqJSGArD6emBL6eHpCc7eyhGw%3D%3D)**.
* 2.) you read this email without contributing, but you at least now know who I am.

[**HELP ME GET MY CAMPAIGN OFF THE GROUND
CONTRIBUTE $2 OR MORE **](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=c758d429257f456bb0b0b5353791027f&_e=2ZfpbzaE9VPT8RAg1UvIeOa91BmX6pnEVZw1zvB75Uy5-lrY-Zxsb8Pesk9gLXBfns7iIvxFYnhJysVA6eHW7pGNaaf3tGQ5sRGl1Lf1Zh0bGcMqFnCvP_S5hQ1v9O28_ftiLPWjaFDV5RGnhqSO-d8bFplQjmHTf6IfXbKj2CLOTRHhDnmhYTIij4viyHMl40y_3wqFv-oIAxtI460VlZIPjcUHRJ353m7FKPu7_biA3a3pYdE0ivDE0Uc8T9o-5R40plVaoqGBGCwz00R_3run1ALIsslTkekR7RcvSC2h1POyT-QNpGmTVRLisdKEmpigHmVT9DWyNb8dasYn5ojPnDSRP9KlBt2_ArIk16TDU42-L6UPwVA03HKWOy89p8aix_I07H7SpehIAZ5YDKiVNJAX9cPXwieiri_6neKzpMFnmQDLS4LA-I9ehA8QFemC8EQGVJpdQ7FqMjYxHWrrSc36UGZkUOQPR2JhfJ1CC2hXZum1ZrlN0Lsvzb8d559gqfcX4EsZk1uLQM2EqkOE3VIOohzgxgkkaIajHJVcJOX7fE-Se4TH4gUmm6QsG1daRkesWAwCIG6MdhBYIHsOYJ9kKPnUHU6EbF7gN9_tODO8uvHM4mmEbEVXOdbSuHe0hM1F3LXvrF9gN1TXXc1NqFzXRiKLPkQjvtTDQgxwmnpc_qCHE9I3sTz2rM8srP5v6KUcBmUba2bvf0nOCR-3jVmkvqs-zcEvJ1v1SN9N1ssEahouPZNKqeUTV_5DMfGj964qJPb_Xl4zcldbjA%3D%3D)
**I’m not a career politician. I’m a regular guy from a working-class family who grew up playing hockey and answered our nation’s call on my 18th birthday in October 2001, just weeks after the 9/11 attacks.** I joined the Marine Corps to defend our country, and as a Navy SEAL, I deployed nine times to over 70 countries, risking my life to protect our freedoms and way of life. Unlike Tim Walz, who retired from the National Guard before his unit deployed to Iraq, I never backed down from serving our nation during war.

Minnesota is at a crossroads. Under Governor Walz and his lieutenant governor, our state has been dragged left by radical policies that fueled the violent unrest in Minneapolis in 2020, **defunded our police** , and burdened hardworking families with higher taxes and inflation. **While our streets burned, the lieutenant governor pushed lawsuits against law enforcement, undermining the officers keeping us safe.** This isn’t the Minnesota I grew up in—or the one any Minnesotan deserves.

**If you are reading this email right now and you don’t live in Minnesota, then I’m sure you’ll agree with me that every American must be represented by individuals in Congress who want to build a better version of the America we live in today—individuals of integrity.**

_**That’s not who my opponent is. **_

We have an incredible opportunity to elect a Republican to the U.S. Senate next year - something voters in this state haven’t done since they re-elected former Senator Norm Coleman in 2002. As a Republican, I know the odds are tough in a state that hasn’t voted red in a presidential election since 1976. But **as a former Navy SEAL, I thrive in tough fights. I’ve faced worse odds overseas and am ready to bring that same grit to Washington.**
