clean_body: As a former Navy SEAL, I thrive in tough fights. I’ve faced worse odds overseas and am ready to bring that same grit to Washington | Fellow Conservative, My name is Adam Schwarze, and I’m a former Navy SEAL, Marine Corps veteran, and proud Minnesotan running for U.S. Senate against Tim Walz’s handpicked lieutenant governor—a politician even more radical than her boss. I’m requesting your support in this critical battle to restore common-sense conservative values to Minnesota. I hold a Master’s from Harvard, a Master’s Certificate from Johns Hopkins in Security and Nuclear Deterrence, and an MBA. But my proudest achievement is serving our country to make my parents, especially my mom, proud. I want to serve you in the U.S. Senate, fighting for the values that have made Minnesota and America great for generations. I’m starting this race with absolutely nothing , but because of the enormity of the race's outcome, I figured there is no harm in asking for your help. At the end of the day, my request of you will end in one of two ways: 1.) . 2.) you read this email without contributing, but you at least now know who I am. I’m not a career politician. I’m a regular guy from a working-class family who grew up playing hockey and answered our nation’s call on my 18th birthday in October 2001, just weeks after the 9/11 attacks. I joined the Marine Corps to defend our country, and as a Navy SEAL, I deployed nine times to over 70 countries, risking my life to protect our freedoms and way of life. Unlike Tim Walz, who retired from the National Guard before his unit deployed to Iraq, I never backed down from serving our nation during war. Minnesota is at a crossroads. Under Governor Walz and his lieutenant governor, our state has been dragged left by radical policies that fueled the violent unrest in Minneapolis in 2020, defunded our police , and burdened hardworking families with higher taxes and inflation. While our streets burned, the lieutenant governor pushed lawsuits against law enforcement, undermining the officers keeping us safe. This isn’t the Minnesota I grew up in—or the one any Minnesotan deserves. If you are reading this email right now and you don’t live in Minnesota, then I’m sure you’ll agree with me that every American must be represented by individuals in Congress who want to build a better version of the America we live in today—individuals of integrity. That’s not who my opponent is. We have an incredible opportunity to elect a Republican to the U.S. Senate next year - something voters in this state haven’t done since they re-elected former Senator Norm Coleman in 2002. As a Republican, I know the odds are tough in a state that hasn’t voted red in a presidential election since 1976. But as a former Navy SEAL, I thrive in tough fights. I’ve faced worse odds overseas and am ready to bring that same grit to Washington. Here’s what I stand for: Restoring law and order by supporting our police and cracking down on crime. Cutting taxes and regulations to ease the burden on retirees and small businesses. Securing our borders to protect our communities and sovereignty. Defending our Second Amendment rights and traditional values. Stopping the radical left’s agenda that’s eroding the America we love. You don’t know me, but you know what men like me stand for and our reputation. So, . This race won’t be easy. The Democrats have deep pockets, and the radical left will stop at nothing to keep this seat. I’m running to serve you, to protect our way of life, and to ensure Minnesota remains a place where faith, family, and freedom thrive. I hope you’ll invest in me right now – any amount will help. With gratitude, Adam Schwarze Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate - Minnesota FOLLOW ADAM ON SOCIAL MEDIA** | | Paid for by Schwarze for Senate

name: Lindsey Graham
subject: The American Dream isn’t just a slogan.
body:
This is my story, but it’s not so different for many Americans. |
---
I want to share something from the heart with you, Fellow American.

**_My story._**
It isn't one of glitz and glamour -- it's about hard work, loss, and fighting for what's right. I'm reaching out to tell you why I'm in this fight for our future, and why I need you with me.

Neither of my parents finished high school. But they were hardworking and determined that their children would surpass their achievements.

Most of my growing up happened on the main street of a small textile mill town. My parents had a business establishment -- a combination beer joint, restaurant, liquor store, and pool hall -- known as the Sanitary Cafe right on Main Street in Central, SC. We all lived in the back of the bar where we worked late into the evening, especially my mom, before heading off to bed in the backroom.

[](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=7e14013e66514a57b3d0349c2c067b37&_e=7fPZqirFZQN534qt_dsQDSsp_hHgbUM5ZHsZBmTsf0dzhT3m1fiJeNV8cPI_tbjAquQ5qvnRYr1feyE767JLsaGmcwJTnQHyzJdA5loienTlm8iykvHwC_HPzPt7lhqDUnSe0QZuTsFc2sjEcsulcwN2JZc12JrZnBJ8uwvm7xXhpRM-S-kIvqp4exzz1YHqRg2pUl8XdItLn7j2OmZ_ozxZuNexnAQCzQXjkXPeM_nwCouMAXO4jVPJuNzmfA-8okxjkaehVNqwWU5WvRzTMyH540xrB6JTPevYdZKToDuJpjUK5fwASCw1n4JSOhy8aj4qpuLbdxrLoOUyyOzSLiocbgv5lRmmguCtexUNZ-_v37u4qoCR8-7l6li1E6SGYerLekKpcrDufaDUQwJjINk-_VYvUCaverGuBiO61R6NCAxmorcvf4IhDuaXdg7PIN7Xl9JfsHBRpxopRcVrWkk4oyebPHlI8dfODIe7tkhh0hr5HeK6LUqjdEquUuLKapwZ3UB6S_GPGiJR4W12Msp3Ry1vzJTZ2HYjbt2ymwGP5NZqLT6qAs_8rW2y-QQqD-Lzao928hiq4BU-lHYpv8GoxUwUT3uVegD8RRcdgn0m4-qwDGCWUvI2VVRmNkGLUEULK5KQHE6G02KU4YZgKRvW9iCvUk5NxAlMR54jGx3KRXIutahgE03S8VEvXD5L) I had no silver spoon in my mouth but I never felt I was missing out on something because I didn't live in a house like my friends did. I had a great life, and it was a great way to grow up.

I was the first in my family to attend college, but then life hit me hard. While I was in school, I lost my mom and dad within two years of each other. And just like that, I stepped up to help raise my 13-year-old sister, Darline, while coming back home on the weekends to help at our family business.

[](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=7e14013e66514a57b3d0349c2c067b37&_e=7fPZqirFZQN534qt_dsQDSsp_hHgbUM5ZHsZBmTsf0dzhT3m1fiJeNV8cPI_tbjAquQ5qvnRYr1feyE767JLsaGmcwJTnQHyzJdA5loienTlm8iykvHwC_HPzPt7lhqDUnSe0QZuTsFc2sjEcsulcwN2JZc12JrZnBJ8uwvm7xXhpRM-S-kIvqp4exzz1YHqRg2pUl8XdItLn7j2OmZ_ozxZuNexnAQCzQXjkXPeM_m__TYMZRqHFbw3YrFW9hk9y4Ss2S95t72bpoDpnvnFV31LRA5H8Pxkli3jqGoP-lEBFPQ6Wfs02WHDYLdhxLa0lTtmL-Of3DEPVq5-S5HXV8xhH8POtLNGLJHnWf11idHtz73d4R0StrUEpuhqVtsg3QSXgdOLKxV2VyaDaN-holU9MsTCZmqd1D2oRnk94CtQ2e33pZX98yUQ5g5eeDgQQIlnGERnuQWzQ3n-a7cAwT9SvQidslGhR5LG7AwwRkgag_mXoE_2CqwUjbnzEZ4mTHa5tkHTLUtjJ40ZPT29dvVvmFYpb_PiaNs5FBjwMo1cgY741ZqMwOTr36B7I2ZvhsVucOhzB3EumsCKI6zSn11DtdGynm5gmeJel84-5C_2eHvLi6WoN8FskZJdNQj_0UyJVggveQmRHax3t41sgmLI-jSt1MbKUjsVxZmx75mi7xMQzx3WfIMqGscS_-jZ) **Fellow American, I learned some tough lessons early on.**

After law school, I joined the U.S. Air Force as a Judge Advocate General, serving as a military prosecutor and defense attorney. Even after the people of South Carolina sent me to the United States Senate, I continued my service in the Air Force Reserves. I performed several short deployments in war zones like Afghanistan and Iraq, standing shoulder to shoulder with our brave men and women in uniform.

My story isn't all that different from yours or most people across this great country. I didn't have anything handed to me. I worked hard, grew up quickly, and took on big responsibilities.

**But what shaped me most was listening to the hard -working South Carolinians who'd come by our family business, sharing their hopes and struggles, or hearing the perspectives of my brave colleagues in the military.** _Whether I agreed with them or not, those conversations built my understanding of what Americans need and deserve._

Now, Fellow American, we all know our nation's in a tough spot -- we're divided, but there are some things we should agree on, plain and simple.

**🇺🇸 We need a country where you can raise your family without fear, where the streets are safe.**
**🇺🇸 We need a country where the American Dream isn't just a slogan.**
_It's alive, and every hard -working American has a real shot at it, no matter where they start._
**[That's what I'm fighting for every single day, Fellow American.](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=7e14013e66514a57b3d0349c2c067b37&_e=7fPZqirFZQN534qt_dsQDSsp_hHgbUM5ZHsZBmTsf0dzhT3m1fiJeNV8cPI_tbjAquQ5qvnRYr1feyE767JLsaGmcwJTnQHyzJdA5loienTlm8iykvHwC_HPzPt7lhqDUnSe0QZuTsFc2sjEcsulcwN2JZc12JrZnBJ8uwvm7xXhpRM-S-kIvqp4exzz1YHqRg2pUl8XdItLn7j2OmZ_ozxZuNexnAQCzQXjkXPeM_mU3Rn4P69ojIjWX499qZXBTj-sKEYdkeOLYiLtDgPBJpUBBFvbAtL7ayqvZyd9-7rg9LwbKM37Uh6p95ZmehZu3MEwar5Sq0GauPheyjyKtIphr0ERBiNBdcsK6nF4uvv8sBBSdC0quj7WJjcejaWGSZyKeQq5odQUmyR9XuWeXkifKuEuECGD-MIgUmrSqm6DyIdBHVj0YXfQDsKaYIAbONr7OWRBxmxkrzhKgjpmS53oBQLnCFe-tRPeZKG3Jcje5gEFL_VM628488Qs0SE9kiWlanFafm7rmHUUM2OMmHNOc6yyFMv0qCLS9dExHemgJHf61bcKw2GRJ1CQbjxWgVuDX-9qt6ejJKrve5C1nNnpaToxakPWolbS06HpS3_eM0uyfR4f0tIwJmaJOfQM8AgcL1-lrLxV1KXZL00NuJv7jvgK-0tMk5Lf19uXHIVvVkDGBHeAjCm6ximx6Jm2)**

Sadly, there are folks in Washington, across the aisle, who don't see it that way. They're fine with open borders, allowing violent crime spill into our neighborhoods. They're okay with slapping higher taxes on hard-working folks like you, piling more burdens on your family. That isn't right, and I won't stand for it.

So I'm coming to you with a simple ask, Fellow American. If you've got a few dollars to spare, **[would you consider joining Team Graham to support my campaign?](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=7e14013e66514a57b3d0349c2c067b37&_e=7fPZqirFZQN534qt_dsQDSsp_hHgbUM5ZHsZBmTsf0dzhT3m1fiJeNV8cPI_tbjAquQ5qvnRYr1feyE767JLsaGmcwJTnQHyzJdA5loienTlm8iykvHwC_HPzPt7lhqDUnSe0QZuTsFc2sjEcsulcwN2JZc12JrZnBJ8uwvm7xXhpRM-S-kIvqp4exzz1YHqRg2pUl8XdItLn7j2OmZ_ozxZuNexnAQCzQXjkXPeM_kYAhkLfIfFxnFFqn0wb7fEvWHKq1pdkmNpuUk--3V4MxgmTWKRBTJXUcivQJwdk49-fYaiX7ZymrPU_3pdTvb4kYg_e-mH6c7WjO7xJ5vG5QM44LQtfaF0o6imOIVLPWTXW46nLsjzv7GxEQJRJHrBjAkmqHsfXlQwrezGkJ8PNYY5dhkMAfFG8sAVPNgPqouxNf5KoxnIKd6iaRfXdV8rHkztAr-9EROhtE7-bu3Qgy9maNzAcl2aK-vH9CBmiZ32reFqW2QGre5RWLq-3ILHZqmBXQ6cEfyBTkFkg1PlfAkz4gbLCne8wbcxOWhZ2Tl_ZmYlosYxgQ7ZDMKl1pZ6qcWF4Cu-FZiu7wcOi6Oi3I2BQQPeFjn3XIxVVC5vZnYvGHE4o6H4jme53nOb4_xJHHK2KAPeNaj3l2QKzjD9ksgMsoIQOhB2_MDMuPXZ3lOb4XWc93JR106Q5MJeSgd9)**

| [**JOIN TEAM GRAHAM >>**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=7e14013e66514a57b3d0349c2c067b37&_e=7fPZqirFZQN534qt_dsQDSsp_hHgbUM5ZHsZBmTsf0dzhT3m1fiJeNV8cPI_tbjAquQ5qvnRYr1feyE767JLsaGmcwJTnQHyzJdA5loienTlm8iykvHwC_HPzPt7lhqDUnSe0QZuTsFc2sjEcsulcwN2JZc12JrZnBJ8uwvm7xXhpRM-S-kIvqp4exzz1YHqRg2pUl8XdItLn7j2OmZ_ozxZuNexnAQCzQXjkXPeM_lSXHAvzcRwYQDGWwHsgqHyOdP8yjnbPHGxD_wisz5HXjgSPKePToDer8IbGttSNWeQMZXpbrf1SWVP41YTMYMOH_briyd7B5ypsY85UK1HL27dEO4D0_1m79zvWs2Kana9RreGFelFU2R40Q5YIPZBuWNVzEVvtkgg-I0Wobjt1HKIGIYca0O0cJgBgBGzRpiCTjAb4Lb2lJ0Cqpt_Pb8L85j-NK4gbqh6RqEjHROKRsdwINxZbSQJBjSVgmt78k1b6d6HwONeUrrEs6cmNdm9awnkvegRqQ13LvLc5zC9pZpXAOJELDPSjcrEjygndj0fylj0pKRjYKwGP35TG-h8XvgrgXVNiDo2q5U-mhSi_QEFdYN49sjbgsFD88alz3fHJxy03BQWPtqzVYmuBkTNUrwV_rNvOCyWAGPYTjZ_p47nhCxsQDnOpnzrFz_ZhWOnt8b9JanMJjqrcjwfKNBv)
---

Fellow American, I know we can build a country that keeps our communities safe, rewards hard work, and gives every American a chance to chase their dreams -- just like I did. Thank you for taking a minute to hear my story. I'm grateful for you.

Sincerely,
[](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=7e14013e66514a57b3d0349c2c067b37&_e=7fPZqirFZQN534qt_dsQDSsp_hHgbUM5ZHsZBmTsf0dzhT3m1fiJeNV8cPI_tbjAquQ5qvnRYr1feyE767JLsaGmcwJTnQHyzJdA5loienTlm8iykvHwC_HPzPt7lhqDUnSe0QZuTsFc2sjEcsulcwN2JZc12JrZnBJ8uwvm7xXhpRM-S-kIvqp4exzz1YHqRg2pUl8XdItLn7j2OmZ_ozxZuNexnAQCzQXjkXPeM_lKX2v2aL53pJ3_4K7zt-rxHtZtkSALUNuvMT3kg49uC9e-xd5_IPtoqZIXFeQia5P7zFXgxZ1ke7hcu-zV01aKOdSX6uSGcfDChtEGcvJedopt1rFIo4glI8H-pUl7QzeZWREIkN-yhl3R41PduQ1zSIk1wogFvieIfLKDBoKh_o7_vQWY6dMjKxJBvbRo20q1-stsZQoojvbEpIRipa59lhvKO2rdYiwllVBW6RnjpAvLaGNk8iy71rDIIxhCJx6tCeA3K_Zl80ceiAUoh-qf0N_5Rz2N6Axc5Ix77nv4EgC7ehD59NKXSGcBSHrnrQ05DyX1AQFQwY2aHX8w7XqH5LbY8uMMNCJ9IMyx7FSyygARlKC6A-uw-gTtkGnYNvLxYhCM4GiAvtveIbOcKwKDi4pMXxrHqfAFa1IGy8ytgjdCCMYASepot8A29O-jlAyvqIN9jCU3JLd5QTAjmJDg)

In the United States Senate, South Carolina's Lindsey Graham has earned a reputation as a conservative, a problem-solver, and a leader who gets things done. clean_body: This is my story, but it’s not so different for many Americans. | I want to share something from the heart with you, Fellow American. My story. It isn't one of glitz and glamour -- it's about hard work, loss, and fighting for what's right. I'm reaching out to tell you why I'm in this fight for our future, and why I need you with me. Neither of my parents finished high school. But they were hardworking and determined that their children would surpass their achievements. Most of my growing up happened on the main street of a small textile mill town. My parents had a business establishment -- a combination beer joint, restaurant, liquor store, and pool hall -- known as the Sanitary Cafe right on Main Street in Central, SC. We all lived in the back of the bar where we worked late into the evening, especially my mom, before heading off to bed in the backroom. I had no silver spoon in my mouth but I never felt I was missing out on something because I didn't live in a house like my friends did. I had a great life, and it was a great way to grow up. I was the first in my family to attend college, but then life hit me hard. While I was in school, I lost my mom and dad within two years of each other. And just like that, I stepped up to help raise my 13-year-old sister, Darline, while coming back home on the weekends to help at our family business. Fellow American, I learned some tough lessons early on. After law school, I joined the U.S. Air Force as a Judge Advocate General, serving as a military prosecutor and defense attorney. Even after the people of South Carolina sent me to the United States Senate, I continued my service in the Air Force Reserves. I performed several short deployments in war zones like Afghanistan and Iraq, standing shoulder to shoulder with our brave men and women in uniform. My story isn't all that different from yours or most people across this great country. I didn't have anything handed to me. I worked hard, grew up quickly, and took on big responsibilities. But what shaped me most was listening to the hard -working South Carolinians who'd come by our family business, sharing their hopes and struggles, or hearing the perspectives of my brave colleagues in the military. Whether I agreed with them or not, those conversations built my understanding of what Americans need and deserve. Now, Fellow American, we all know our nation's in a tough spot -- we're divided, but there are some things we should agree on, plain and simple. 🇺🇸 We need a country where you can raise your family without fear, where the streets are safe. 🇺🇸 We need a country where the American Dream isn't just a slogan. It's alive, and every hard -working American has a real shot at it, no matter where they start. Sadly, there are folks in Washington, across the aisle, who don't see it that way. They're fine with open borders, allowing violent crime spill into our neighborhoods. They're okay with slapping higher taxes on hard-working folks like you, piling more burdens on your family. That isn't right, and I won't stand for it. So I'm coming to you with a simple ask, Fellow American. If you've got a few dollars to spare, | Fellow American, I know we can build a country that keeps our communities safe, rewards hard work, and gives every American a chance to chase their dreams -- just like I did. Thank you for taking a minute to hear my story. I'm grateful for you. Sincerely, Lindsey Graham In the United States Senate, South Carolina's Lindsey Graham has earned a reputation as a conservative, a problem-solver, and a leader who gets things done. He is a great friend to our men and women serving in uniform, a respected voice on national security matters, a leading advocate for cutting the out-of-control spending in Washington, and a champion for confirming conservative judges. | - We want to make sure you're a proud member of Team Graham, and we don't want to bother you. We'd hate to see you go, but if you'd like to unsubscribe, please . | Paid for by Graham Majority Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Team Graham Inc, Fund for America's Future, Security Is Strength PAC, and NRSC.

body:
I’m ready to serve again.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112619149/561070660/-341804640?amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.08.02_roy-cooper-split_B1_F1_S1_C1_AC_RS-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMWIyOTYyYi1hZDZmLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5RpaX0CU0knZU2X8UNHicNvWL8sdpyQmtNHN-Qk4ssY=) With great humility and endless hope for the future of America, I have an announcement to make: **I am running for U.S. Senate.** **I’m Roy Cooper.** I had the honor of serving North Carolina as Attorney General and Governor. [**_Now, I am asking for your support to serve our nation as the next Democratic United States Senator from North Carolina. [Upgrade to paid](https://substack..g7XRaqsUke5o8Lv_eD4zeP31_FNKXnnF2oNPDLd8vNo?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=169929578)
As someone who was fired for refusing to manipulate public health data to suit a political narrative, I am deeply disturbed--but not surprised--by the removal of Dr. Erika McEntarfer from her post as Commissioner of the Bureau of Labor Statistics.
Dr. McEntarfer is a highly respected economist and public servant whose only "offense" was doing her job--reporting accurate employment data that happened to reflect poorly on those in power. The decision to fire her is not just an attack on her personally, but on the integrity of our national statistical institutions, and on every civil servant who has committed their life to truth, accuracy, and public accountability.
When data becomes inconvenient, authoritarian leaders reach for the same tools: censorship, retaliation, and intimidation. This is what I lived through in Florida. This is what scientists, economists, and public officials across the country are now experiencing at the federal level. The dismissal of Dr. McEntarfer is a signal--loud and clear--that no number, no fact, no dataset is safe if it conflicts with a campaign slogan.
Americans deserve to know the truth about their economy, their health, and their future. Firing experts who tell that truth doesn't change reality--it just obscures it from the public eye. We cannot afford to normalize the purging of truth-tellers from government service.
I stand in solidarity with Dr. McEntarfer and every public servant who refuses to bend the facts for political gain. The integrity of our democracy depends on people like her.

Mesoscale News is one of Substack's bestselling newsletters, with exclusive investigations, commentary, and breaking news. I provide most of this content for free, but if you can support this work, please upgrade to a paid subscription. | | Aug 2 | | | | | | | | | | | As someone who was fired for refusing to manipulate public health data to suit a political narrative, I am deeply disturbed--but not surprised--by the removal of Dr. Erika McEntarfer from her post as Commissioner of the Bureau of Labor Statistics. Dr. McEntarfer is a highly respected economist and public servant whose only "offense" was doing her job--reporting accurate employment data that happened to reflect poorly on those in power. The decision to fire her is not just an attack on her personally, but on the integrity of our national statistical institutions, and on every civil servant who has committed their life to truth, accuracy, and public accountability. When data becomes inconvenient, authoritarian leaders reach for the same tools: censorship, retaliation, and intimidation. This is what I lived through in Florida. This is what scientists, economists, and public officials across the country are now experiencing at the federal level. The dismissal of Dr. McEntarfer is a signal--loud and clear--that no number, no fact, no dataset is safe if it conflicts with a campaign slogan. Americans deserve to know the truth about their economy, their health, and their future. Firing experts who tell that truth doesn't change reality--it just obscures it from the public eye. We cannot afford to normalize the purging of truth-tellers from government service. I stand in solidarity with Dr. McEntarfer and every public servant who refuses to bend the facts for political gain. The integrity of our democracy depends on people like her. subject: Stephen Colbert - canceled. Free speech under attack?

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-upsl?refcode=080225_1 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-upsl?refcode=080225_1]
CBS just announced it’s canceling The Late Show with Stephen Colbert in May 2026 — just days after Colbert blasted his own parent company for handing Trump a $16 million settlement he called a “big, fat bribe.”
Now CBS claims it’s purely financial. But with ad revenue down and pressure from the right mounting, many are asking:
Was this about budget cuts — or silencing dissent?
Top Democrats are demanding answers. Americans are watching closely. And we want to hear from you:
How concerned are you about the stifling of free speech in America?

name: The Democratic National Committee
subject: Update: DNC Deploys 30,000 Volunteers to Texas
body:
---
**UPDATE: DNC Deploys Grassroots Activists to Contact Voters in Texas to Fight Trump and Abbott’s Gerrymander** We wanted to make sure you saw this, Derek: We’re activating 30,000 volunteers to stand up to Texas Gov. Greg Abbott and Donald Trump — who are trying to skew the results of the upcoming midterms by gerrymandering FIVE new House seats for Republicans. Why are they doing this? Because Republicans are scared. They know Trump is historically unpopular and that voters are fed up with his agenda. They’re scared that they’ll lose their House majority, so they’re using every trick in the book to hold on to it. **We can’t let Republicans get away with this. And we won’t.** We’ve already sent hundreds of thousands of texts to mobilize against Republicans’ scheme to rig the maps, and now, these 30,000 volunteers are contacting persuadable Republican and independent Texas voters to let them know exactly how Greg Abbott and Texas Republicans are attempting to disenfranchise their vote. This work is essential. And you might be surprised to hear this, but the donations that we receive from emails just like this one help fund efforts like these to help us stop Republican gerrymandering in states like Texas. [**If this kind of work matters to you, we hope you’ll chip in $3 to the DNC today. Your donation will help us contact more voters, mobilize more volunteers, and stop clear abuses of power like this.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-august-2025?refcode=em_20250802_4167_fr&amount=3&refcode2=4167_22930333_vqv-iy&akid=4167%2E22930333%2Evqv-iy) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._ | | | **[Donate $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-august-2025?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em_20250802_4167_fr&refcode2=4167_22930333_vqv-iy&akid=4167%2E22930333%2Evqv-iy)**

name: Wes Moore
subject: Service
body:
[ https://act.wesmoore.com/go/9?t=1001&akid=402%2E1086043%2E3eshHo ]Wes Moore for Governor[ https://act.wesmoore.com/go/9?t=1002&akid=402%2E1086043%2E3eshHo ]Wes Moore for Governor

Hi Peter, it’s Wes.

I’ve always believed that service is how we build stronger communities —
and stronger people.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250802-1?refcode=em-20250802-1&refcode2=402_1086043_3eshHo&akid=402%2E1086043%2E3eshHo ]Wes, building a state that serves

Growing up, I struggled to find purpose. That changed when I went to
military school, then joined the Army. When I put on the uniform and
served my country, I found it.

That’s why I launched the Maryland Service Year Option — the first
statewide program in the country to give high school graduates a year of
paid, full-time community service and a path to college or a career.

It’s a simple idea with a big impact. And we need your help to keep making
more innovative ideas like it a reality.

We have big plans for August, and your support is critical to continuing

clean_body: [ ]Wes Moore for Governor[ ]Wes Moore for Governor Hi Peter, it’s Wes. I’ve always believed that service is how we build stronger communities — and stronger people. [ ]Wes, building a state that serves Growing up, I struggled to find purpose. That changed when I went to military school, then joined the Army. When I put on the uniform and served my country, I found it. That’s why I launched the Maryland Service Year Option — the first statewide program in the country to give high school graduates a year of paid, full-time community service and a path to college or a career. It’s a simple idea with a big impact. And we need your help to keep making more innovative ideas like it a reality. Friend, Donald Trump’s Department of Justice is demanding states turn over election data – including entire voter rolls. | ****
**Trump’s DOJ wants states to turn over voter lists, election info**
---
So far, nearly a dozen states – including most battleground states – have received sweeping requests for sensitive election materials.
States like Colorado, Arizona, Pennsylvania, Wisconsin, Nevada, Maine, and New Hampshire have received these requests.
**Let’s call this what it is, friend: a federal takeover of elections, grounded in conspiracy theories and designed to intimidate election officials.**
This isn’t about “election integrity.” It’s about Donald Trump laying the groundwork to discredit the 2026 and 2028 elections – just like he did in 2020.
Even Republican election officials are pushing back, refusing to cooperate and warning that these demands are dangerous and unprecedented.
At DASS, we’re preparing to fight back – but we need your help today.
[**Our DASS Legal Fund is working to defend states, protect voter privacy, and stop Trump’s DOJ in its tracks. But legal action is expensive, and the window to act is narrowing. The history of the Roman Republic is a captivating tale of achievement, political and military genius, and the perils of success. One that still impacts our world today.

To help tell this important story to Americans nationwide, we released our free online course, **" The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic."**

**You can now receive your own DVD box set of "The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic" when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**

And, for a limited time, we'll also send you a **free color map** of the Roman world at the end of the Republic. This map is a helpful companion to the course DVD and will illustrate many of the topics discussed in the lectures.
Simply use this secure link to reserve your DVD box set of **" The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic," **along with the companion map today:

[**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/roman-republic-dvd**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=17ddfc1e2f52446b979d41631b68f5b7&_e=H4vaEU3RhVqYfwOz1_4_Pxt3tVkW2Tvm0D0qvBkErlk6yGSWkrhd7rYPMJ1rmFl8iLecUGQSnvmgpsVTLFoDT4jslCxxQykBzjskQt_VSdGTdJ9CeUmbSfK1PxxxhN8VMJu4xk9PJLubjJBY8UTEcBhpBsGzEJGxCOCaigCIWFIsHWDUQvOlg7OiNu6IAH7m5LJsljCTe4z_tQq7NpzGWOVgKJ0WN4m3bAmx_J_6K-23845VUH5OHgWuYt1t3qrm6OPjEPRYNKXXoUmMjF3kF684Ym6NkGvGdh8yTgEoHpZk2VQhAgL_uJsagEYI2EAqvuGLhRZX5H1mNMHyXH6oG95IEApQFi2E7VpOXFeJj5VcsewJzMwA5QMh5Ujj1FKyv1-rxLhB6wzO_MrPMwvn6ciW3xPmWjfX8kTwC2E6Mm-yQIfhyZWxwMSPnnjSyTpfKG8doBXXza_eN2FF49iEPHEOIBkxnCSPp4dDt8MybdVXTGa87ddfspOR56iqf22dHdu9euHsG5lN6jL_-L9TgSu_JDPgBqaeKhI5J6r7GPKxZdG6d9UcWudI6-bHYkSQbvzZij5tCjDwz5kvNKZsIXqkK6WZwgwHivvvX8cx1l0Em0i9JGbnh5kXm3TkX1q0eg015D9VgCF7H1auAqO0r5r6A9dXzm4skJ9vpGY93XnYWF-fw_KYB3XcEXtEPTQI0DT6QM3WPFzZRYpOrteA4y6zQMzf163P1CklPGzFpME%3D)

By studying ancient Rome, you'll discover the conditions necessary to preserve a republic, and, conversely, how a republic may lose its way.

That's why we produced **" The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic"** and why I hope you'll watch and share the course on DVD.

Thank you for helping to preserve liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College!

Best regards,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.
Executive Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

[_**The path to taking back the House runs straight through the Lehigh Valley. Chip in to help us flip PA-07 blue and take back the House →**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112622109/561080146/1877634325?refcode=BLU_EM_CODC_2025-08-02_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTc2MjgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMWJmNTA2NzctYjI2Zi1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=cUa6nP6spxVkRMUwAy8yBG3TJU85DTNsoXDL-EbjUEY=) This is one of the most competitive seats in the country, and we have a real shot to flip it blue – **but only if we build the campaign we need right now.**

Carol is running because working families deserve a voice in Congress – someone who knows what it’s like to work multiple jobs, who’s raised kids here, and who’s rolled up their sleeves to solve real problems in this community. She’s not a career politician – she’s someone who’s spent decades delivering for the Lehigh Valley.

But Ryan Mackenzie and his MAGA allies are already gearing up to pour millions of dollars into this race again. **If we’re going to flip this seat and take back the House, we need to hit our early fundraising goals and show this campaign has the grassroots strength to win.**

name: Ilhan Omar
subject: What do you think: Should Congress be BANNED from trading stocks?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=1745%2E791427%2EfxcT1v)

[](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/em-aug25-stock-trading/?source=em250802-1-90&akid=1745%2E791427%2EfxcT1v)
Friend — I want to know what you think.
It’s a simple question: Should there be a ban on stock trading for members of Congress? Vote here:
**[YES](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/em-aug25-stock-trading/?source=em250802-1-90&akid=1745%2E791427%2EfxcT1v)**
**[NO](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/em-aug25-stock-trading/?source=em250802-1-90&akid=1745%2E791427%2EfxcT1v)**
**[I'M NOT SURE](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/em-aug25-stock-trading/?source=em250802-1-90&akid=1745%2E791427%2EfxcT1v)**
Congress deals with the most pressing issues of our nation, and that includes issues facing the economy and the financial sector. We make policy decisions that can shift markets and change the economic situation of this country.
With that much power, I think it’s completely unfair that members of Congress can then turn around and get rich by investing in stocks with insider information.
Especially now, as billionaire oligarchs are making policy decisions and working to make their allies in Congress richer.
So I want to show that a vast majority of Americans agree that it’s time to ban stock trading in Congress.
**[Tell me what you think! Head to my poll and make your voice heard.](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/em-aug25-stock-trading/?source=em250802-1-90&akid=1745%2E791427%2EfxcT1v)**
**[MAKE YOUR VOTE](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/em-aug25-stock-trading/?source=em250802-1-90&akid=1745%2E791427%2EfxcT1v)**
In solidarity,
Ilhan Omar

PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS

Submit this form to [**update your contact information**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/update-contact-info/source=em-footer?t=4&akid=1745%2E791427%2EfxcT1v)

name: Sarah McBride
subject: I just wanted to say thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McBride for Delaware
body:
In a time when it’s easy to feel cynical or overwhelmed by politics, you chose hope.
#
I just wanted to say thank you.
**We just finished crunching the final numbers, and I’m proud to share that because of this grassroots team, we ended July on a strong note!** We’re building a big coalition, and I’m so grateful to the thousands of people from Delaware and across the country who pitched in to help us reach our goal.
In a time when it’s easy to feel cynical or overwhelmed by politics, you chose hope. And together, we’re continuing to show what’s possible when everyday people like you and me believe in something bigger than ourselves.
This work isn’t easy, but it’s worth it. And with you by my side, we’ll keep fighting for working families and to build a future that reflects our values.
Gratefully,
Sarah

name: VoteVets.org
subject: What your support really does here at VoteVets
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
We don’t stash your donation away in a rainy day fund. We put that donation to work.
#
Hey Peter, VoteVets here.
Could you let us explain how important your support is to this organization? It’ll only take a minute.
Truth is, there would be no VoteVets without you.
There would be no organization on the left working to split the Veteran and Military vote off from the GOP. There would be far less Veterans and National Security professionals working on our behalf — and not just in Congress. It would mean less of them in state legislatures, city halls, and school boards as well.
Republicans spent decades funnelling local and state level candidates from lower offices up to Congress and beyond. It’s a big part of their edge today. And, despite good efforts on our side, Democrats continue to struggle in that regard.
But VoteVets does that work every year, whether there’s an election or not. Look no further than people like Elissa Slotkin, or Ruben Gallego, or Andy Kim. Each of them had support from VoteVets at the start of their careers, and at lower offices than they currently hold. That support continues to this day.
If it wasn’t for supporters like you, we might not have people like Abigail Spanberger running for governor in Virginia, or the Hellcats running for Congress. No Mark Kelly, Ruben Gallego, or Elissa Slotkin.
We don’t stash your donation away in a rainy day fund. We put that donation to work. And we can promise you that if you chip in today, we’ll funnel that donation towards that same kind of high impact work.
So, how about it:
[**Can you please make a $5 donation to VoteVets and help us continue fighting to elect principled, distinguished leaders to office all over the country?**](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-august25.hEpWPc&refcode=em250802-1-120&t=1&akid=34498%2E3013755%2EwAMjld)

It’ll only take a minute. Truth is, there would be no VoteVets without you. There would be no organization on the left working to split the Veteran and Military vote off from the GOP. There would be far less Veterans and National Security professionals working on our behalf — and not just in Congress. It would mean less of them in state legislatures, city halls, and school boards as well. Republicans spent decades funnelling local and state level candidates from lower offices up to Congress and beyond. It’s a big part of their edge today. And, despite good efforts on our side, Democrats continue to struggle in that regard. But VoteVets does that work every year, whether there’s an election or not. Look no further than people like Elissa Slotkin, or Ruben Gallego, or Andy Kim. Each of them had support from VoteVets at the start of their careers, and at lower offices than they currently hold. That support continues to this day. If it wasn’t for supporters like you, we might not have people like Abigail Spanberger running for governor in Virginia, or the Hellcats running for Congress. No Mark Kelly, Ruben Gallego, or Elissa Slotkin. We don’t stash your donation away in a rainy day fund. We put that donation to work. And we can promise you that if you chip in today, we’ll funnel that donation towards that same kind of high impact work. So, how about it: If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly: | | ** | | | | | | | ** It’d really mean a lot. Thank you, The team at VoteVets PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS.ORG, NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE’S COMMITTEE Use of military rank, job titles or photographs in uniform does not imply the endorsement of the Department of Defense, Departments of the Army, Navy, Air Force, or the Marines or Space Force.

name: Wesley Bell
subject: "Evil triumphs when good people do nothing."
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BELL FOR MISSOURI
body:
Peter, thanks to you, we've not only reached our end-of-month fundraising goal for July, _but we've also beaten the dreaded "summer slump."_

As we look ahead to this new month, I can't help but to reflect on all of the support this grassroots team has shown this campaign.

While campaigns usually see a drop in fundraising, this team defied the odds and, instead, showed up when it mattered most to ensure that we didn't miss a beat on the critical fundraising goal we set.

Peter, I know that during non-election years like this one, it can be tough to stay laser-focused on the bigger picture, and easy to become complacent. But right now, our nation is at a crossroads, which means we simply can't afford to take our foot off of the gas for even a minute.

Extreme Republicans are making a mockery of our democracy and playing political games just to appease Trump, and make his Project 2025 plans a reality. But like the saying goes: _"Evil triumphs when good people do nothing"_ — **which is why I'm so grateful to have such a strong network of good, honest people supporting both me and this campaign.**

Thanks for all that you do,

Wesley | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112623246/561083466/554393595?refcode=em25_250802_eomty_fndd_gq_act___WB_ettx&utm_campaign=em25_250802_eomty_fndd_gq_act___WB_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=7cc4a189-b56f-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYzODkiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiN2NjNGExODktYjU2Zi1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=33ODOLlBVjOPg5bLOvyKSYbAd_rcnw5npK8NvuMw2jI=)

name: Eric Sorensen
subject: Together, steering us where our country belongs
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112623513/561084018/896231865?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MzMxNzIzYy1iNjZmLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_9Z9ftlccXRqm9XeIamBp-E2Mc093svUdbbHNu4lwb4=)
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112623514/561084019/896231865?refcode=em-8.2.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MzMxNzIzYy1iNjZmLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_9Z9ftlccXRqm9XeIamBp-E2Mc093svUdbbHNu4lwb4=) Hi Peter, I wanted to give a heartfelt **thank you** to everyone who donated to our campaign ahead of our fundraising deadline. With your support, we exceeded our goal for the month of July! Of course our work doesn't stop now. We have to keep serving North and Western Illinois. With every enraging update from Washington, and every betrayal by Republicans of our working folks, the importance of retaking the majority has never been more clear. With that in mind, I can't thank you enough for your ongoing support. You are making this work possible, and together we can steer our country forward towards the vision we believe in. I’ve got some big updates coming on a few of the things I’m working on in Congress to help everyday Illinoisans in this moment, but for now I hope you have a restful remainder of the weekend, and a lovely start to August. Thank you again, Peter. With every enraging update from Washington, and every betrayal by Republicans of our working folks, the importance of retaking the majority has never been more clear. With that in mind, I can't thank you enough for your ongoing support. You are making this work possible, and together we can steer our country forward towards the vision we believe in. I’ve got some big updates coming on a few of the things I’m working on in Congress to help everyday Illinoisans in this moment, but for now I hope you have a restful remainder of the weekend, and a lovely start to August. Thank you again, Peter. We’re building towards the change we want to see – together. -Eric | = | Eric Sorensen is a meteorologist born and raised in Rockford, IL representing IL-17 in Congress. name: Ted Cruz
subject: Obama’s government lied to America
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ted Cruz for Senate
body:
\- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -

| | | [](http://trk.tedcruz._dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1FLUhvdXNlRmlsZSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249Q3J1el9MYXVyYS1JbmdyYWhhbV8yMDI1MDczMSZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPUVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUxhdXJhLUluZ3JhaGFtJnV0bV9hZ2VuY3k9UEcmYW1vdW50PTc1In0/D6foNFoETS8_2uCn8YaqUw)
---
| | Fellow Conservative, Let me be as clear as day. **_Obama 's government lied to the American people._** I went on Laura Ingraham's show to shed light on what Director of National Intelligence Tulsi Gabbard uncovered. _FDR famously said December 7th is a date that will live in infamy. Well, December 9 should be a day that will live in infamy, because this is a moment when senior members of our government decided to lie to the American people and to sabotage President Donald Trump, who had just been elected by the American people._
---
[](http://trk.tedcruz._dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1FLUhvdXNlRmlsZSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249Q3J1el9MYXVyYS1JbmdyYWhhbV8yMDI1MDczMSZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPUVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUxhdXJhLUluZ3JhaGFtJnV0bV9hZ2VuY3k9UEcmYW1vdW50PTc1In0/IhcY7F0aW0GsML9jWGI_7w)
---
How many times did the Democrats say Russia was subverting our elections? **But it turns out the people subverting our elections were right here at home - entrenched within our own federal government.** Why? _Because the American People chose to defy the status quo and put a political outsider in the White House - and the Washington ruling class revolted._ _But now I 'm going to tell you this part in confidence_. _In light of everything, I am worried about the midterm elections._ _Given how far Democrats will go to win at any cost, we need to be certain that we check every box and leave absolutely no stone unturned._ We have to run every race like we're 3 points behind. We can't get too excited every time a positive poll comes out, because the ONLY number that matters is the vote tally on election night. Yes, the Democrats' approval rating is historically low. But their voters are turning out at higher rates than ours. That has to change. _And even as Obama has been CRIMINALLY REFERRED to the Department of Justice, he is still out there raising money for the VERY FIRST battleground of the midterms coming up in just a couple months_! In fact, he just raised $2.5 MILLION in a single night. He's not backing down... **_Neither. Can. We._** **[So, I have to ask, will you make a contribution of any amount- any amount you can - to help us fight back against the Obama Machine as they go all in to try and BUY our Majorities out from under us?](http://trk.tedcruz._dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1FLUhvdXNlRmlsZSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249Q3J1el9MYXVyYS1JbmdyYWhhbV8yMDI1MDczMSZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPUVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUxhdXJhLUluZ3JhaGFtJnV0bV9hZ2VuY3k9UEcmYW1vdW50PTc1In0/Cu9H13b1YYBk4rNuwlJtCQ)**
---
[ **DONATE** ](http://trk.tedcruz._dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1FLUhvdXNlRmlsZSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249Q3J1el9MYXVyYS1JbmdyYWhhbV8yMDI1MDczMSZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPUVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUxhdXJhLUluZ3JhaGFtJnV0bV9hZ2VuY3k9UEcmYW1vdW50PTc1In0/16mEPd9DRkx_klA5X9zTpA)
---
In Liberty, Ted Cruz
---
[ ](http://trk.tedcruz._dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1FLUhvdXNlRmlsZSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249Q3J1el9MYXVyYS1JbmdyYWhhbV8yMDI1MDczMSZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPUVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUxhdXJhLUluZ3JhaGFtJnV0bV9hZ2VuY3k9UEcmYW1vdW50PTc1In0/eybHwsU25CuJ49DjoFFzUA)

name: Don Scott (via DLCC.org)
subject: This November, every single seat is up.
disclaimer_text: paid for by DLCC Victory Fund, 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005
body:
As Speaker of the Virginia House, I’m leading the charge against harmful, GOP-backed legislation. This fall’s elections will set the tone for 2026, which is why I’m reaching out today. | | |
---
| |
---|---
As Speaker of the Virginia House, I’m leading the charge against harmful, GOP-backed legislation. I’ve spent my life serving others, first in the Navy and now as a leader in the fight for the future of Virginia. In both roles, I’ve stood watch against those who threaten our core values, and as Speaker of the Virginia House, I am standing firm and keeping watch over our very _democracy_. It might be an “off-year,” but this November, the entirety of the Virginia House – including my seat – and our governor’s office are all on the ballot. [I wouldn’t be asking if it weren’t critically important: Will you make your first contribution to help the DLCC elect Democrats to state legislatures like mine all over the country? ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqu05XtZnrBMT5R_mtAuAjxDeUFlx0nSsedpxN7Wr7zCdvoM8FneD0-USS4g4GY6ZKN1PCgkRqQjDqmXQqxUTCiGcbvVNhaW6LriVcXQrz0Q1POtEx29BtmQk-yDJt5OMEsJyabydBIZ9_5M0KrfrG82FOA5xqJGAQACJYAqps4S40DBaYqz1jyXIbcoD1r4LyYjghdaQFMWYe-E_Y48Z9ZqbkY7_Z7l1oKhs_hm4iToHF0bc0L3mlliU8tea-STAZRm72GlCscBu0D_OgZq5CN11sRBj2ATbz9P9L3HRg4zGJGi9GWsqqfMqTJZQjcunCdLN1805Uh6CKUicc9xmr-avuKNYUvDkVuOAig61YYSTQV8m-FIYQm5DModBsPt4IdqSFNHUX36cj7sB_CADtwuhxvw3YiU-mgxymfz4n5o6g/4ip/cMeKola1Q4CQvasefslkkw/h0/h001.LI9e7sKXWNlNl78vvHbJXPnlvvwKSwbb5pOincrT0gg) I was elected as the first Black speaker in the 400-year history of the Virginia Legislature thanks to the power of voters like you who helped Democrats secure our majority by _just a single seat_ , with several races coming down to _just a few hundred votes_. **This year, my colleagues and I used our majority to pass _three_ constitutional amendments to enshrine abortion rights, secure marriage equality, and restore voting rights for people who have finished serving time in jail.** While Trump’s MAGA allies attack public education, weaken safety-net programs, and strip access to health care for folks on Medicaid who need it most, **it’s our majority in the House that gives Democrats the power to protect Virginians against the Republican agenda.** I know you aren’t a Virginian, but this work matters because it’s not just about my great commonwealth, it’s about our country's direction. This fall’s elections will set the tone for 2026. Winning will send a message to extremist Republicans and put Democrats back on offense. Republicans are pouring millions into flipping the House and securing the governorship, so if you care about our freedoms, economy, and democracy, I’m calling on you to get involved today. [Please make a $7 donation to the DLCC so that we can continue our fight for a better tomorrow in states like Virginia all over the country. ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqu05XtZnrBMT5R_mtAuAjxDeUFlx0nSsedpxN7Wr7zCdvoM8FneD0-USS4g4GY6ZKN1PCgkRqQjDqmXQqxUTCiGcbvVNhaW6LriVcXQrz0Q1POtEx29BtmQk-yDJt5OMEsJyabydBIZ9_5M0KrfrG82FOA5xqJGAQACJYAqps4S40DBaYqz1jyXIbcoD1r4Lya_eFXCS5XAgtmSmpXbqui3S3KZYPHmjdKtI6c__VVwCX1CDUCrRPtAHZrmzwyjJ_M8o6J5T6_4rbpG346swWWWUvMACkLjID2LGz_sVs-1nbPfUsZxGkxRZJDL5uIZTL9LmdLTuFyw2QqZDyBvIlzfDU3zhz8CGpFsg2_gnyuhq5YdSczPNJ-nGSJtPtMm4yKKeMDpYZxHfegvbEyql94UJuIxIEzKNV2bIZ61GrKpBA/4ip/cMeKola1Q4CQvasefslkkw/h1/h001.XE0-sJutxgAKkwarQzshaQGi7v5qp3kX1msiwfgvP20) Virginians deserve better than the chaos of the MAGA agenda. It’ll be an uphill battle, but we don’t run from adversity - we overcome it. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately.

clean_body: As Speaker of the Virginia House, I’m leading the charge against harmful, GOP-backed legislation. This fall’s elections will set the tone for 2026, which is why I’m reaching out today. | | | | | ---|--- As Speaker of the Virginia House, I’m leading the charge against harmful, GOP-backed legislation. I’ve spent my life serving others, first in the Navy and now as a leader in the fight for the future of Virginia. In both roles, I’ve stood watch against those who threaten our core values, and as Speaker of the Virginia House, I am standing firm and keeping watch over our very democracy. It might be an “off-year,” but this November, the entirety of the Virginia House – including my seat – and our governor’s office are all on the ballot. I was elected as the first Black speaker in the 400-year history of the Virginia Legislature thanks to the power of voters like you who helped Democrats secure our majority by just a single seat , with several races coming down to just a few hundred votes. This year, my colleagues and I used our majority to pass three constitutional amendments to enshrine abortion rights, secure marriage equality, and restore voting rights for people who have finished serving time in jail. While Trump’s MAGA allies attack public education, weaken safety-net programs, and strip access to health care for folks on Medicaid who need it most, it’s our majority in the House that gives Democrats the power to protect Virginians against the Republican agenda. I know you aren’t a Virginian, but this work matters because it’s not just about my great commonwealth, it’s about our country's direction. This fall’s elections will set the tone for 2026. Winning will send a message to extremist Republicans and put Democrats back on offense. Republicans are pouring millions into flipping the House and securing the governorship, so if you care about our freedoms, economy, and democracy, I’m calling on you to get involved today. Virginians deserve better than the chaos of the MAGA agenda. It’ll be an uphill battle, but we don’t run from adversity - we overcome it. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | | Let's get to work. Don Scott Speaker Virginia House of Delegates | Prepared and paid for by DLCC Victory Fund, 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005. Not authorized by any candidate. name: Rebecca Cooke
subject: Thank you - from the bottom of my heart
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112623914/561085081/1706257898?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUwMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OGViOTRhNi1iNzZmLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AC9fprUNu_DR8kSq9wnLHiMvU2aQsHBTAWN5exPfN7Y=&emci=9b3ff55c-cc6e-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=58eb94a6-b76f-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=5944223)
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112623915/561085082/-2083379535?refcode=em-8.2.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUwMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OGViOTRhNi1iNzZmLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AC9fprUNu_DR8kSq9wnLHiMvU2aQsHBTAWN5exPfN7Y=) Peter, I wanted to personally thank you for helping us hit our monthly fundraising goal in July. **I’m ready to keep our working-class movement growing and finish what we started.** This time we’re in an even better position to win the seat outright, but only if our grassroots fundraising stays strong throughout the campaign. That means hitting every monthly goal, like the one we just completed, is critical. We’ve got a long way to go in this cycle, but at a time when retaking the majority and delivering for working folks has never been more important, the fact that I have you alongside me gives me the confidence that we’re going to deliver the overhaul in Congress that folks in Western Wisconsin – and across the country – so desperately need. From the bottom of my heart, thank you for your continued support. Rebecca | | **[Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112623916/561085083/-2083379535?refcode=em-8.2.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUwMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OGViOTRhNi1iNzZmLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AC9fprUNu_DR8kSq9wnLHiMvU2aQsHBTAWN5exPfN7Y=)**

clean_body: | = Peter, I wanted to personally thank you for helping us hit our monthly fundraising goal in July. I’m ready to keep our working-class movement growing and finish what we started. This time we’re in an even better position to win the seat outright, but only if our grassroots fundraising stays strong throughout the campaign. That means hitting every monthly goal, like the one we just completed, is critical. We’ve got a long way to go in this cycle, but at a time when retaking the majority and delivering for working folks has never been more important, the fact that I have you alongside me gives me the confidence that we’re going to deliver the overhaul in Congress that folks in Western Wisconsin – and across the country – so desperately need. From the bottom of my heart, thank you for your continued support. Rebecca | | = | = = Rebecca Cooke is a small business and nonprofit leader who has focused her career on building community and serving others. We’re still working through some of the numbers, but one thing is for certain: Over the last week, we’ve seen an amazing surge of grassroots support

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112623954/561085151/-240735101?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNzE0NzhjOS1iNzZmLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WQYpYWS6AYvEcft62scgR1evZz278RB9zkyEPevfMBE=) What a way to close out July. I need to say thank you. We’re still working through some of the numbers, but one thing is for certain: Over the last week, we’ve seen an amazing surge of grassroots support from folks all across Kansas. Folks who are inspired by our message of optimism and hope. Folks who couldn’t be more fed up with Donald Trump’s chaos and corruption. **I am so, so grateful for the continued support of this grassroots team — and the truth is, we’re going to need every bit of it to hold on to this seat.** You don’t need me to tell you just how consequential this election will be. It’s so important — and to be completely frank, uncertain — even just thinking about it is stressful. But there are some things that are within our control. Namely, I’m going to work as hard as I possibly can between now and Election Day 2026 to get our message out across KS-03. And I’m going to make sure that we drown out the right-wing smears, and spread the truth about who I am and what I stand for. The road ahead won’t be easy. Extremist politicians are going to attack our team at every turn, all while Donald Trump intentionally sows chaos and suffering across Kansas. **But because we have one of the biggest, strongest, most powerful grassroots coalitions in the country, I know we can win this fight.** For now, thank you for your continued support of our team. Missing even a single fundraising benchmark could jeopardize our mission to PROTECT the President’s House majority and SAVE New York.

name: Stasha Rhodes, United for Democracy
subject: We have the scoop on Trump’s picks for the next SCOTUS seat
disclaimer_text: Paid for by United for Democracy
body:
The White House is prepping for Trump’s next Supreme Court nominee. | |
---
Peter, In his first term, Trump successfully appointed three young justices to the Supreme Court in order to influence the judiciary for decades to come. Now, he’ll likely have the opportunity to install another. **We don’t know when Justices Thomas or Alito plan to step down—but they’ll be facing pressure from their MAGA allies to do so before the midterm elections have a chance to cost Republicans their Senate majority.** According to an exclusive from TIME Magazine, the White House is reportedly preparing for their replacement. [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.SEgofQhSb9pGg8bz5XQG3VciwvHVXlv9IK4dfTpqRf59LSH2DhVdk8L1s6rQIg3NcOYHLAdrIzuqA_GqChvbqp5y4aJP6YDE32a2q_UzXUGvvf-ytpz_Ww06NGxKGZTf0LGztbksDHhiDoBJAqkrZ99nu-o8tzi24NlxARDGulWEddt1gpKFCz6xQoNyJGmlqardEdH52IXLEJwBBYiZ8NzhkBmt1div-Udk4zaDfA3cWGWuw1GB3OOyolU-kndKkPtQXzSYsZMS3c_-BIbuofWKvEKeWyDUIQlFVC3ga1usO1fcaZ_O2Xniy1Vb1uLpP5efTwC-BZZOJKsuo1QntcqC9eZug5abIogw9_soAW6PaqLLS2e4T7fUPuOFBkdNwiuETta-zZ-e042_Gtn3TQ/4ip/W4svyn-7RRiEfylbyoHQ2A/h0/h001.Rkri5qCnI2U0YaoE6kcblYRgEMOEbAngxs-7zSzyurg) **The names on Trump’s shortlist for the Supreme Court are alarming. Both are Federalist Society-aligned judges with a history of attacking our basic rights. If nominated and confirmed, they could make Gorsuch, Kavanaugh, and Barrett seem moderate by comparison!** One of the judges on the shortlist is **Andrew Oldham** , who defended discriminatory state ID laws in Texas and sued the EPA for attempting to curb climate change, calling the agency “illegitimate.” The other is **Neomi Rao** , who dissented in a case that allowed an undocumented minor to seek an abortion, questioned _Roe v. Wade_ , blamed women for date rape, and led efforts to rollback environmental protections. **The Republican Senate just confirmed one of the most shocking nominees of all time—Trump’s personal lawyer and DOJ hatchet man—to a lifetime appointment on a federal judgeship. They’re no doubt chomping at the bit to install another loyalist on the Supreme Court before it’s too late.** The Senate confirmed Bove in spite of the over 10,000 letters we drove opposing his nomination. That means we need to be even louder and hard to ignore when the next Supreme Court nomination comes around. United for Democracy isn’t waiting for this fight to come to us. If the Trump administration is gearing up right now, we need to too. **Over the coming weeks and months, we’re mobilizing activists and allies across the country with the truth about Trump’s dangerous shortlist—and the harm the MAGA Supreme Court has already done to our democracy.** We can’t allow Trump, congressional Republicans, and the MAGA Supreme Court to strip our democracy for parts little by little. They don’t own us, our rights, or our Constitution. We do. [**We don’t have much time to stop a new Supreme Court nominee before the midterm elections potentially rip away MAGA’s congressional power. This fight is going to take as many resources as we can get, and as much fight as we can muster. Chip in today to help us keep Trump’s shortlist away from the Supreme Court bench.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquygXPxROILYG7GVQJwBPvmf5Q-rUzeQO45ZxOykuT7w1DK_rdm_21bzSsMV4aHF8EdDEhLYpLicSySJxGa2YNt28XAdiVx4kGkItacB9tVx7PlTVO8tBuIIK5r2cqX0cfoa_fjHw-U8_RG6nJjqsV6yrOvl3no8BmY_swKhdQHqJn8Xbavakak2yOv2f0wcgEwUV45OaFSN07wMQ_es3iBsTEwP3RoNuNLFauQh0cDrPzz-avTvajdKe18oG0DOjb1byKE2_a7jzdO-y1OT9h8VB-N8h-Bp6KGantdVByi8fbuIc49yLu-7rWG6-vZJQic6KLGuYZ-cgPUHy_pTN96819CosoIc_8SnnAHTUpfp1_zgURZ6ONUr5fRDQgCOC4/4ip/W4svyn-7RRiEfylbyoHQ2A/h1/h001.dJbNNo6FCZkmgSYwrcxfhlJceYWusWYbLvJfFHtbQPA) Thank you for fighting for democracy, Stasha Rhodes

clean_body: The White House is prepping for Trump’s next Supreme Court nominee. | | Peter, In his first term, Trump successfully appointed three young justices to the Supreme Court in order to influence the judiciary for decades to come. Now, he’ll likely have the opportunity to install another. We don’t know when Justices Thomas or Alito plan to step down—but they’ll be facing pressure from their MAGA allies to do so before the midterm elections have a chance to cost Republicans their Senate majority. According to an exclusive from TIME Magazine, the White House is reportedly preparing for their replacement. The names on Trump’s shortlist for the Supreme Court are alarming. Both are Federalist Society-aligned judges with a history of attacking our basic rights. If nominated and confirmed, they could make Gorsuch, Kavanaugh, and Barrett seem moderate by comparison! One of the judges on the shortlist is Andrew Oldham , who defended discriminatory state ID laws in Texas and sued the EPA for attempting to curb climate change, calling the agency “illegitimate.” The other is Neomi Rao , who dissented in a case that allowed an undocumented minor to seek an abortion, questioned Roe v. Wade , blamed women for date rape, and led efforts to rollback environmental protections. The Republican Senate just confirmed one of the most shocking nominees of all time—Trump’s personal lawyer and DOJ hatchet man—to a lifetime appointment on a federal judgeship. They’re no doubt chomping at the bit to install another loyalist on the Supreme Court before it’s too late. The Senate confirmed Bove in spite of the over 10,000 letters we drove opposing his nomination. That means we need to be even louder and hard to ignore when the next Supreme Court nomination comes around. United for Democracy isn’t waiting for this fight to come to us. If the Trump administration is gearing up right now, we need to too. Over the coming weeks and months, we’re mobilizing activists and allies across the country with the truth about Trump’s dangerous shortlist—and the harm the MAGA Supreme Court has already done to our democracy. We can’t allow Trump, congressional Republicans, and the MAGA Supreme Court to strip our democracy for parts little by little. They don’t own us, our rights, or our Constitution. We do. Thank you for fighting for democracy, Stasha Rhodes United for Democracy Paid for by United for Democracy. | | Sent via . But many of our colleagues have normalized anti-Muslim hate, calling us terrorists and endangering our lives just because of our faith. [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqsXu0R1XDWRVJnEMC9_ePsJ41CA8XCwZI4MCkI-GaoNp9QPmQWmYK7sRksc3uSwxt9lv-TyAwRRxHyaXXxhzxnNpvqGIo_4u6BT1TRmkltbLxVRdNlVNsolx4NJ-XRs1s2zVI6C6DW6uySKV0w0Y4vp-flsrAUiUzfgKR6SwuNmh731f154_aaIrxOFNaaRjUdIgm3ELsyYrNtL38FvMVN3fKwCNWqMdJZegsE2JNrP9s2qWZSuC2TBRWs8bn5tKExROLdkTzeyRF6YiaYsKYxypDqGvdKVRLU58P1hjOmpugKwd0gXxuSga4VJ1d2zfixp6wZgFSgsHFMmiB-HSGH2y33qVWvoCHkblW8qPkGyIipWfcVcHsquUbANRblPn3Q/4ip/Xy8YIjxNRbKsAuko5qHItw/h1/h001.B2yP6HZPTOsgL5oC-NbrQrWRJTbPkZSeCvw2hlFrLgM) _(from left to right, photo shows André Carson, Ilhan Omar, Lateefah Simon, and me)_ Together we’re demanding an end to the growing dehumanization and violence against vulnerable communities, including immigrants, Muslim Americans, and Palestinians. **We’re pushing our colleagues to listen to the majority of Americans and stop enabling this genocide of the Palestinian people.** Unlike most of our colleagues in Congress, we don’t take money from AIPAC. Last month, Zohran Mamdani won the Democratic primary for New York City mayor, with more votes than any prior NYC mayoral primary election. His positions align with our voting base, including fighting for human rights and for everyone to have what they need to thrive.
But our colleagues on both sides of the aisle attacked him. Ilhan, Lateefah, André, and I released a shared statement to call out the vile, anti-Muslim, and racist smears against him.
At least 50% of Muslim Americans have experienced religious discrimination, which André Carson recognized in his congressional resolution to honor Muslim Americans.
**As Muslim Americans in public office, we get death threats daily—but that will never silence us.**
**We’re standing with the American people, the majority of whom now want us to end the genocide in Gaza. Seven out of ten democrats want an arms embargo. The majority of Americans have an unfavorable view of the government of Israel, including many Jewish neighbors. Congress can't keep ignoring the fact that our country is done funding a genocide. It is harder now than ever to ignore it.**
Lateefah, André, Ilhan, and I are listening and demanding an end to U.S. complicity in Israel’s war crimes. We all support policies to block weapons to Israel’s military and to commemorate the ongoing Nakba. André is leading legislation to restore funding to UNRWA and get aid into Gaza. Ilhan, who survived war as a child, is leading the push for a foreign policy that centers diplomacy rather than militarism and offered multiple amendments to stop the funding of the genocide.
**We’re pushing to save lives at home and abroad,** so we’re also championing policies to defend our immigrant neighbors, expand our civil rights, guarantee access to healthcare and other lifesaving needs, and make life more affordable for working class people.
[**We will keep calling on our colleagues in Congress to listen to the majority of Americans and stop enabling war crimes against Palestinians. Will you stand with us and donate to our shared PAC, The Empowerment Fund, today?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqsXu0R1XDWRVJnEMC9_ePsJ41CA8XCwZI4MCkI-GaoNp9QPmQWmYK7sRksc3uSwxt-uOKr_7es99d7SDFzsU4AoR79tiRo2Fbdml5pC7O6RUfVipevHmwaJHdgl16vv8QGolccS4zWJwRYiAHA5AKGLft8hDI5yIUWc-q1YjlnrYymbiMFPm8BZO6WBpB5hU9HDwYKI2dijmd3f56PKw7Tx97Yup_XKpNNzN2uQ5S3x-uuwK4d9gCVdJelhflW659lRGOJg-SZrj6ctsaW3DZ6ut80sLsCi8jnYTRVtFswdpMa-9XyO-2DhlAvSDUAWYwCMEfnafgYKYuJfkHKS9rAeBCt44KsnB1ittj8MV25zIgwaJsqjlIY9it2PBjiTahg/4ip/Xy8YIjxNRbKsAuko5qHItw/h9/h001.vhOJFacY62ByO8YOXKZLWQtuwXkU1DBVHbJQSX-VSiE)

clean_body: Many of our colleagues have normalized anti-Muslim hate, and we’re pushing back against this dehumanization. | | | Friend, I’m one of four Muslim people now serving in Congress. We see people of all faiths and ethnicities as human beings who deserve dignity and safety. But many of our colleagues have normalized anti-Muslim hate, calling us terrorists and endangering our lives just because of our faith. (from left to right, photo shows André Carson, Ilhan Omar, Lateefah Simon, and me) Together we’re demanding an end to the growing dehumanization and violence against vulnerable communities, including immigrants, Muslim Americans, and Palestinians. We’re pushing our colleagues to listen to the majority of Americans and stop enabling this genocide of the Palestinian people. Unlike most of our colleagues in Congress, we don’t take money from AIPAC. Our stances make us targets of pro-genocide groups and their far-right billionaire donors. For example, André Carson has an electoral opponent who brags about being backed by AIPAC. His positions align with our voting base, including fighting for human rights and for everyone to have what they need to thrive. But our colleagues on both sides of the aisle attacked him. Ilhan, Lateefah, André, and I released a shared statement to call out the vile, anti-Muslim, and racist smears against him. At least 50% of Muslim Americans have experienced religious discrimination, which André Carson recognized in his congressional resolution to honor Muslim Americans. As Muslim Americans in public office, we get death threats daily—but that will never silence us. We’re standing with the American people, the majority of whom now want us to end the genocide in Gaza. Seven out of ten democrats want an arms embargo. The majority of Americans have an unfavorable view of the government of Israel, including many Jewish neighbors. Congress can't keep ignoring the fact that our country is done funding a genocide. It is harder now than ever to ignore it. Lateefah, André, Ilhan, and I are listening and demanding an end to U.S. complicity in Israel’s war crimes. We all support policies to block weapons to Israel’s military and to commemorate the ongoing Nakba. André is leading legislation to restore funding to UNRWA and get aid into Gaza. Ilhan, who survived war as a child, is leading the push for a foreign policy that centers diplomacy rather than militarism and offered multiple amendments to stop the funding of the genocide. We’re pushing to save lives at home and abroad, so we’re also championing policies to defend our immigrant neighbors, expand our civil rights, guarantee access to healthcare and other lifesaving needs, and make life more affordable for working class people. Thank you for having our backs. Please keep speaking up for our shared humanity and demanding human rights for all people—no matter their faith or ethnicity. ---

Peter,
The fight for fair maps is heating up, and All On The Line is all-in to make sure voters know what’s at stake in a number of crucial state-level races in 2025 and 2026:
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/112625620/561091359/174172392?refcode=don_aotl_tier1_email_PriRedux_email_20250802-AOTL-Tier1-PriRedux_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250802-AOTL-Tier1-PriRedux_&utm_campaign=PriRedux&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImY2ZDdiM2JhLWI5NmYtZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=w93NGVmWePIx7LHBWywBMCX1EV1tpMil3CflxFTPqyY=)

**Anti-democracy forces have made these elections top targets for their far-right agenda.**
That’s why All On The Line is mobilizing grassroots activists to fight for a truly representative democracy that protects fair maps and fair representation. And it all starts with educating voters about what’s on their ballots. The best way to protect our rights and ensure our leaders represent the will of the people is to make sure voters know what’s at stake in elections like these.
The last time we mobilized supporters for a state-level election in Wisconsin, MAGA poured millions into trying to buy a seat on the state supreme court. In North Carolina, they tried to throw out legally cast ballots to overturn the outcome of an election. That’s what we’re up against as we invest in these critical elections that will shape the future of fair maps across at least 13 states.
[**We need your help to help stop gerrymandering and make sure voters have the freedom to choose their own representatives. | | | Dear Friend, Your participation in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** is requested.

Your response will only take a few minutes, but the subject is crucial to the future of liberty and the separation of powers in America.

The American Founders thought that the proper role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution.

But progressives see the Court differently. They want activist judges to legislate from the bench.
## Do you agree that the role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution as it is written and NOT to make laws or advance a particular policy agenda?
[YES](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/c/HHmBXkcZlqN0Hk4qDeC6tbUuQyZmPcsML78A9eqqyxzLrCN7RsMTvsZ-o2qBwcZsFs9kDptpDDuh6EjINNckb16CKXwrP8dhIeAAsRr0WcDhKt6fOBqRRdvp_TVnSQQWBK50H0BsrhCxbtOLu9v6TQV2d70Q_ctkQ-UMg7wIM34GMZXm03pCtqXexwvy8pIfM227LkpdDsTgjl_Nh6ItdeQ2ENy3PFYiIb_eUcpTDU6ZuICOogbf0Y2lDJLCiNUhqQ_txY6R9ZlLEa7igCLDhPJjPS4McSlrQRvly4GQLUDOdjqqk_J5g35xkY80XuxYjR2djpmbknsD4OOuuJcJQUt4M-FQP8s6DqVclmqO73pPCxTeDLZ7pt8i0dFvQCwVZb7a84CeS5Odq-0zzCeuqDNcKd7bZLOEjXW5boTG8oezw8Y88KQbbEuY_6sz88vvElS4p7f-qYx0rLdainbrET62yrzteNATDqj1BMm0w1LX2ZQd9R1AFk_sNda42FoDuN_KGScNft_kfIigrBZNBIabE4g9rPpOKP-BfIlFjaJVB077RvmnNdUpXBFAK1xjmpuNHBi0T6M6erDGkzZH9dKEbwAXx-irgIC_-1KN2CkVffFQjByCoZ20wASH0B6lbH5tKuFvO-9X7n2lLZ1TPniZ2v8FW2G22RuMEmtxcgh0vdIAWVdfuJihXkURDlU7-FTb_jEs4CWR-J9vkobjOBGIEfNeVVq3rQ/YdiyUgHl6rTGR0gH18_1IMsBfjyPDV43/11) [NO](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/c/CLyZ9JFgJaLrU5iq0oliHdCmLbuO2pOwYuhDUWctyQ5e4-pqqlu8djHBC9hBNmXuzKgWYX9kP5vAMAgOnTY4X4cd3q8XxVH-vaoFhieLWOmHYeP_OcdccpazMvbhp1iiQ6tM06ebwSc4A1hKQT-rwyzAnhl2NB8eJNMeCe3iNKvo7qvyYqXuhdBZZaYyJdYiHSyfOCG-y_cGHYynPvjZU6AFarl6ySM66LsXVAn8PwWkF3zGCRnhdtRKnYqCDXf-XEirHiUftv_0R6-plwOoFKAQcKk-Yul5QCJNy2i_K5Kot2EmD7b8svUCLR2zYQQPlrvLcQIlFjvaaG9AiUywTt6Hm4Fg4NfMNJv9EEYmMzK9VLnGxsa1RVhF4KVGEPh042V7yxo-m-JlUDQganyYkLSDsVLaJbqKToQgbcpswK0yHK8vGvCXzIbkPfXuly6CR1WCzpwrz8SHhaM07nEpIAOcC3bqFpvr42lIQpMRHWTWwNCzzDyxXvNIk2yYA-fFtWYLtOqboSBxPgwlK0AsR2pEHlhpBA0soCaj69PO3UgFvrbxXtlWo_JHvbdmooNaILLQSa1hhl_37xIDuqYzZggAlWJGl5x7JrlGrPQwNwWT9hK9WAP7U2cXjbkG8Hoc6AvB98HmqrYT47z4Gy-sm13suoL5j497o4lFSFdADHAYTpv_cmlKIvgqFDn98tWPaHAme8qAwfqES2FDgVaph6F2lYaIdYSxlQ/Mk_bmS1GMwbtYBcJIqMkp_z24G4FuAph/11) Even worse, progressives dismayed by recent Supreme Court decisions want to "pack" the bench with additional justices to advance a preferred policy agenda.

As Sen. Elizabeth Warren (D-Mass.) put it in a _Boston Globe_ op-ed: "To restore balance and integrity to a broken institution, Congress must expand the Supreme Court by four or more seats."

That is why I'm reaching out to you today...

_What is your opinion about the Supreme Court 's role in our constitutional republic? _

Please share your thoughts with me using the College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** right away.

Your response will help Hillsdale form effective strategies to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the proper role of an independent judiciary that applies the Constitution instead of legislating from the bench.

clean_body: Your participation in Hillsdale College’s National Survey on the United States Supreme Court is requested. | | | Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this | | | | | Dear Friend, Your participation in Hillsdale College's National Survey on the United States Supreme Court is requested. Your response will only take a few minutes, but the subject is crucial to the future of liberty and the separation of powers in America. The American Founders thought that the proper role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution. But progressives see the Court differently. They want activist judges to legislate from the bench. Do you agree that the role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution as it is written and NOT to make laws or advance a particular policy agenda? Even worse, progressives dismayed by recent Supreme Court decisions want to "pack" the bench with additional justices to advance a preferred policy agenda. As Sen. Elizabeth Warren (D-Mass.) put it in a Boston Globe op-ed: "To restore balance and integrity to a broken institution, Congress must expand the Supreme Court by four or more seats." That is why I'm reaching out to you today... What is your opinion about the Supreme Court 's role in our constitutional republic? Please share your thoughts with me using the College's National Survey on the United States Supreme Court right away. Your response will help Hillsdale form effective strategies to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the proper role of an independent judiciary that applies the Constitution instead of legislating from the bench. You can easily complete your National Survey on the United States Supreme Court using this secure link: Thank you for your time and attention--and for your support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844 | | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

It's no secret that I've been one of President Trump's strongest supporters.

I've been one of the leading voices of the conservative agenda, helping President Trump sign the 'Big, Beautiful Bill' into law.

_I will always stand up to protect the unborn._

_I will always work to keep our country and borders secure._

_I will continue to work with our president to rebuild our military and serve the men and women who serve our country with honor._

**I'm the conservative the Left desperately wants out of their way.**

Big money liberal groups are already lining my Democrat opponent's campaign with millions.

Fellow American, I'll continue to fight, but I need to know you're by my side. Will you please endorse my re-election campaign today? Your endorsement sends a strong, clear message that conservatives are standing with me and are ready for the 2026 mid-terms.

Thank you,
Lindsey Graham

clean_body: I’ll continue to fight, but I need to know you’re by my side. | Fellow American, I've been honored to receive the full support from some of our country's strongest leaders. From President Donald Trump to U.S. Senator Tim Scott and countless others, conservatives in South Carolina and beyond are rallying their support around my re-election campaign. I'm incredibly grateful for their support. But, Fellow American, I'm missing a very important supporter from my list: YOU! It's no secret that I've been one of President Trump's strongest supporters. I've been one of the leading voices of the conservative agenda, helping President Trump sign the 'Big, Beautiful Bill' into law. I will always stand up to protect the unborn. I will always work to keep our country and borders secure. I will continue to work with our president to rebuild our military and serve the men and women who serve our country with honor. I'm the conservative the Left desperately wants out of their way. Big money liberal groups are already lining my Democrat opponent's campaign with millions. Fellow American, I'll continue to fight, but I need to know you're by my side. Will you please endorse my re-election campaign today? Your endorsement sends a strong, clear message that conservatives are standing with me and are ready for the 2026 mid-terms. Thank you, Lindsey Graham | In the United States Senate, South Carolina's Lindsey Graham has earned a reputation as a conservative, a problem-solver, and a leader who gets things done. He is a great friend to our men and women serving in uniform, a respected voice on national security matters, a leading advocate for cutting the out-of-control spending in Washington, and a champion for confirming conservative judges. | We want to make sure you're a proud member of Team Graham, and we don't want to bother you. We'd hate to see you go, but if you'd like to unsubscribe, please . | Paid for by Graham Majority Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Team Graham Inc, Fund for America's Future, Security Is Strength PAC, and NRSC.
