| _Chris Deluzio is leading the fight to BAN congressional stock trading. He needs your help to show that thousands of people across the country support this ban._ **Sign the Petition:[_**BAN congressional stock trading →**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112627009/561097077/-598076962?refcode=email_080225_stocktrading&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNzI2ODNlYi1iZDZmLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FkhhaCKFUjaV6LNtfg-ByuJr98mz_j9YP4QjpzVolWg=&emci=69581b68-eb6e-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=272683eb-bd6f-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=13185894)** | | **[Sign the petition →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112627011/561097079/-598076962?refcode=email_080225_stocktrading&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNzI2ODNlYi1iZDZmLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FkhhaCKFUjaV6LNtfg-ByuJr98mz_j9YP4QjpzVolWg=&emci=69581b68-eb6e-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=272683eb-bd6f-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=13185894)**
---
Pennsylvania Republican Congressman Robert Bresnahan sold off his stock in a Medicaid provider, then days later, he voted to pass Trump’s so-called “Big, Beautiful Bill”— _which gutted Medicaid funding._
_The stock has fallen more than 40% since his sale._
**Derek, this is corrupt. And it isn’t the first time we’ve seen members of Congress seemingly benefit from buying and selling stocks at just the right moment.**
When Trump’s tariff announcement caused the market to plummet, we saw elected officials, and even members of Trump’s cabinet, buy stocks just days before Trump paused the tariffs, causing the stock market to jump.
These suspiciously timed stock trades erode the public’s trust in their elected representatives. Are they working for the people they represent, or to line their own pockets?
The American people are rightly furious—it’s corrupt, and it has no place in the halls of Congress.
Chris Deluzio believes to restore the American Dream, we must root out this corruption and stop politicians from using their inside access to our government to benefit themselves.
**That’s why he’s fighting to BAN Congressional stock trading and restore Americans’ trust in government—and he needs your help to increase the pressure.**
[_**Please, sign Chris’s petition today and join his fight to BAN congressional stock trading and restore trust in our elected officials →**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112627013/561097081/-598076962?refcode=email_080225_stocktrading&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNzI2ODNlYi1iZDZmLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FkhhaCKFUjaV6LNtfg-ByuJr98mz_j9YP4QjpzVolWg=&emci=69581b68-eb6e-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=272683eb-bd6f-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=13185894)
| ****[Sign the petition →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112627015/561097083/-598076962?refcode=email_080225_stocktrading&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNzI2ODNlYi1iZDZmLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FkhhaCKFUjaV6LNtfg-ByuJr98mz_j9YP4QjpzVolWg=&emci=69581b68-eb6e-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=272683eb-bd6f-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=13185894)****

Because just a couple weeks ago, while you were going about your life, the Senate passed President Trump’s “Big Beautiful Bill” and it was signed into law just days later. We pulled an all-nighter to get it done. Why?

Because **it locks in permanent tax relief, imposes work requirements for welfare, and invests over $170 BILLION into border security, including:**
1. $46.5 billion for the wall
2. $45 billion to expand detention facilities
3. $29.9 billion to hire 10,000 new ICE agents

This is real progress — the kind we dreamed about just a few years ago. But now the Democrats smell blood. They’re outraising us, outspending us, and targeting our Senate seats — even in red states.

**They want revenge.**

If we lose this next election, everything we just won could vanish. They’ll tear it all down.

That’s why I’m writing you — not for $10, not for $100 — just for $1. Not because $1 will flip the Senate, but because it’s a signal that you haven’t given up.

subject: Do you listen to NPR?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by State Democrats Committee (StateDemocrats
body:
Millions of Americans listen to the news every day on their local NPR station. Do you?
#

**Do you listen to NPR?** | [YES, I LISTEN TO NPR](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/93174?t=1&akid=9212%2E614464%2Ey9bRzN) [NO, I DON’T LISTEN TO NPR](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/93174?t=2&akid=9212%2E614464%2Ey9bRzN)
---
Here’s what happened, Peter:
**FIRST —** Donald Trump + MAGA Republicans in Congress announced their effort to cut more than a BILLION DOLLARS from PBS + NPR.
**THEN —** They actually did it. Earlier this month, they officially cut $1.1 BILLION in federal funding for public broadcasters on radio + TV across the country.
**NOW — These cuts mean that PBS + NPR stations, especially in rural areas, are at risk of shuttering.**
Millions of Americans listen to the news every day on their local NPR station. **So today, we’re asking you to confirm with us:**
**Do you listen to NPR?**
[YES, I LISTEN TO NPR](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/93174?t=3&akid=9212%2E614464%2Ey9bRzN) [NO, I DON’T LISTEN TO NPR](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/93174?t=4&akid=9212%2E614464%2Ey9bRzN)

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112627619/561099075/150430950?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMGUyMmEwNy1jMDZmLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eFetOXf16TLstc_M9nJYr1IfRSHzL7PIfeXxrvllSt8=&emci=5c902b78-136f-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=f0e22a07-c06f-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=7731215)

| | Thanks to your incredible grassroots support, we've kicked off my re-election campaign with an outstanding first month. **I'm so grateful to have you with me in this fight.** We're building a campaign powered by people — not corporate PACs, billionaires, or special interests — and because of folks like you, we're hitting the ground running. Your early support helps us hire organizers, expand our outreach, and take our message directly to voters across Oregon. Together, we've taken on our toughest challenges — from tackling the climate crisis to calling out corporate greed to standing up for working families. I'll never stop fighting for you in the Senate. **We've got a lot of work to do to build the world we all want to see, but with your continued support, I'm energized for the work ahead.** Thank you again for being part of this team. clean_body: Thanks to your incredible grassroots support, we’ve kicked off my re-election campaign with an outstanding first month. | | | | Thanks to your incredible grassroots support, we've kicked off my re-election campaign with an outstanding first month. I'm so grateful to have you with me in this fight. We're building a campaign powered by people — not corporate PACs, billionaires, or special interests — and because of folks like you, we're hitting the ground running. Your early support helps us hire organizers, expand our outreach, and take our message directly to voters across Oregon. Together, we've taken on our toughest challenges — from tackling the climate crisis to calling out corporate greed to standing up for working families. I'll never stop fighting for you in the Senate. We've got a lot of work to do to build the world we all want to see, but with your continued support, I'm energized for the work ahead. Thank you again for being part of this team. Let's keep up the momentum and show what a people-powered movement can do. Onward! name: Team Schiff
subject: Will you let Adam know what’s on your mind?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
|
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=8851%2E5257348%2EBQt06G)
Derek,
Last month, Adam asked to hear from you.
He knows that these are challenging times, and he also knows that real leadership requires careful listening. That’s why he’s asking supporters like you to share what matters most to them right now.
**[If you haven’t had a chance to fill out Adam’s Summer Priorities Survey, we hope you’ll take a moment to respond today:](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1023?c0=engagement-202508-summer-priorities.6VEbDa&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_SUR_AC90_20250802_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=8851%2E5257348%2EBQt06G)**
[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1023?c0=engagement-202508-summer-priorities.6VEbDa&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_SUR_AC90_20250802_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=5&akid=8851%2E5257348%2EBQt06G)
---
Adam is looking forward to reading your responses. The concerns and thoughts you share will shape how he shows up and what he fights for.
Thanks for taking the time to respond.
— Team Schiff
_\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Adam Schiff
Date: Wednesday, July 16, 2025
Subject: I want to hear from you_
Derek,
This is gut-check time in the republic. One party rule has jammed through a bill that will be devastating to our healthcare, food assistance, renewable energy, and so much more.
We will get through this, but we will need to do everything we can to mitigate the harms until we can throw these bums out of office. So I want to hear your thoughts. This grassroots movement has been so important to my work that I want to know:
Amidst all of the challenges at this moment, what is your strongest concern? What’s keeping you up at night? Where do you want your elected officials focusing their efforts?
Too many in Washington are focused on polls and pundits, but I’d rather listen to real people.
**[That’s why my team and I have launched a new Summer Priorities Survey, and I’d be grateful if you took a moment to fill it out:](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1023?c0=engagement-202508-summer-priorities.6VEbDa&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_SUR_AC90_20250802_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=6&akid=8851%2E5257348%2EBQt06G)**
[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1023?c0=engagement-202508-summer-priorities.6VEbDa&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_SUR_AC90_20250802_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=7&akid=8851%2E5257348%2EBQt06G)
---
Whether it’s the cost of housing, the fight for reproductive rights, defending our democracy from Trump and MAGA extremism, or something closer to home, your answers will help shape my work.
This is your moment to speak up. I hope to hear from you today.
Thanks,
Adam
[](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=.zL8wZO&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_SUR_AC90_20250802_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=8&akid=8851%2E5257348%2EBQt06G)
| | [DONATE](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/5308?refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_SUR_AC90_20250802_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=9&akid=8851%2E5257348%2EBQt06G)
---
135 E. Olive Ave., #750 Burbank CA, 91502
**[www.adamschiff.com](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/60?t=2&akid=8851%2E5257348%2EBQt06G) | [contact@adamschiff.com](mailto:contact@adamschiff.com) | [Privacy Policy](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/64?t=3&akid=8851%2E5257348%2EBQt06G)**

name: Steel River GoPack
subject: When the grid goes down, what will you do..
body:
You don’t need a bunker. You need this...
| | | [](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21729/6374453/c57e37f44275a071ddc18bee52ed591ed372d2ff/aa8088a1d68aff1fef16c6548dce8ef9ead17b0c)
---
| | |
---
_August 2nd, 2025 at 08:58 PM UTC_
---
| | |
---
| | Hey, Not trying to be dramatic, but if the last few years have taught us anything, it’s this: **You can’t count on the system to bail you out.** That’s why we’re giving away 200 of our **Steel River Go Packs**. It’s a simple survival kit we built for regular people who just want to be a little more prepared. It’s got:
* Waterproof matches
* A tough little multitool
* Solar charger
* Headlamp
* Emergency baton — flashlight, area light, and flashing red SOS mode with a magnetic base
* And a spork that’s actually kind of badass

No fluff. Just useful gear. Just pay shipping and it's yours. If you've been meaning to get your act together — even just a little — this is an easy first step. [Get your free Go Pack here while they’re still available](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21729/6374453/b084e3d434dbcc7ca5f35906e998b9f30fa895bb/aa8088a1d68aff1fef16c6548dce8ef9ead17b0c) Stay sharp,
– Mike
Steel River Team P.S. These usually go fast when we open up a new batch. If the link doesn’t work, we’re out.
---
|
---
[](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21729/6374453/c57e37f44275a071ddc18bee52ed591ed372d2ff/aa8088a1d68aff1fef16c6548dce8ef9ead17b0c)
---
|

|

name: Nikki Budzinski
subject: Expressing my gratitude
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nikki for Congress
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112628057/561100834/-550958566?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMmQ1YjQxZS1jMjZmLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TOXZQORDLTC-8zHOpOqfB15H9jwBk4j3Zgn2QawmvbY=)
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112628058/561100835/-550958566?refcode=em-8.2.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMmQ1YjQxZS1jMjZmLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TOXZQORDLTC-8zHOpOqfB15H9jwBk4j3Zgn2QawmvbY=)

I need to express my gratitude.

**With your support, we finished July in a strong spot and met our online fundraising goal.**

I’m proud to run a truly people-powered campaign. We met our goal with the help of people including:

Catherine in Decatur, who chipped in $1.
Rich in Champaign, who chipped in $3.
Dennis in Springfield, who chipped in $25.
_And many more!_

Whether you chipped in a few bucks like Catherine, Rich, and Dennis, or told a friend about the stakes in this race, every moment moves us closer to keeping this seat blue next year.

I know Election Day seems far away. It’s what we raise now that will build the groundwork for the battles ahead. I’m facing multiple GOP challengers in this race – losing this seat would be disastrous not only for IL-13 families, but for control of the House majority and our ability to stop the MAGA agenda.

**[If you’re with me in the fight to stand up for working families, please consider helping me start August strong with a donation of $3 or any amount.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112628060/561100836/-550958566?refcode=em-8.2.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMmQ1YjQxZS1jMjZmLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TOXZQORDLTC-8zHOpOqfB15H9jwBk4j3Zgn2QawmvbY=)**

Thank you,

Nikki

clean_body: | = = I need to express my gratitude. With your support, we finished July in a strong spot and met our online fundraising goal. I’m proud to run a truly people-powered campaign. We met our goal with the help of people including: Catherine in Decatur, who chipped in $1. Rich in Champaign, who chipped in $3. Dennis in Springfield, who chipped in $25. And many more! Whether you chipped in a few bucks like Catherine, Rich, and Dennis, or told a friend about the stakes in this race, every moment moves us closer to keeping this seat blue next year. I know Election Day seems far away. It’s what we raise now that will build the groundwork for the battles ahead. I’m facing multiple GOP challengers in this race – losing this seat would be disastrous not only for IL-13 families, but for control of the House majority and our ability to stop the MAGA agenda. = Thank you, Nikki | = | = = = Nikki is a champion for working families – from leading the fight to pass a $15 minimum wage in Illinois, to bringing manufacturing back to America. name: Derek Tran
subject: Grateful for you
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112628075/561100879/1527952032?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3ODciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzFkNWI0MWUtYzI2Zi1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=vi64CRzurMj9YhPMO10TN9g1qezFV28xoCOLKdbP2dk=)
I wanted to take a moment to say thank you. Your support this past month – whether you made a donation, signed a petition, or helped spread the word – is what keeps our campaign going. I wouldn’t be in this fight without you in my corner. July was a whirlwind both here in CA-45 and in Washington. As partisan chaos swirled – from reckless budget bills to a flood of attack ads – we stayed focused on what really matters to Orange and Los Angeles County families: lowering costs, protecting our kids, and always showing up for our community. I have a few highlights from the past month below. If you are short on time or didn’t contribute in July, a **[donation of $3](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112628078/561100885/1527952032?refcode=em-8.2.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3ODciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzFkNWI0MWUtYzI2Zi1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=vi64CRzurMj9YhPMO10TN9g1qezFV28xoCOLKdbP2dk=) **would help us finish out the summer strong. Thank you, Derek | **[Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112628082/561100889/1527952032?refcode=em-8.2.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3ODciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzFkNWI0MWUtYzI2Zi1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=vi64CRzurMj9YhPMO10TN9g1qezFV28xoCOLKdbP2dk=)**
---

* * *
**When Trump’s so-called “Big Beautiful Bill” came up for a vote, I proudly voted NO. **This reckless legislation will gut Medicaid, cut food assistance, and hand tax breaks to billionaires and corporations. It wasn’t a hard choice for me: I came to Congress to protect working families, not to sell them out to special interests. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112628084/561100891/-1513466498?refcode=em-8.2.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3ODciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzFkNWI0MWUtYzI2Zi1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=vi64CRzurMj9YhPMO10TN9g1qezFV28xoCOLKdbP2dk=)
**I brought our fight for lower costs to the national stage.** I helped launch the Lowering Costs Caucus in Congress to focus on what voters tell me they care about most: affordability. I joined MSNBC’s _Morning Joe_ to talk about how families are being squeezed by rising costs. As a parent, I feel that squeeze too, and I’m bringing that urgency to the House floor every day.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112628086/561100893/-1513466498?refcode=em-8.2.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3ODciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzFkNWI0MWUtYzI2Zi1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=vi64CRzurMj9YhPMO10TN9g1qezFV28xoCOLKdbP2dk=)
**I introduced new legislation to make baby essentials more affordable. **I stood alongside my fellow Dads Caucus members to introduce the Baby Food Tax Relief Act because no parent should have to wonder where their child’s next meal is coming from. This bill would exempt baby formula, bottles, highchairs, and other essentials from tariffs that are driving up prices nationwide.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112628089/561100898/-1513466498?refcode=em-8.2.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3ODciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzFkNWI0MWUtYzI2Zi1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=vi64CRzurMj9YhPMO10TN9g1qezFV28xoCOLKdbP2dk=)
**I’m fighting back against $5 million in right-wing attack ads.** A powerful far-right dark money group launched a multimillion-dollar blitz across swing districts including ours because I voted NO on Trump’s harmful budget scheme.

The national GOP is trying to drown out our message with lies and flip this seat, but thanks to supporters like you, we’re pushing back and making sure the truth gets heard.

**[If you weren’t able to chip in last month, or want to double down on your previous support, will you chip in $3 to help us kick off August strong? Every dollar helps us stay ahead of the attacks and keep this seat blue.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112628092/561100901/1527952032?refcode=em-8.2.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3ODciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzFkNWI0MWUtYzI2Zi1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=vi64CRzurMj9YhPMO10TN9g1qezFV28xoCOLKdbP2dk=)**
Thank you, and I look forward to getting more done for you and your families in August.
Derek

body:
| | | ******Reproductive rights are on the ballot this November in Virginia - and we need your help to STOP abortion and contraceptive bans.** **[I’m running for Virginia Delegate in a toss-up, red to blue race against a MAGA Republican. Stand with my campaign and sign the petition: defend access to abortion and contraception.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm3-hZbIB6O_orklPheimusjVDdoy-OlSvcI4fU5WFtdEiRBGK5pXD_RW90YQdSkoI19VBsqlLY1JO77NngfWWy5Gzs2aUlnvlrOy-F5a7RtRcAAgXcb9psi54VTJ1QUkF25l3Q5sxKnezNviAEwxuARTyCqxOUQTAHM2PO_HRyfv0Va6kEjwt1ad_sKKiFWtAcVkmoLzlIf9s_I4r5_c6H1r1HOfrrZFtWybKCKvQyhFT2XQKsOKfuxVBu9ectLG7SFTYygVyXc1xBxR4EE1y0y-bWE77H6bU7mkIcP6KFcWM2HgZBqVx1CYtiqKnYGgVPb0eJioPOZfu_-A-0oI8TPIMXEF68ytGa8SuG27eDgo4nb7YMi6MHbXw7mPN_2wT5REIYCTJxnPcrc1_I7qafzquEwFPUVwalxlwY19-rbMb1iLo0XqD3cNhDeCa_23sbLYg9-8z9ZC9yci-fZ3jC1g2SU0fOhriaOjFyxmhZ1Bh_OEBUcQJOfisfp4zcNzpFQ/4ip/kjQCq0IFS8mUn0MpcPb2zQ/h0/h001.NEwfx6FmQsQRGvWKCJhZpsIclIt0LLpjF1YDMBiV47c)**
* * *
Friend, when _Roe v. Wade_ was overturned, states across the South banned and restricted abortion.

But in Virginia, our rights were protected, because of Democratic control of the General Assembly.

MAGA Republicans want to end our 51-49 Democratic majority in elections _this November_.

The best defense is a good offense - and I’m running to flip a red seat blue to EXPAND our pro-choice majority.

My opponent voted against a Constitutional amendment to protect access to abortion and contraception.
**
I’m proud to be endorsed by Reproductive Freedom for All ... and I need your help to WIN in just a few months. Will you help us defend our rights today?
****
[Stand with my campaign and sign the petition: defend access to abortion and contraception.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm3-hZbIB6O_orklPheimusjVDdoy-OlSvcI4fU5WFtdEiRBGK5pXD_RW90YQdSkoI19VBsqlLY1JO77NngfWWy5Gzs2aUlnvlrOy-F5a7RtRcAAgXcb9psi54VTJ1QUkF25l3Q5sxKnezNviAEwxuARTyCqxOUQTAHM2PO_HRyfv0Va6kEjwt1ad_sKKiFWtAcVkmoLzlIf9s_I4r5_c6H1r1HOfrrZFtWybKCKvQyhFT2XQKsOKfuxVBu9ectLG7SFcoqALoZEx8Lwf0C_2A3MIGtTKMLxRG8TjoQYmXTBEbJdJ7Czh1t76-qzePjJ7S3RPPEQHSYUpVytzrOt6Q1TaBwbIF-DAQzlj1EFLnAMl9RhA9AZRxCCv7_B4D-g_fnjTRGYjAZP-70vbxWEaAds_Mtp8Rk5CB9Sc3iuqMOojOo2GQPJvZx0tyS8Mz-A7LllRgN6Ho7zJrvuBM1bt041sXvz674KRbLLfjRpFvA9LpbBOPved6YBSmmQAGyXlWqM/4ip/kjQCq0IFS8mUn0MpcPb2zQ/h1/h001.vX9WThiAYpKXNJSZGxGvI00jIuOTpE-Tk-EvahWA00g)

name: Rev. Warnock
subject: Waiting to hear if you approve of the GOP’s budget bill
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:
Friend, did you see my message?
---
After Republicans in Congress passed their Big, Ugly Budget Bill, we are now slow walking toward a crisis. Millions of Americans will lose health care. Virtually every American will face higher health care costs. Rural hospitals will be shuttered and nursing homes shut down.
All of this to help billionaires get richer at your expense.
**That’s why I’m counting on your help to send a powerful message to the GOP that the American people do NOT support this disastrous bill. But I’m still short of the 10,000 responses I need by midnight. So if you haven’t already, please respond to this poll:**
**Do you approve of the GOP’s extreme budget bill?**
| | | [YES](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112628300/561101592/1402674517?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk5578-su-seg1&refcode=jtk5578-su-seg1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMGQ1YjQxZS1jMjZmLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=x3a-0wSNtsx0W2hErcn0GUSjJ7bhvHkiYYY_k8ulsgI=&emci=cb2dd6e3-c26c-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=30d5b41e-c26f-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=1586379)

---
Thank you,
Rev. Warnock
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: **Rev. Raphael Warnock**
Subject: Help me send a message to the GOP
| | |
---
Republicans in Congress should be ashamed of themselves, friend.
The budget bill they just passed raises costs on virtually every American. It sells out the working folks they were elected to serve. It strips millions of Americans of their health care. And it takes food away from hungry children.
Meanwhile, they were sure to include a tax cut for the special interests and billionaires who fund their campaigns.
I know that folks are sick and tired of politicians in Washington putting billionaires ahead of the middle class. This GOP budget bill was historically unpopular, and yet Republicans passed it anyway – because they think they won’t pay any political consequences.
**That’s why I’m asking this team to help me make it clear to the GOP that the American people are outraged by this bill. My team created a new poll so you can share where you stand, and I’m counting on 10,000 responses by midnight tonight. Please, tell me now:**
**Do you approve of the GOP’s extreme budget bill?**
| | | [YES](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112628302/561101634/1402674517?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk5578-su-seg1&refcode=jtk5578-su-seg1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMGQ1YjQxZS1jMjZmLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=x3a-0wSNtsx0W2hErcn0GUSjJ7bhvHkiYYY_k8ulsgI=&emci=cb2dd6e3-c26c-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=30d5b41e-c26f-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=1586379)

| [NO](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112628303/561101687/1402674517?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk5578-su-seg1&refcode=jtk5578-su-seg1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMGQ1YjQxZS1jMjZmLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=x3a-0wSNtsx0W2hErcn0GUSjJ7bhvHkiYYY_k8ulsgI=&emci=cb2dd6e3-c26c-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=30d5b41e-c26f-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=1586379)

name: Josh Harder
subject: Thank you — from me, personally
body:
For two big reasons. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112628354/561101991/-1860252395?refcode=-footer-&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzZkNWI0MWUtYzI2Zi1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=GamPckrbR5AE6oS0iaQEgFtZeIqWDJoYJOwQmhwXIUI=) | Hey Peter, I just wanted to take a moment to say thank you — for two big reasons. First, I’m incredibly grateful to everyone who took a moment to sign my birthday card and send kind messages. It really meant a lot to see your notes of support. I’ll be honest, the past 7 months have been very challenging and it was a lovely reminder I’m not in this fight alone. Second, I want to thank everyone who chipped in to help us reach our fundraising goal for July. I’m happy to share that we hit it our goal because of all of you! I really couldn’t be more grateful for this team. Yesterday I got the chance to spend some time with Pam and the kids and today I’m feeling fired up and ready to stay in the fight. The stakes have never been higher, and I’m deeply grateful for the responsibility and trust that come with this role. Thanks for standing with me and for being part of this grassroots movement. — Josh [_**P.S. If you weren’t able to donate before the deadline, that’s totally okay. You can still make a difference now or whenever you’re able to pitch in.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112628360/561102004/9139517?&refcode=E14468-20250802-ThankYou-SL-Other&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzZkNWI0MWUtYzI2Zi1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=GamPckrbR5AE6oS0iaQEgFtZeIqWDJoYJOwQmhwXIUI=)
---
* * *
You are receiving this email because Congressman Josh Harder is one of our last lines of defense to protect our democracy against MAGA extremists like Donald Trump and Marjorie Taylor Greene. clean_body: For two big reasons. | = | Hey Peter, I just wanted to take a moment to say thank you — for two big reasons. First, I’m incredibly grateful to everyone who took a moment to sign my birthday card and send kind messages. It really meant a lot to see your notes of support. I’ll be honest, the past 7 months have been very challenging and it was a lovely reminder I’m not in this fight alone. Second, I want to thank everyone who chipped in to help us reach our fundraising goal for July. I’m happy to share that we hit it our goal because of all of you! I really couldn’t be more grateful for this team. Yesterday I got the chance to spend some time with Pam and the kids and today I’m feeling fired up and ready to stay in the fight. The stakes have never been higher, and I’m deeply grateful for the responsibility and trust that come with this role. Thanks for standing with me and for being part of this grassroots movement. — Josh = *

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. name: Jocelyn Benson
subject: A disaster
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOCELYN BENSON FOR GOVERNOR
body:
# [](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/203?t=1&akid=574%2E181023%2EZM3typ)
Team — The bill signed by Donald Trump and passed by the GOP House and Senate majorities is a _disaster_ for Michigan families.
Military families are worrying about how they’ll feed their kids because the food benefits they rely on are being cut. Millions of people will now avoid going to the doctor, risking illness, because they no longer have access to necessary healthcare coverage.
There is nothing “beautiful” about a bill that rips away access to resources that help people thrive. This will cause real, lasting harm to Michigan families. Any politician who voted in support of it has no business leading our state.
I want Michigan to be the best place in the nation to be a kid, raise a kid, and call home. A state where our loved ones are all **happy, healthy, safe, and close by.** As governor, I will work every day to make that a reality.
**And here’s the thing: I don’t play politics. I will work with anyone who can make this vision possible — and I'll stand up to anyone who gets in the way of that mission.**
[**That’s where you come in: Will you pitch in right now to help invest in our work on the ground so we can build the team we need to win?**](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/854?c0=jmb-em-q32025.OcO0Lx&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250802_PM1_V1_S1&t=2&akid=574%2E181023%2EZM3typ)

I’ve always been that leader. And I’m ready to get to work.
Let’s go.
Jocelyn

subject: I’m reaching out with important updates for you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
Let’s get into it.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/112628921/561103911/1328794144?refcode=ea.ca63a687-c36f-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ms=ea.ca63a687-c36f-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImNhNjNhNjg3LWMzNmYtZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=A4w_Rc-vDZqwpmPQwK47cqXO9H9VcMEjw9dryzvq59c=&emci=14ebac7d-c36f-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=ca63a687-c36f-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=4823105)

[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/112628922/561103912/2105508926?refcode=ea.ca63a687-c36f-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ms=ea.ca63a687-c36f-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImNhNjNhNjg3LWMzNmYtZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=A4w_Rc-vDZqwpmPQwK47cqXO9H9VcMEjw9dryzvq59c=) Hey there. I have a couple of important updates to share. First, I want to say thank you for your support this summer. JanePAC has raised over $100,000 just from emails like this one over the last two months! Thousands of dedicated grassroots supporters like you, brimming with hope for real change, came together to fuel our mission. **Now, I want to show you the proof that every dollar you contribute translates into real change. Over the past few months, we've helped fuel some major victories that demonstrate the power of this grassroots movement:**
* **Paloma Aguirre** won her special election to the San Diego County Board of Supervisors! As Mayor of Imperial Beach, Paloma led the fight against the catastrophic Tijuana River sewage crisis that's been poisoning her community for years. Now she'll have an even bigger platform to stand up to polluters and deliver the relief her district desperately needs.

* **Adelita Grijalva** won the Democratic nomination in Arizona's 7th Congressional District! This fighter has spent over two decades serving working families in Southern Arizona. The granddaughter of a Mexican immigrant and daughter of Congressman Raúl Grijalva, Adelita knows exactly what it takes to deliver for her community.

* **Jay Jones** pulled off a massive upset in his Virginia Attorney General primary, defeating a Dominion Energy-backed opponent who took a staggering _$800,000_ from the state's largest corporate polluter. Jay's running on a platform to prosecute environmental crimes and defend Virginia's clean energy future — exactly the kind of leader we need in this critical role.

This is what happens when grassroots supporters like you refuse to back down. Your donations, your calls, your energy — it all adds up to real victories that protect our communities from corporate polluters. But here's the thing: We can't let our guard down. Trump and Big Oil are working overtime to undo every bit of climate progress we've made. That's why I need you to stay vigilant with me and keep the pressure on. The fight for our planet is far from over, and we need to be ready for whatever comes next. This month, we're going to keep building the grassroots movement that can take on the dirty fossil fuel agenda and stop the sellout of our future. clean_body: Let’s get into it. | = Hey there. I have a couple of important updates to share. First, I want to say thank you for your support this summer. JanePAC has raised over $100,000 just from emails like this one over the last two months! Thousands of dedicated grassroots supporters like you, brimming with hope for real change, came together to fuel our mission. Now, I want to show you the proof that every dollar you contribute translates into real change. Over the past few months, we've helped fuel some major victories that demonstrate the power of this grassroots movement: Paloma Aguirre won her special election to the San Diego County Board of Supervisors! As Mayor of Imperial Beach, Paloma led the fight against the catastrophic Tijuana River sewage crisis that's been poisoning her community for years. Now she'll have an even bigger platform to stand up to polluters and deliver the relief her district desperately needs. Adelita Grijalva won the Democratic nomination in Arizona's 7th Congressional District! This fighter has spent over two decades serving working families in Southern Arizona. The granddaughter of a Mexican immigrant and daughter of Congressman Raúl Grijalva, Adelita knows exactly what it takes to deliver for her community. Jay Jones pulled off a massive upset in his Virginia Attorney General primary, defeating a Dominion Energy-backed opponent who took a staggering $800,000 from the state's largest corporate polluter. Jay's running on a platform to prosecute environmental crimes and defend Virginia's clean energy future — exactly the kind of leader we need in this critical role. This is what happens when grassroots supporters like you refuse to back down. Your donations, your calls, your energy — it all adds up to real victories that protect our communities from corporate polluters. But here's the thing: We can't let our guard down. Trump and Big Oil are working overtime to undo every bit of climate progress we've made. That's why I need you to stay vigilant with me and keep the pressure on. The fight for our planet is far from over, and we need to be ready for whatever comes next. This month, we're going to keep building the grassroots movement that can take on the dirty fossil fuel agenda and stop the sellout of our future. None of it would be possible without supporters like you. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thanks again. xx Jane | = | = = Follow along: | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|--- Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. Jane Fonda Climate PAC 600 Pennsylvania Ave SE #15180 Washington, DC 20003 United States

Once a federally permissible source has contributed $5,000 in a calendar year, The Real Texas PAC will transfer any amounts in excess of $5,000 to its non-contribution account. All contributions from corporations and labor unions will be deposited in the non-contribution account. Please contact us at realtexas@mbacg.com if you would like a different allocation. name: AOC
subject: Our choice.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
#
Believe it or not, building community — whether it's your church, mosque, a knitting group, your dinner circle — is far more transformative than you realize.
If you don’t know your neighbor, it’s time to know your neighbor**.
If you have a co-worker you think you’re cool with, it’s time to get to know that person**.
It’s time to get to know the people we will be relying on to protect each other.
It may seem frivolous, but I guarantee you it’s not: **creating community around you is one of the most powerful and radical things you can do in an environment like this**.
Sometimes even just being in community with people who are not like-minded with you — is a very odd little thing that can help change their mind.
We have no choice but to live in the times that we live in, and to make it better one day at a time, one choice at a time.
**Never, ever think that any choice or act of yours is too small. It isn't.**
Regimes and autocracies are taken down by millions of drops of small actions that would otherwise be invisible by masses of people.
This is the assignment that we have ahead of us. I look forward to doing this work with you all.
In solidarity,
Alexandria
Our main project now is to **unite the working class in this country against a fascist agenda**. Period.
[Help us continue the fight by making a grassroots donation.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250802.SzaFnK&refcode=em20250802-9462-P_FND_EGR_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9462%2E2526796%2Evw7tO_)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250802.SzaFnK&refcode=em20250802-9462-P_FND_EGR_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=9462%2E2526796%2Evw7tO_)**

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20250802?refcode=em20250802-9462-P_FND_EGR_GRM&t=21&refcode2=9462_2526796_vw7tO_&akid=9462%2E2526796%2Evw7tO_)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20250802-9462-P_FND_EGR_GRM&t=22&akid=9462%2E2526796%2Evw7tO_)**

---|---|---|---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.

name: Roy Cooper
subject: have you heard our news?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
| Folks, I’m Roy Cooper. On Monday, we launched our campaign to help take back the United States Senate for Democrats, and already, the enthusiasm we’ve seen from folks across the country is astonishing. Can I have a moment of your time to reintroduce myself and let you know why I’m running? [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112629957/561108022/426922545?refcode=250802_MFC_Cooper_PostLaunch2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMzBjYzU2NS1jODZmLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=q224O7_54iGtSIRyLpx0o2fHUBqbzhxD0WswIDrLuk8=) [_**If you don’t need to hear anything else, you can go ahead and split a contribution between our campaign and Seth Moulton right now.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112629958/561108024/-1005672175?refcode=250802_MFC_Cooper_PostLaunch2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMzBjYzU2NS1jODZmLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=q224O7_54iGtSIRyLpx0o2fHUBqbzhxD0WswIDrLuk8=) **North Carolina is my home, and I’ve spent a lifetime in service to this state.** It’s where I was born, raised, went to school, and raised my own family. I’ve had the honor of serving as a state legislator, Attorney General, and Governor. I**’m proud of the work we achieved together — including bringing thousands of jobs to the state and, in what may have been my most impactful achievement as Governor, expanding Medicaid.** Now, more than 650,000 North Carolinians are covered by Medicaid expansion — but that coverage is imperiled by Washington Republicans’ bill slashing funding for Medicaid and other services Americans rely on. **I’m asking for your support to serve our nation as the next Democratic Senator because so much of the progress we have made is in danger now, not only for North Carolinians, but for every American. That’s why I’m running for Senate.** I’m running because **every American deserves access to health care** — and that means we need to preserve Medicaid, not slash it to give billionaires a handout. I’m running because **reproductive rights are fundamental** — and we need to fight to restore abortion access nationwide. I’m running because **our planet is in jeopardy** — and right now the people in power would rather allow corporations to pollute our air and water than find a new direction. **Americans deserve leaders who will take a stand for what is right. I am ready to serve again, but this time in Washington.** [**I can make no greater pledge to you than this: I will always do what I think is right for the people of our great state and country. Folks, we can win this race, but it won’t be easy. I need you with me as a Founding Donor today. Does $20 fit in your budget? Split a contribution between our campaign and Seth Moulton today >>>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112629959/561108025/-1005672175?refcode=250802_MFC_Cooper_PostLaunch2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMzBjYzU2NS1jODZmLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=q224O7_54iGtSIRyLpx0o2fHUBqbzhxD0WswIDrLuk8=) | | [**$18 »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112629960/561108026/426922545?amount=18&refcode=250802_MFC_Cooper_PostLaunch2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMzBjYzU2NS1jODZmLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=q224O7_54iGtSIRyLpx0o2fHUBqbzhxD0WswIDrLuk8= "https://secure.actblue.com/")

(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=20793%2E878179%2E5TYqib). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=20793%2E878179%2E5TYqib).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=20793%2E878179%2E5TYqib) to request fewer emails. name: Yvette Martinez
subject: I can’t overstate what a big deal this is!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the California Democratic Party | www
body:
Thank you. Now the real work begins. |
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112630902/561111740/-1175830425?refcode=header&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzUvMS84MDk5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MjJkZDg3OC1jYjZmLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8Qx-QJ4UYy7GpSTSEbkhra-Gv73jq903_8mRDBD6ovA=)
---
| Hi there, From the bottom of my heart: Thank you. Because of your generosity, we hit our end-of-month fundraising goal — and that means we’re on track to fully fund and expand our 2026 strategy to retake the U.S. House. I can’t overstate what a big deal this is. I know there are so many causes asking for your support, and it means the world that you chose to stand with the California Democratic Party. With Donald Trump back on the attack against Gov. Newsom and MAGA Republicans desperate to cling to their razor-thin House majority, your support couldn’t come at a better time. When we organize, we win. And because of you, we intend to have the resources we need to organize. **Now the real work begins. We’ll be using these funds to:** → Staff up in key swing districts → Protect and defend our leaders from GOP disinformation → Expand new voter contact programs earlier and more aggressively than ever before You made that possible. And in the weeks and months ahead, we’ll have more updates on how we are utilizing your support. Let’s go flip the House! With gratitude, \- Yvette Martinez Executive Director California Democratic Party
---
| | **[DONATE »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112630903/561111741/-1175830425?refcode=20250801_ENG_45DO_ThankYou&amount=20.24&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzUvMS84MDk5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MjJkZDg3OC1jYjZmLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8Qx-QJ4UYy7GpSTSEbkhra-Gv73jq903_8mRDBD6ovA=) **

Because of your generosity, we hit our end-of-month fundraising goal — and that means we’re on track to fully fund and expand our 2026 strategy to retake the U.S. House. I can’t overstate what a big deal this is. I know there are so many causes asking for your support, and it means the world that you chose to stand with the California Democratic Party. With Donald Trump back on the attack against Gov. Newsom and MAGA Republicans desperate to cling to their razor-thin House majority, your support couldn’t come at a better time. When we organize, we win. And because of you, we intend to have the resources we need to organize. Now the real work begins. We’ll be using these funds to: → Staff up in key swing districts → Protect and defend our leaders from GOP disinformation → Expand new voter contact programs earlier and more aggressively than ever before You made that possible. And in the weeks and months ahead, we’ll have more updates on how we are utilizing your support. Let’s go flip the House! With gratitude, \- Yvette Martinez Executive Director California Democratic Party | | = Our Democratic leaders are working hard to make California a better place to live. # [Interviewing My Retired FBI Dad About Epstein, January 6, and Why He Voted for Trump Three Times -- with Mike Nellis and Bill Nellis](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=4258115&post_id=169897858&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY5ODk3ODU4LCJpYXQiOjE3NTQxNTkxNTIsImV4cCI6MTc1Njc1MTE1MiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTQyNTgxMTUiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.9lM5E7CQBCGShncroEVz74n70P_pdjhsGLO7Kg0UvvU)

---

Hey folks,
I've gone head-to-head with Fox News. I've clashed with Piers Morgan. Now, I'm going toe-to-toe with my own dad--live from the kitchen where I grew up in Omaha, Nebraska. He's a retired FBI agent, a three-time Trump voter, and living proof that politics can be personal.
We disagree on just about everything. But this conversation? It's unfiltered, honest, and maybe exactly what we need more of. Hope you'll give it a watch this weekend.
Here's what we got into:
* **[00:01:36]** We kick things off with the Epstein files: my dad argues against the idea of a secret "list" and explains how redactions work under FOIA law.
* **[00:06:34]** The Bongino-Patel hype train gets a reality check--my dad goes in on what it means to chase clicks versus doing real investigative work.
* **[00:12:01]** I challenge my dad on why he thinks Trump isn't in the Epstein files. We get into what evidence _would_ have led to a prosecution for POTUS.
* **[00:25:01]** We unpack the shift: how my dad went from saying he'd never vote for Trump again after January 6th to pulling the lever for him anyway.
* **[00:33:01]** Things get personal--Trump's legal team name-dropped me in court filings, and we talk about what it would mean if he ever invited me to dinner at the White House.

**If you 've ever had a hard political conversation with someone you love, this one will hit close. These discussions matter. They're uncomfortable, but they're essential--and if you want more of them, become a paid subscriber:**
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..OXMW3nfasQBBBZYmCRSD_D_QQ-ewnS24bRiwLN9QVSE?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=169897858)
With urgency,
--Mike
_Mike Nellis is a Democratic strategist and entrepreneur who has raised over $1 billion for Democratic campaigns and causes. He 's the founder of Authentic.org, an award-winning fundraising and advertising agency, and a former Senior Advisor to Vice President Kamala Harris. This Substack is where he writes with endless urgency about the issues of the day--and how we can save the Democratic Party and our democracy._

With great humility and endless hope for the future of America, I have an announcement to make: **I am running for U.S. Senate, Friend****.** **I 'm Roy Cooper. **I had the honor of serving North Carolina as Attorney General and Governor. [**Now, I am asking for your support to serve our nation as the next Democratic United States Senator from North Carolina. I 'm grateful that No Dem Left Behind ****is already on our team, and if you 're ready to join us, please split a donation between our team and theirs right now.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqtalrKquE0KHW6WQtsxJaGdGbXrXyHQw2gqF6D6Q0PXz66zRU12FUha1FgcfTQzVO61N62wJvs430D5Gm3fzEofr9sCGkPc8jCxi8M3VQskiDbfuyYJzDLErOdjsuRUv3d3NCFq0e6GsUxbKF-tQdRSWEamJhonoDV6aVYbypV5ldyL6SC5KohOh6nGUr8aXVzKTEOsg0c1vCfwGrXCjrsMKZ3orBdMkpFkQXxx5Sf102cmuZMheYVr1kVtILmmMKljh0xmXOzcN_WtXLfCbhq_6n0O7LHxuAuDxN9Ze2406yTUy29qn0EZpVS-FWfc1j8yagTmxsMQi9yufkMq2pLj/4ip/rGKQCuCVQ1SLxqxvymrbLQ/h2/h001.vT5y3FHIG2eGz4iHPAxL9aeeP8529TZHzeWpK3porMQ)

Democrats' best hope of stopping the chaos in Washington is to retake the Senate in 2026, and our race here in NC is set to be the most competitive election next year. We can't take back the Senate without flipping this seat from red to blue -- and The Hill has rated our race the most likely Senate seat to flip. Here's something you may not know about me: **I 've already won some of the most competitive elections here in battleground North Carolina.** I won my elections for Governor in 2016 and 2020 -- the same years that Donald Trump carried the state. NC is one of the last, true purple states, but we've proven together that Democrats _can_ win. We know what we have to do. As Senator, I will fight for our rights to the ballot box, reproductive health care, cleaner air and water, and more. I will work to make health care _more_ affordable and accessible -- not yank it away from those most in need. I'll advocate for better public schools, more clean energy options, and opportunities for good-paying jobs. I will defend our democracy. **I will not back down. I refuse to let Republicans in Washington take this country backward.** [**I have never taken running for office lightly, Friend****, and I know that winning this race won 't be easy. But together, we've won the toughest fights before. We can win now. name: PA Dems
subject: Vance in PA: jokes? bad. bill? worse.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Pennsylvania Democratic Party
body:
| |
---
Peter,

JD Vance rolled into Northeast Pennsylvania to give his best spiel on Trump’s “One Big Beautiful Bill.” There’s nothing beautiful about a plan that cuts $1.2 trillion from Medicaid and food stamps while handing tax breaks to billionaires.

He stood in West Pittston and told people to “go talk to your neighbors” about how great this bill is. Great? For who? Because it sure isn’t for the families who will lose healthcare or the seniors who’ll struggle to put food on the table.

And when Vance shouts “drill, baby, drill,” it’s clear what side he’s on, _and it is not ours_. This isn’t about helping working families. It’s about pushing an agenda that rewards corporate polluters and the wealthy while leaving the rest of us behind.

**We know what’s really happening here:** Republicans like Rob Bresnahan are selling out their communities to keep Trump happy, even when it means hurting the people they’re supposed to represent.

**We’re not sitting back for this.** [If you’re as fed up as we are with this Big Bullsh*t Bill, chip in now to help us call them out and fight back.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112631704/561114599/-1357903355?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_PADM_20250802_FR_Vance_0_3MO_PADems_NA_NA_NA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ3MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5M2ZjODVmNi1jZTZmLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZgI9G-mToY4iMckyKDIJxiV8cn3mzSo62K0ptNCKJqw=) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now.

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: I’m so grateful I can count on you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Because of your support, we came in two dollars over our $33,000 email fundraising goal.
Thank you, thank you, thank you, Peter!
I’m reaching out personally to say thank you to our entire grassroots community for helping us reach our recent end-of-month goal for July. Because of your support, we came in _two dollars_ over our $33,000 email fundraising goal.
From year-round organizing, to the Resistance Lab grassroots trainings, and getting the word out with online ads, everything this campaign does is powered by grassroots supporters like you. I don’t take a _dime_ from corporate PACs, and I don’t seek out billionaires to use as ATMs. Never have, never will.
It’s been an incredibly busy week, and we’re not slowing down this weekend as we help get out the vote for local progressive candidates across King County. Primary day is on Tuesday, and I’m so grateful that in times like this, I can count on supporters like you to come through instead of spending all my time fundraising.
So thank you again, Peter. And if you’d like to help us get a head start on August, please pitch in anything you can at the link below:
[**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250802-1**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250802-1?refcode=em20250802-5302&refcode2=5302_420207_hlDj8h&akid=5302%2E420207%2EhlDj8h)
In solidarity,
Pramila

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20250802-5302-footer&t=1&refcode2=5302_420207_hlDj8h&akid=5302%2E420207%2EhlDj8h)**

clean_body: Because of your support, we came in two dollars over our $33,000 email fundraising goal. Thank you, thank you, thank you, Peter! I’m reaching out personally to say thank you to our entire grassroots community for helping us reach our recent end-of-month goal for July. Because of your support, we came in two dollars over our $33,000 email fundraising goal. From year-round organizing, to the Resistance Lab grassroots trainings, and getting the word out with online ads, everything this campaign does is powered by grassroots supporters like you. I don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, and I don’t seek out billionaires to use as ATMs. Never have, never will. It’s been an incredibly busy week, and we’re not slowing down this weekend as we help get out the vote for local progressive candidates across King County. Primary day is on Tuesday, and I’m so grateful that in times like this, I can count on supporters like you to come through instead of spending all my time fundraising. So thank you again, Peter. And if you’d like to help us get a head start on August, please pitch in anything you can at the link below: In solidarity, Pramila | | Paid for by Pramila for Congress

name: John Hickenlooper
subject: I’m frustrated, folks
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HICKENLOOPER FOR COLORADO
body:
This is my promise to you: In this unprecedented and critical moment, we’re doing everything we can to fight back.

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112632139/561116107/1435897075?refcode=email_080225_promise-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMmJiM2UwZi1kMTZmLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=emGSWSeATozZ_whaT2i1w-BArbc9U_fl2rjrlgklPOk=&emci=6cdfaa8b-f56e-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=12bb3e0f-d16f-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=7280715) Team, we’ve been talking with folks all across Colorado – at town halls, at community events, and as we go about our days – and one thing is abundantly clear: People are just as frustrated as I am, and I bet you are too. **Donald Trump and Republicans in Congress have gutted Medicaid and SNAP, they’re wreaking havoc on our economy with reckless tariff-taxes, and now they’re even decimating critical services like emergency radio broadcasts that so many Coloradans rely on.** Look, the people of Colorado sent me to Washington to stand up for you and deliver real results. **So this is my promise to you: In this unprecedented and critical moment, we’re doing everything we can to fight back.** We’re challenging Trump and extreme Republicans’ radical plans — like their plan to sell off millions of acres of Colorado’s public land — and making sure everyone understands the pain they’re causing. We’ll continue to do everything in our power to block their extreme agenda and defend working families. But we can’t do this alone. **We need to be united and create a massive grassroots effort to call out Trump’s reckless decisions and stop him from inflicting even more damage on our country.** **[So today, I’m coming to you. name: Chris Pappas HQ
subject: Trump’s national sales tax
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Pappas for Senate
body:
We need to fight back against Trump’s agenda.
# [](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/126?t=1&akid=1695%2E582294%2EdYauHh)
Donald Trump just announced _sweeping new tariffs_ that will take effect on August 7th.
Make no mistake: **These tariffs are nothing more than a national sales tax on hardworking families and small businesses.**
Here in New Hampshire, we know what that means: higher costs on everyday goods and local businesses forced to choose between raising prices or shutting their doors.
That’s why Chris has been fighting to shield small businesses from Trump’s tariffs — because _Granite Staters shouldn’t have to pay the price_ for reckless economic policies.
**Chris is running for U.S. Senate to keep standing up for New Hampshire’s small businesses, workers, and families.**
But with Trump’s allies ready to flood the airwaves and try to buy this seat, we need to build a grassroots movement strong enough to fight back.
[**Can you chip in $5 to help elect Chris and fight back against Trump’s agenda?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_20250802_1_tariffs?refcode=em20250802-1695&amount=5&refcode2=1695_582294_dYauHh&akid=1695%2E582294%2EdYauHh)
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_20250802_1_tariffs?amount=5&refcode=em20250802-1695&refcode2=1695_582294_dYauHh&akid=1695%2E582294%2EdYauHh)**
Chris has never backed down from a tough fight — and he won’t start now. But he’s counting on you to power this campaign every step of the way.
Thanks for being in this with us.
—Team Pappas
**New Hampshire is poised to be one of the closest Senate races in the country in 2026. Will you chip in today to help Chris stop the Republicans from flipping the Granite State red and expanding their Senate majority?**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_footer&refcode=em20250802-1?t=2&refcode2=1695_582294_dYauHh&akid=1695%2E582294%2EdYauHh)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:

name: Special Election Update (via DLCC.org)
subject: re: August
disclaimer_text: paid for by DLCC Victory Fund, 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005
body:
State Democrats are facing all-important special elections in key states like Florida, Georgia, and Iowa. Winning these races is vital to protecting and expanding our Democratic power in the states. | | |
---
| |
---|---
In the coming weeks, state Democrats are facing all-important special elections in key states like Florida, Georgia, and Iowa. Winning these races is vital to protecting and expanding our Democratic power in the states: ☀️ Florida Democrats are working to protect two blue seats from MAGA Republicans. 🍑 In Georgia, we could FLIP a key seat in the state Senate. 🌽 In Iowa, we could BREAK the GOP supermajority in the state Senate. [We’re just days away from the next critical special election, and Democrats need all hands on deck. name: David Hogg
subject: We’re not going to sit around and wait for change
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
We launched a $20 million effort to primary out-of-touch Democrats.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20250802-1&t=1&akid=2467%2E587540%2EQdscmO)
Peter,
**Leaders We Deserve recently announced a $20 million effort to primary out-of-touch, ineffective incumbent Democrats to replace them with young leaders who are ready to bring the urgency this moment requires.**
The reason we’re doing this is to get the Democratic Party into fighting shape — because it’s become abundantly clear that the base of our party feels like we are not doing anywhere near enough to stand up to Donald Trump.
**[The fight to elect the next generation of leaders starts today, Peter. Please donate $5 or whatever you can to support our urgent work.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20250802_1_announcement?refcode=em20250802-2467&amount=5&refcode2=2467_587540_QdscmO&akid=2467%2E587540%2EQdscmO)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20250802_1_announcement?amount=5&refcode=em20250802-2467&refcode2=2467_587540_QdscmO&akid=2467%2E587540%2EQdscmO)**
We know that not everyone will agree with this decision — especially the D.C. consultants who’ve gotten rich by doing things the old way.
But we know people like you understand we have no other choice. Because we are done waiting.
Waiting for more of our students to get gunned down in math class.
Waiting for our planet to burn up before our eyes.
Waiting for someone else to save us — because nobody will save us, _except_ us.
**We are done waiting for out-of-touch, ineffective politicians to step aside.**
When the same politicians keep failing us year after year, it’s time for us to stand up and say get on board or get out of our way. Because if we’re being honest, _waiting_ looks a lot like _doing nothing._ And you and I both know we cannot afford to do nothing.
**[Donate $5 right now to elect the young, progressive leaders we deserve. When bold Gen Z and Millennial leaders step up to run for office, Leaders We Deserve will be right there to help them win because of generous supporters like you.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20250802_1_announcement?refcode=em20250802-2467&amount=5&refcode2=2467_587540_QdscmO&akid=2467%2E587540%2EQdscmO)**
Thank you for being a part of this,
David Hogg
Leaders We Deserve
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-footer?refcode=em20250802-1&t=2&refcode2=2467_587540_QdscmO&akid=2467%2E587540%2EQdscmO)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=2467%2E587540%2EQdscmO)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=2467%2E587540%2EQdscmO)

To give by check:
Leaders We Deserve
611 Pennsylvania Ave SE
#192
Washington, DC 20003
Email us: [info@leaderswedeserve.com](mailto:info@leaderswedeserve.com)
PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE.COM, NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE

name: Don Jr.
subject: We’re asking nicely

name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: We're in the homestretch now, and you deserve to know exactly what we're doing to flip Virginia blue.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO
body:
We have to make each day left in this campaign count.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250802_1_spanberger?amount=5&refcode=em20250802-3563&refcode2=3563_400544_eg8CK7&akid=3563%2E400544%2Eeg8CK7)
We have fewer than 100 days to go until Election Day!
I'm the only Democrat in the country who can flip a Governor's seat blue, and we're in the homestretch now. **[Before I lay out all we're doing to win the biggest race of 2025, will you consider splitting a contribution between my campaign and Deb Haaland to power our work?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250802_1_spanberger?amount=5&refcode=em20250802-3563&refcode2=3563_400544_eg8CK7&akid=3563%2E400544%2Eeg8CK7)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250802_1_spanberger?amount=5&refcode=em20250802-3563&refcode2=3563_400544_eg8CK7&akid=3563%2E400544%2Eeg8CK7)**
Since launching this campaign, I have visited communities all across the Commonwealth — from Farmville to Fairfax, Richmond to Roanoke — to hear directly from Virginians about the challenges they face.
_And that's informed what we communicate and how we spend our resources._
My opponent, Winsome Earle-Sears, has shown she's in lockstep with Trump's agenda. She downplayed the White House laying off thousands of Virginia workers by saying, "don't fret." And she boasted that Trump's disastrous tax law does "so many great things." _We're talking about a policy that cuts $1 trillion from Medicaid and slashes resources for public schools here._
I've given voters my word: **As Governor, I will always put them first and stand up to the chaos coming out of Washington.**
We can't be defined by what we're against — we must focus on moving our Commonwealth forward.
That's why I have announced my plans to grow our workforce and raise the minimum wage, to reduce the cost of childcare, and to make life more affordable from healthcare and prescription drugs to housing costs and utility bills.
With the days left in this campaign, I'm counting on a surge of grassroots donations to:
✅ Visit every corner of Virginia.
✅ Reach undecided voters with ads and counter the GOP's attacks.
✅ Build the largest organizing operation our Commonwealth's ever seen.
It's a major undertaking, but I know this team is not intimidated by hard work. No matter what the National Republicans throw at us, we'll be ready to respond.
**[Everything depends on us raising what we need from grassroots donors. So, I'm asking: will you pitch in $5 or more to my campaign and Deb Haaland to help us win on November 4th and in the years ahead?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250802_1_spanberger?amount=5&refcode=em20250802-3563&refcode2=3563_400544_eg8CK7&akid=3563%2E400544%2Eeg8CK7)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250802_1_spanberger?amount=5&refcode=em20250802-3563&refcode2=3563_400544_eg8CK7&akid=3563%2E400544%2Eeg8CK7)**
I'm grateful to have you on my team,
Abigail Spanberger
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_footer?refcode=em20250802-1&t=1&refcode2=3563_400544_eg8CK7&akid=3563%2E400544%2Eeg8CK7)**
* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails-dh/?t=2&akid=3563%2E400544%2Eeg8CK7)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/update-your-information-dh/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.debhaaland.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-dh/?t=3&akid=3563%2E400544%2Eeg8CK7)

Email us: [info@debhaaland.com](mailto:info@debhaaland.com)
PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO

name: Katie Porter
subject: Breaking: Kamala Harris just announced that she is NOT running for governor of California
disclaimer_text: Paid for by State Democrats Committee (StateDemocrats
body:
No BS, this announcement shifts the dynamics of our race.
#
Peter, breaking news in our race:
**Kamala Harris just announced that she is NOT running for governor of California.**
**[That means we’re the clear frontrunner among Democrats in this race. But I need your help to win. This is one of the most important days of this race and everyone will be looking to see how much we raise today. Can you split a donation of $15 or whatever makes sense for you between my campaign today and State Democrats Committee?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/93177?refcode=em20250802-9213&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9213%2E614464%2EgVIH5h)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Katie Porter for Governor and State Democrats Committee will process instantly:
[Contribute $5](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/93178?refcode=em20250802-9213&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=5&t=2&akid=9213%2E614464%2EgVIH5h) [Contribute $15](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/93178?refcode=em20250802-9213&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=15&t=3&akid=9213%2E614464%2EgVIH5h) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/93178?refcode=em20250802-9213&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=4&akid=9213%2E614464%2EgVIH5h) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/93178?refcode=em20250802-9213&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=5&akid=9213%2E614464%2EgVIH5h) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/93178?refcode=em20250802-9213&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=6&akid=9213%2E614464%2EgVIH5h) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/93178?refcode=em20250802-9213&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=7&akid=9213%2E614464%2EgVIH5h) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/93177?refcode=em20250802-9213&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=8&akid=9213%2E614464%2EgVIH5h)
---
I worked with Kamala in the aftermath of the foreclosure crisis to keep Californians in their homes. I’m grateful for her dedicated years of service to our state, and I’m sure she will continue to make a difference in whatever she does next.
No BS, this announcement shifts the dynamics of our race, and the stakes just got a whole lot higher. This campaign has got what it takes to win, but we’re going to need the support of every single Porter Supporter reading this email.
**Recent polling shows our campaign just 1 point behind right-wing Fox News host Steve Hilton.** This race is within reach—if grassroots supporters like you step up right now to give us the momentum we need in this key moment of the race.
**[Can you rush a split $15 donation to our campaign and State Democrats Committee today to help elect me as California’s next Governor and build a better future for California?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/93177?refcode=em20250802-9213&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=9&akid=9213%2E614464%2EgVIH5h)**
**[DONATE](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/93177?refcode=em20250802-9213&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=10&akid=9213%2E614464%2EgVIH5h)**
More soon,
Katie Porter

name: Katie Porter
subject: This is the power of our movement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=39964%2E3422442%2E2Gg6_7)
Dear Peter,
On Wednesday, our team wrote to you about a big shake up in our race: Vice President Kamala Harris made it official that she is **not** running for California Governor.
Immediately, Porter Supporters jumped into action. Thanks to folks like you, we raised over $250,000 in the first 36 hours after Kamala’s announcement—and without a single dime from corporations or lobbyists.
Our campaign is strong, and it’s only getting stronger. We’re in a solid position to advance out of the primary next June and win the whole thing in November. **And that means Katie Porter will be California’s next Governor.**
But we can’t take anything for granted. A sizable number of voters are still undecided, so anything could happen.
We can’t let up, Peter. Now’s the time to keep up the momentum and double down on the things we’ve been doing that we know are working: meeting Californians where they are, listening to their concerns, and bringing everyone together to work on solutions.
**[If you can, I’d be so grateful if you would chip in $5 or whatever you can spare, to help us show the pundits and our opponents that our strong fundraising isn’t a blip; it’s a movement.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250802_1_ak?refcode=em20250802-39964&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=39964_3422442_2Gg6_7&akid=39964%2E3422442%2E2Gg6_7)**
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250802_1_ak?refcode=em20250802-39964&refcode2=39964_3422442_2Gg6_7&akid=39964%2E3422442%2E2Gg6_7)
Thanks for being with us,
Katie

Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4g-em-footer?refcode=em20250802-39964&amounts=&t=3&refcode2=39964_3422442_2Gg6_7&akid=39964%2E3422442%2E2Gg6_7)**
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp4g-emails?source=39964&t=4&akid=39964%2E3422442%2E2Gg6_7)

* [Unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp4g-unsubscribe?source=39964&t=5&akid=39964%2E3422442%2E2Gg6_7)
