FFPC #1479597
clean_body: Dear Peter, On Wednesday, our team wrote to you about a big shake up in our race: Vice President Kamala Harris made it official that she is not running for California Governor. Immediately, Porter Supporters jumped into action. Thanks to folks like you, we raised over $250,000 in the first 36 hours after Kamala’s announcement—and without a single dime from corporations or lobbyists. Our campaign is strong, and it’s only getting stronger. We’re in a solid position to advance out of the primary next June and win the whole thing in November. And that means Katie Porter will be California’s next Governor. But we can’t take anything for granted. A sizable number of voters are still undecided, so anything could happen. We can’t let up, Peter. Now’s the time to keep up the momentum and double down on the things we’ve been doing that we know are working: meeting Californians where they are, listening to their concerns, and bringing everyone together to work on solutions. Thanks for being with us, Katie Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change.

subject: The summer we crushed our goal

body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112633524/561121378/-975735282?refcode=em_logoheader&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZTg1MWQwYi1kODZmLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2l0HLoZYbCbaqWqVcMv6pz-M48iZ7Eh-ROZr_EF21_g=)

Peter,

I’ve always thought of August as the Sunday of summer — still full of warmth and energy, but with fall catching up fast.

Usually, this is the part where campaigns talk about a “summer slump” and ask for help getting back on track because July was really slow. _But I'm so excited to tell you something different._

**My team just ran the numbers, and we crushed our July fundraising goal. Thanks to you, we’re not just keeping pace — we’re beating expectations. And I couldn’t be more grateful.**

Every time I hit the campaign trail, I hear the same thing: Iowans are ready for something new. They’re as ready as I am to retire Mariannette Miller-Meeks, yes, but more than that, they’re ready for leadership that puts families back at the center of our priorities. They’re ready to have their voices heard in Washington again.

I’m so proud of the grassroots momentum we’re building together. And with August already starting we can’t afford to slow down. So here’s my ask:

subject: We beat the dreaded "summer slump"

body:
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112633623/561121786/693975070?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMmEwOGU1Mi1kODZmLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=faR-h9ZK5vMmCrT0O68HXz2cJeubknxKk2cWUCRtzk0=&emci=805fb529-f46e-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=22a08e52-d86f-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=15820338)

Peter,

Across the country, campaigns have been talking about the dreaded summer slump, _that time when fundraising slows down and momentum fades after Election Day._

But thanks to this team, **we beat it.**

So many of you stepped up at the very last minute, right when we needed you most. You showed me— _and everyone watching_ —that you’re paying attention, you’re invested, and you’re ready to help this campaign grow stronger every day.

As we look ahead to August, I’m proud to say we’re closing out July in a great spot. But the road ahead won’t be easy. We’re running a grassroots campaign in one of the most competitive purple districts in the country, and with what we’re seeing from Republican leadership right now, we simply can’t afford to lose this seat.

Look Peter, I know that as long as I have you fighting by my side—especially in an off-year—we can keep this momentum going and keep WA-08 blue. [**Can I count on you to chip in whatever you can to help my team and me get ahead in August? >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112633625/561121788/-1487867385?refcode=em25_250802_eomty_fndd_gq_act___KS_ettx&utm_campaign=em25_250802_eomty_fndd_gq_act___KS_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=22a08e52-d86f-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMmEwOGU1Mi1kODZmLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=faR-h9ZK5vMmCrT0O68HXz2cJeubknxKk2cWUCRtzk0=) [CHIP IN >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112633626/561121790/-1487867385?refcode=em25_250802_eomty_fndd_gq_act___KS_ettx&utm_campaign=em25_250802_eomty_fndd_gq_act___KS_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=22a08e52-d86f-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMmEwOGU1Mi1kODZmLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=faR-h9ZK5vMmCrT0O68HXz2cJeubknxKk2cWUCRtzk0=) With gratitude,

name: Nellie Pou
subject: Thank you
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP61/1/115406/images/pout-header-3.png]

Friend,

We did it.

We met our July fundraising goal, and it’s because of grassroots supporters like you. I mean that sincerely: I would never be where I am today without the people who’ve had my back every step of the way.

From hitting fundraising deadlines to winning tough elections, I’ve always been able to count on you. And now, I want you to be able to count on me in Congress.

But House Republicans have gone on vacation, instead of doing their jobs, because they’re too scared to cross Trump.

Not me. Here’s what I did in July:

http://secure.actblue.com/donate/pou_em?refcode=250802_np_ty_p1 [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/pou_em?refcode=250802_np_ty_p1]

Now we’re heading into August, and we need to keep this campaign moving forward. MAGA dark money hasn’t stopped, and neither will I.

Will you chip in today to help power what’s next? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/pou_em?refcode=250802_np_ty_l1]

DONATE NOW [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/pou_em?refcode=250802_np_ty_l1]Thank you again for standing with me.

— Nellie
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP61/1/115406/images/pou_headshot_crop.jpg]

About Nellie Pou
Nellie Pou is the first Latina to represent New Jersey in Congress, and will be a target for the NRCC in 2026. As a mother and grandmother, Nellie knows what New Jersey families are facing and will continue to bring down costs while creating good-paying jobs. Nellie has dedicated her entire life to the community that raised her, and in Congress she will do the same.

clean_body: [] Friend, We did it. We met our July fundraising goal, and it’s because of grassroots supporters like you. I mean that sincerely: I would never be where I am today without the people who’ve had my back every step of the way. From hitting fundraising deadlines to winning tough elections, I’ve always been able to count on you. And now, I want you to be able to count on me in Congress. But House Republicans have gone on vacation, instead of doing their jobs, because they’re too scared to cross Trump. Not me. Here’s what I did in July: [] Now we’re heading into August, and we need to keep this campaign moving forward. MAGA dark money hasn’t stopped, and neither will I. Will you chip in today to help power what’s next? [] DONATE NOW [ you again for standing with me. — Nellie [] About Nellie Pou Nellie Pou is the first Latina to represent New Jersey in Congress, and will be a target for the NRCC in 2026. As a mother and grandmother, Nellie knows what New Jersey families are facing and will continue to bring down costs while creating good-paying jobs. Nellie has dedicated her entire life to the community that raised her, and in Congress she will do the same. name: Democracy on the Line Action Team
subject: Thank you, Governor Newsom.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democracy on the Line PAC
body:
Governor Newsom has become one of the strongest voices pushing back against Trump’s dangerous, authoritarian agenda.

And now Trump is targeting him for it.

That’s why we’re sending a thank-you letter to Governor Newsom tomorrow at 9 a.m. sharp to say: Democrats across the country have his back.

But Peter: We only have [48] open signature spots left for grassroots Democrats before the midnight deadline. Will you add your name now to show you stand with Newsom and against Trump’s threats? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mc_dotl_q32025_ltr_newsom?amount=7]

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mc_dotl_q32025_ltr_newsom?amount=10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mc_dotl_q32025_ltr_newsom?amount=10]SIGN THE “THANK YOU GAVIN NEWSOM” LETTER NOW » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mc_dotl_q32025_ltr_newsom?amount=7]

TO: Gov. Gavin Newsom
FROM: A loyal Democrat
RE: I stand with you, Governor Newsom
Dear Governor Newsom,
Thank you for refusing to be intimidated.
When Donald Trump called for your arrest after you stood up to his attacks on California and its people, it was a blatant act of political retaliation and a chilling sign of how far he’s willing to go to silence those who resist his authoritarian ambitions.
That kind of courage matters now more than ever.
As Trump and his MAGA allies double down on their dangerous agenda, we need more leaders like you, willing to meet this moment with boldness, integrity, and action.
So I’m signing this letter to say: I stand with you and I stand with democracy.
And I’m chipping in $7 to Democracy on the Line to help elect more Democrats like you and defeat the rising tide of extremism before it’s too late. » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mc_dotl_q32025_ltr_newsom?amount=7]
SIGN THE “THANK YOU GAVIN NEWSOM” LETTER NOW » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mc_dotl_q32025_ltr_newsom?amount=7]
Keep going, Governor. Millions of us are with you, and we’re ready to fight back.
Sincerely,
Peter

– Democracy on the Line

--------------------------------------
Paid for by Democracy on the Line PAC
(www.democracyonthelinepac.com)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

122 C Street NW, Suite 360, Washington, DC 20001

Peter Texas has a shameful legacy of manipulating maps, restricting access to the ballot box, and undermining democracy. And now, it’s taking an extreme MAGA agenda to new lows. At the direction of Donald Trump, lawmakers are proposing an even more egregious gerrymander in an effort to help steal the 2026 midterms. As Rep. Greg Casar put it, their map would “rip the Voting Rights Act to shreds.” **The NDRC’s Map of Shame is our latest grassroots undertaking exposing Republicans for their attempts to dismantle fair representation and dilute voting power just because they can’t win without cheating.** [**Keep reading below to get a look at just some of Texas’s most appalling offenses — then make a donation to power our work exposing these anti-democracy schemes.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/112633952/561123037/1256196342?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_LiftNoteMapofShameTexas_email_20250802-NDRC-Tier1-LiftNoteMapofShameTexas_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250802-NDRC-Tier1-LiftNoteMapofShameTexas_&utm_campaign=LiftNoteMapofShameTexas&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjI2M2FmNTQxLWRiNmYtZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=RDU9C4idZm4qwb6p4khCd84Kgr53HZ1csJxaQEJU8QU=)

Date: Wednesday, July 30, 2025
From: Team NDRC Subject:
BREAKING: New proposed TX map is out! Big news, Peter: The new proposed Texas congressional map was just released this morning. At first glance, it appears Republicans have taken an already gerrymandered map and made it far, far more extreme. Right now, our mapping team is diving in, and we'll be in touch with their analysis soon. But let's back up and talk about why we’re here — and Texas’s anti-democracy record and its current, already unfair map. Republicans across the country have launched a coordinated effort to manipulate maps in order to cling to power and undermine the will of the people. They know their policies are unpopular and that they cannot win fairly — so they’re willing to cheat instead. The good news is, we are not powerless against these cynical power grabs. The NDRC is fighting back. Right now, we’re working to hold these anti-democracy Republicans accountable by exposing the worst of the worst gerrymanders — we’re calling it **The NDRC Map of Shame**. **Today let's talk about none other than the Texas congressional map championed by Governor Greg Abbott. It’s already a blatant violation of the Voting Rights Act and as you read this, Republicans in the state are trying to use a special legislative session to gerrymander it even further and steal more Republican seats.**[**Before we go any further, this is a fight happening right now that needs your support — can you make a donation to help power our work exposing these open threats to democracy?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/112633953/561123038/1256196342?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_LiftNoteMapofShameTexas_email_20250802-NDRC-Tier1-LiftNoteMapofShameTexas_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250802-NDRC-Tier1-LiftNoteMapofShameTexas_&utm_campaign=LiftNoteMapofShameTexas&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjI2M2FmNTQxLWRiNmYtZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=RDU9C4idZm4qwb6p4khCd84Kgr53HZ1csJxaQEJU8QU=) | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

Greg Abbott has built a legacy of gerrymandering and voter suppression, in service of an extreme anti-democracy agenda. Let’s dive in:
**Abbott Criminalized Ballot Collecting**
In one of his most anti-democracy acts as governor, Abbott signed Senate Bill 1. This anti-voting legislation criminalizes ballot collection — delivering vote-by-mail ballots on behalf of voters — which many nonprofit organizations do to assist the elderly, people with disabilities, and those who do not speak English.
**Abbott Canceled 1 Million Voter Registrations**
Just last year, Abbott announced the state had removed about 1 million people from its voter rolls — a clear attempt to undermine free and fair elections. He claimed the purge was to “protect” our elections, but both Texas and federal law already required regular updates of voter roll lists.
**Abbott is Championing Trump’s Plan to Steal Texas**
Just this month, Abbott called a special session under the guise of responding to the tragic floods that hit the state. The top priority is delivering on Trump’s demand to redraw the Texas congressional map to give Republicans more seats. Keep in mind that the Texas map is already deeply gerrymandered — so much that voters have spent years challenging it in court. Trump’s policies are so unpopular that Republicans believe they’ll lose the House in the midterms without cheating even harder.
**Greg Abbott is overseeing a direct attack on fair representation and our democracy. The NDRC is working to stop them.**
[**This is just a preview of the anti-democracy schemes we’re exposing through our Map of Shame. If you’re just as angry as we are about the attacks on fair maps and free and fair elections, make a donation to help power this work to fight back.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/112633961/561123046/1256196342?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_LiftNoteMapofShameTexas_email_20250802-NDRC-Tier1-LiftNoteMapofShameTexas_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250802-NDRC-Tier1-LiftNoteMapofShameTexas_&utm_campaign=LiftNoteMapofShameTexas&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjI2M2FmNTQxLWRiNmYtZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=RDU9C4idZm4qwb6p4khCd84Kgr53HZ1csJxaQEJU8QU=)

clean_body: Make a donation to help power our work exposing these open threats to democracy | Peter Texas has a shameful legacy of manipulating maps, restricting access to the ballot box, and undermining democracy. And now, it’s taking an extreme MAGA agenda to new lows. At the direction of Donald Trump, lawmakers are proposing an even more egregious gerrymander in an effort to help steal the 2026 midterms. As Rep. Greg Casar put it, their map would “rip the Voting Rights Act to shreds.” The NDRC’s Map of Shame is our latest grassroots undertaking exposing Republicans for their attempts to dismantle fair representation and dilute voting power just because they can’t win without cheating. = \----------Forwarded Message---------- Date: Wednesday, July 30, 2025 From: Team NDRC Subject: BREAKING: New proposed TX map is out! Big news, Peter: The new proposed Texas congressional map was just released this morning. At first glance, it appears Republicans have taken an already gerrymandered map and made it far, far more extreme. Right now, our mapping team is diving in, and we'll be in touch with their analysis soon. But let's back up and talk about why we’re here — and Texas’s anti-democracy record and its current, already unfair map. Republicans across the country have launched a coordinated effort to manipulate maps in order to cling to power and undermine the will of the people. They know their policies are unpopular and that they cannot win fairly — so they’re willing to cheat instead. The good news is, we are not powerless against these cynical power grabs. The NDRC is fighting back. Right now, we’re working to hold these anti-democracy Republicans accountable by exposing the worst of the worst gerrymanders — we’re calling it The NDRC Map of Shame. Today let's talk about none other than the Texas congressional map championed by Governor Greg Abbott. It’s already a blatant violation of the Voting Rights Act and as you read this, Republicans in the state are trying to use a special legislative session to gerrymander it even further and steal more Republican seats.= | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = = Greg Abbott has built a legacy of gerrymandering and voter suppression, in service of an extreme anti-democracy agenda. Let’s dive in: Abbott Criminalized Ballot Collecting In one of his most anti-democracy acts as governor, Abbott signed Senate Bill 1. This anti-voting legislation criminalizes ballot collection — delivering vote-by-mail ballots on behalf of voters — which many nonprofit organizations do to assist the elderly, people with disabilities, and those who do not speak English. Abbott Canceled 1 Million Voter Registrations Just last year, Abbott announced the state had removed about 1 million people from its voter rolls — a clear attempt to undermine free and fair elections. He claimed the purge was to “protect” our elections, but both Texas and federal law already required regular updates of voter roll lists. Abbott is Championing Trump’s Plan to Steal Texas Just this month, Abbott called a special session under the guise of responding to the tragic floods that hit the state. The top priority is delivering on Trump’s demand to redraw the Texas congressional map to give Republicans more seats. Keep in mind that the Texas map is already deeply gerrymandered — so much that voters have spent years challenging it in court. Trump’s policies are so unpopular that Republicans believe they’ll lose the House in the midterms without cheating even harder. Greg Abbott is overseeing a direct attack on fair representation and our democracy. The NDRC is working to stop them. = Thanks so much, The NDRC Team = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. Our victories have been made possible by our strong community of grassroots supporters. = If you want to receive periodic updates from the NDRC on our fight for fair maps, text MAPS to 36787. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. We know we send a lot of emails, but we think it's important to keep you updated with the latest information on Republican gerrymandering and voter suppression and how we're fighting back -- regardless of whether you choose to donate. = to make a donation. Every dollar you give will go toward our fight to end gerrymandering and voter suppression. | | Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President. | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- National Democratic Redistricting Committee 712 H St NE, #25 Washington, DC 20002 United States if you'd like to receive fewer emails from the NDRC.

This week was a roller coaster. It began with me learning that 300+ paid subscribers cancelled their subscriptions to Let's Address This--many citing my advocacy for Gaza as the reason. That followed with an overwhelming level of support, catapulting _Let 's Address This_ to #1 Nationally in U.S. Politics. ## **This Week 's Articles & Updates**

2. [Why Americans Must Speak Out Against Israel's Genocide in Gaza](https://substack.com/redirect/6de73120-5e61-46ed-bbdd-145eae9b80e9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
3. [The Qasim Rashid Show Episode 181](https://substack.com/redirect/31db6739-a4b1-4a3a-b823-56ab4315cc17?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) (With Special Guest [Liz Plank](https://open.substack.com/users/14317462-liz-plank?utm_source=mentions))
4. [How YOU Made ](https://substack.com/redirect/2ca2c9ab-faaf-4d73-ac4d-581ce2199c09?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_[Let's Address This ](https://substack.com/redirect/2ca2c9ab-faaf-4d73-ac4d-581ce2199c09?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_[the #1 Newsletter in U.S. Politics](https://substack.com/redirect/2ca2c9ab-faaf-4d73-ac4d-581ce2199c09?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

If this human rights stuff doesn't work out for me I'm going to quit and open a dinosaur themed Mexican and Thai fusion restaurant.

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/b7d854f8-d542-451d-a490-6121cdc7c216?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Image from Rapid Response 47 on X
**By Shaun Rieley, Ph.D.**
Yesterday, the White House **[announced](https://substack.com/redirect/3f1043cb-9638-4bb7-ad83-cc45e2168eab?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** that it will undertake a major renovation to the White House. The plans entail adding a 90,000 square foot ballroom to the East Wing that will be able to host 650 guests. This project will dramatically expand the hosting capacity of the of the White House, which according to the press release currently only has space large enough for 200 and will be funded by private dollars (including a substantial amount contributed by President Trump himself). This **[is far from the first](https://substack.com/redirect/fc86af87-08e7-4f43-91c8-7050c39f6c63?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** renovation that a president has undertaken, and far from the most extensive (the White House Historical Society **[reports](https://substack.com/redirect/fc86af87-08e7-4f43-91c8-7050c39f6c63?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** that Harry S Truman's "completely gutted and rebuilt the White House from the inside") though it will be the first in the better part of a century.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..ZIT3cIJR3L6BShHlz9qO_YrB6uW2Em68rYmVPNToFoM?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=169941635)
Importantly, it will be more than just functional. It will be _beautiful._
First inhabited by President John Adams (before it was fully complete), the White House was designed by Irish-born architect James Hoban who modeled it on Irish country houses, especially Dublin's neo-Classical **[Leinster House](https://substack.com/redirect/f529fb33-39db-4f43-bfa0-12a6361d3639?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** , which is now the seat of Ireland's parliament.
After the Capitol Building, the White House is perhaps the most recognizable built symbol of the American Republic. And, like the Capitol, it is an outstanding example of neo-Classical architecture in the Federal City, and a pre-eminent symbol of the Classical and Christian heritage of the American Republic.
**A message from our sponsor (piece continues below)**
* * *
**[Together with Natural Health Response](https://substack.com/redirect/832110b8-12d4-4959-b533-19718b9d7dc7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
# [RFK Jr Drops a BOMBSHELL On Pro-VAX Agenda](https://substack.com/redirect/832110b8-12d4-4959-b533-19718b9d7dc7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/f24ac24c-f7fc-4768-b17a-bd808b4d03c4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Dear Reader,
He did it. RFK Jr just GUTTED the CDC's biased vaccine panel and replaced them ALL.
This was the very same group that brought you the Covid vaccine in 2020. And Pro-VAX liberals are FURIOUS.
They baselessly attacked RFK Jr all day during a recent public senate hearing. But Kennedy did **NOT** back down.
He knows they're simply trying to stop what's coming.
RFK Jr is about to go much further and EXPOSE **[the shocking truth](https://substack.com/redirect/f24ac24c-f7fc-4768-b17a-bd808b4d03c4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** behind some of America's worst vaccines.
**[THIS](https://substack.com/redirect/832110b8-12d4-4959-b533-19718b9d7dc7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** goes beyond Covid... and could cost Big Pharma Billions in profits. Which is why they'll likely stop at nothing to silence him. And with their political reach and power, they may just succeed.
That's exactly why we're not waiting around. We're revealing everything today in **[this video](https://substack.com/redirect/f24ac24c-f7fc-4768-b17a-bd808b4d03c4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**.
[Click To Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/832110b8-12d4-4959-b533-19718b9d7dc7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
P.S. Now that RFK Jr has declared war on dangerous vaccines, you can expect the attacks on him to increase. Please watch **[the truth](https://substack.com/redirect/f24ac24c-f7fc-4768-b17a-bd808b4d03c4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** he's trying to expose in **[this free video](https://substack.com/redirect/f24ac24c-f7fc-4768-b17a-bd808b4d03c4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** before it's too late... it may just save your life.
* * *
**(Piece continues)**
The American founders knew the importance of beauty in the built environment. Having been **[classically educated](https://substack.com/redirect/4d21c6d6-5a5b-4a19-b135-0ef67b7d8a5c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** and steeped in **[Biblical learning](https://substack.com/redirect/5661e62f-abd7-4673-954b-d2ab0107782c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** , they understood well the intrinsic connection between **[truth, goodness, and beauty](https://substack.com/redirect/7316d089-750d-42c5-8dc1-7788915e55eb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**. The neo-Classical architecture preferred and prescribed by the American founders stands as a stirring sign of their belief in the need for order, stability, and beauty to sustain the newly-formed American polity.
Drawing on the political theory of classical thinkers such as Aristotle, Cicero, and Polybius the **[founders created a constitution](https://substack.com/redirect/3e28689d-62d8-4612-8061-664d01ae4e6d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** that blended elements of the three major regime types, democracy, aristocracy, and monarchy.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/b96035ef-5f02-476f-ae5b-240bbde98785?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/a187700c-ae15-4da6-b70d-aaf38c39bdeb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Images from Rapid Response 47 on X
While Congress represents the democratic (House of Representatives) and aristocratic (Senate) aspects of the Constitution, the White House represents the _monarchical_ element. In this sense--though fairly modest as "**[palaces](https://substack.com/redirect/509ff1d0-6d8c-4773-92bf-076b7ffccd80?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** " go--it is fitting that the White House convey a sense of grandeur. The addition of a grand classical ballroom, designed by one of America's premier classical architects, **[James McCrery](https://substack.com/redirect/7b96fa51-7399-46f2-8fbd-d04e262afa0c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** is particularly appropriate. McCrery is noted for heading up his own firm, **[McCrery Architects](https://substack.com/redirect/c2f7b2f7-67a1-40c6-9fc6-2c4eab0f2654?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** , as well as serving as a tenured professor of architecture at the **[Catholic University of America](https://substack.com/redirect/1433152d-6253-45f1-b3ba-b87f8b1c3727?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** where he heads up the classical architecture program. McCrery, it is worth noting, is a classicist who nevertheless advocates for a **[distinctly](https://substack.com/redirect/b3cc288b-5144-4a8f-aac5-ac2d3e8285d8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** _**[American](https://substack.com/redirect/b3cc288b-5144-4a8f-aac5-ac2d3e8285d8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_**[form of classicism](https://substack.com/redirect/b3cc288b-5144-4a8f-aac5-ac2d3e8285d8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** , rooted in our particular traditions and history.
Americans have, for too long, been told that the days of greatness are in the past, that we can no longer build great and beautiful things. And Americans have, for too long, been subjected to architecture--including and especially public architecture--that oscillates between **[uninspired](https://substack.com/redirect/0470b645-20d8-45b1-8dba-c7eba3e49d3f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** and **[downright ugly](https://substack.com/redirect/29c92622-a016-451c-977a-7e44626c698b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).**
It is time for America to reclaim our heritage as builders of great and beautiful things. There is no better place to start than with the People's House.
* * *
### The Author:
Shaun Rieley, Ph.D. | Director of Educational Programs & Teaching Fellow
Hillsdale College | Washington, D.C. Campus

Thank you, Peter.

**With your continued support in July, we hit our online fundraising goal – but we cannot afford to slow down our efforts, especially in the summer in a non-election year.**

My opponent Young Kim no longer represents the best interests of Orange County and the Inland Empire. Instead, **she sold out to the MAGA agenda and became a rubber stamp for the destruction of our democracy**. She showed her true colors when she voted to gut Medicaid by billions of dollars, despite assuring CA-40 that she would never vote for health care cuts.

There is good news: Young Kim has lost a congressional race before, and it was in a landscape that looked a lot like this one in a Trump midterm. We have a fighting chance to defeat her and flip the House blue, but we must keep our strong momentum.

I am connecting with voters across the district during meet and greets and town halls, but unlike others in this race, I cannot self-fund my campaign or rely on big checks to raise what we need to win.

**[I am counting on support from folks like you, chipping in a few dollars at a time, to rise above the noise in this race.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112634993/561126895/1631137775?refcode=em-8.2.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODczMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZjU2NTJjNy1lMzZmLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dlAxkDnZ-MrDpi5z49dPbwWkoRitdPk_2g2IdYJYN7w=)**

More to come,

Christina

clean_body: | = Thank you, Peter. With your continued support in July, we hit our online fundraising goal – but we cannot afford to slow down our efforts, especially in the summer in a non-election year. My opponent Young Kim no longer represents the best interests of Orange County and the Inland Empire. Instead, she sold out to the MAGA agenda and became a rubber stamp for the destruction of our democracy. She showed her true colors when she voted to gut Medicaid by billions of dollars, despite assuring CA-40 that she would never vote for health care cuts. There is good news: Young Kim has lost a congressional race before, and it was in a landscape that looked a lot like this one in a Trump midterm. We have a fighting chance to defeat her and flip the House blue, but we must keep our strong momentum. I am connecting with voters across the district during meet and greets and town halls, but unlike others in this race, I cannot self-fund my campaign or rely on big checks to raise what we need to win. = More to come, Christina | | = | Christina Gagnier is a community leader, small business owner, former school board member, and privacy advocate defending Orange County and Inland Empire families. To support Christina's campaign = To volunteer on Christina's campaign, To receive fewer emails from Christina Gagnier's campaign, sign up for our option here. We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . Thank you for supporting Christina Gagnier for Congress. Christina Gagnier for Congress 14071 Peyton Drive #1323 Chino Hills, CA 91709 United States

body:
[https://secure.winred.com/mike-collins/20250727_flex8530_collins_w_html_trump123?utm_campaign=034000000084020&utm_medium=email&xuno=464c455838353330&recurring=true&amount=25&utm_term=lrm-active]

_DEAR PATRIOT,_

__

__

__

My pop always told me to say what I mean and mean what I say.

SO PARDON ME FOR BEING SO BLUNT WITH YOU:

_I NEED YOU TO RUSH OVER $25 RIGHT NOW. I’VE OFFICIALLY LAUNCHED MY
CAMPAIGN TO DEFEAT DEMOCRAT JON OSSOFF IN GEORGIA AND FIGHT FOR
PRESIDENT TRUMP’S AGENDA IN THE SENATE. __THE ATTACKS AGAINST ME ARE
ALREADY FLYING IN AT ALARMING RATES, AND I’M AT RISK OF LOSING_
[https://secure.winred.com/mike-collins/20250727_flex8530_collins_w_html_trump123?utm_campaign=034000000084020&utm_medium=email&xuno=464c455838353330&recurring=true&amount=25&utm_term=lrm-active]_.
___

__

__

__

BUT BEFORE RUSHING OVER YOUR DONATION, FRIEND, PLEASE ALLOW ME TO TELL
YOU:

__

__

__

_1) Who I am_____

__

_2) Why I’m running for U.S. Senate; and_____

__

__

__

_3) How YOU can help defeat Democrat Jon Ossoff and deliver a MASSIVE
WIN for the America First movement_

__

__

__

There’s no time to waste.

Let’s jump right into it.

SUPPORT MY SENATE CAMPAIGN >>>
[https://secure.winred.com/mike-collins/20250727_flex8530_collins_w_html_trump123?utm_campaign=034000000084020&utm_medium=email&xuno=464c455838353330&recurring=true&amount=25&utm_term=lrm-active]

DEFEAT JON OSSOFF >>>
[https://secure.winred.com/mike-collins/20250727_flex8530_collins_w_html_trump123?utm_campaign=034000000084020&utm_medium=email&xuno=464c455838353330&recurring=true&amount=25&utm_term=lrm-active]

1. WHO I AM

My name is Mike Collins.

I was born in Jackson, Georgia. Never left either. It’s where I
raised my kids, it’s where I built my trucking business, and it’s
where I plan to spend the rest of my years with my wife, Leigh Ann.

I may be a sitting Congressman, but I never thought I’d run for
office. That’s not something truckers from Jackson think about doing
too often.

BUT LIKE YOU, I SAW THE WRITING ON THE WALL; WHEN THE BIDEN REGIME
STOLE THE 2020 ELECTION, IT WAS CLEAR AMERICANS LIKE YOU AND ME WERE
GOING TO LOSE OUR COUNTRY, FAST.

FAST FORWARD TWO YEARS, AND I’M PROUD TO STAND BY PRESIDENT TRUMP,
FIGHT FOR HIS AMERICA FIRST MANDATE, AND FIX THE MESS THE DEMOCRATS
MADE OF OUR COUNTRY:

>> PASSING THE LAKEN RILEY ACT: a bill I authored in honor of Laken
Riley –_ the young Georgia student who was MURDERED by one of Joe
Biden’s illegals_ – making it easier for law enforcement to arrest
illegal aliens guilty of committing crimes.

>> PASSING THE BIG BEAUTIFUL BILL: cutting taxes, ending the
“green” scams harming our farmers, and supercharging ICE
deportations with BILLIONS in funding.

>> CODIFYING DOGE CUTS INTO FEDERAL LAW: exposing the deep state rot
in our government and eliminating the waste, fraud, and abuse
Americans like YOU are paying for.

My Democrat opponent, on the other hand, voted “NO” on all of
these things. Which brings me to the next part...

SUPPORT MY SENATE CAMPAIGN >>>
[https://secure.winred.com/mike-collins/20250727_flex8530_collins_w_html_trump123?utm_campaign=034000000084020&utm_medium=email&xuno=464c455838353330&recurring=true&amount=25&utm_term=lrm-active]

DEFEAT JON OSSOFF >>>
[https://secure.winred.com/mike-collins/20250727_flex8530_collins_w_html_trump123?utm_campaign=034000000084020&utm_medium=email&xuno=464c455838353330&recurring=true&amount=25&utm_term=lrm-active]

2. WHY I’M RUNNING FOR SENATE

Democrat Jon Ossoff doesn’t care about the border...

He doesn’t care about millions of illegals invading our country...

He doesn’t care about crime, high taxes, or the fact middle class
Americans are being CRUSHED by job killing regulations and
power-hungry elites.

ALL HE CARES ABOUT IS WHEN THAT NEXT BIG CHECK WILL COME IN FROM HIS
DONORS IN CALIFORNIA AND NEW YORK, AND WHEN HE’LL GET HIS 15 MINUTES
OF FAME FOR IMPEACHING PRESIDENT TRUMP.

That’s right, friend.

_Jon Ossoff’s #1 campaign promise right now is to weaponize another
bogus, sham impeachment against our President._

__

__

__

THAT’S WHY I’M RUNNING FOR SENATE TO DEFEAT HIM. PRESIDENT TRUMP
ONLY HAS A FEW YEARS LEFT IN OFFICE AND A THIRD IMPEACHMENT WOULD
DERAIL EVERYTHING WE’RE FIGHTING FOR.

AIN’T NO TWO WAYS ABOUT IT – OSSOFF MUST BE DEFEATED, AND I NEED
YOUR URGENT HELP
[https://secure.winred.com/mike-collins/20250727_flex8530_collins_w_html_trump123?utm_campaign=034000000084020&utm_medium=email&xuno=464c455838353330&recurring=true&amount=25&utm_term=lrm-active].

Which leads me to part three...

SUPPORT MY SENATE CAMPAIGN >>>
[https://secure.winred.com/mike-collins/20250727_flex8530_collins_w_html_trump123?utm_campaign=034000000084020&utm_medium=email&xuno=464c455838353330&recurring=true&amount=25&utm_term=lrm-active]

DEFEAT JON OSSOFF >>>
[https://secure.winred.com/mike-collins/20250727_flex8530_collins_w_html_trump123?utm_campaign=034000000084020&utm_medium=email&xuno=464c455838353330&recurring=true&amount=25&utm_term=lrm-active]

3. HOW YOU CAN HELP ME DEFEAT DEMOCRAT JON OSSOFF

You and I don’t need to reinvent the wheel here.

To win, we must focus on turning out RECORD REPUBLICAN VOTES in
Georgia.

Remember: there are no such thing as Senate districts. This race will
be won or lost based on who can get the most votes in the state of
Georgia.

THAT’S WHY DEMOCRATS LIKE JON OSSOFF POUR MILLIONS INTO CITIES LIKE
ATLANTA. IT’S THE EASIEST WAY THEY CAN GET THE VOTES THEY NEED
WITHOUT DOING ANY OF THE TRAVEL AND LEGWORK.

__

__

__

_Me on the other hand?_

I’m a former trucker who’s used to driving hours and hours to get
the job done and get it done right. And as a Republican, I must travel
to all four corners of Georgia to meet with rural voters who will be
the real difference makers in this election.

This is where YOU come in, friend.

BY RUSHING OVER $25 TODAY...

_You can sponsor a gas tank
[https://secure.winred.com/mike-collins/20250727_flex8530_collins_w_html_trump123?utm_campaign=034000000084020&utm_medium=email&xuno=464c455838353330&recurring=true&amount=25&utm_term=lrm-active]
so I can drive to the most remote and rural parts of Georgia –
winning votes in areas most politicians “don’t have time” to
visit. _

__

__

__

BY RUSHING OVER $50 TODAY...

_You can send me into blue cities like Atlanta
[https://secure.winred.com/mike-collins/20250727_flex8530_collins_w_html_trump123?utm_campaign=034000000084020&utm_medium=email&xuno=464c455838353330&recurring=true&amount=25&utm_term=lrm-active]
– making it known to voters that Republicans are the only party
serious about ending the invasion at our border, cracking down on
crime, and bringing down the inflation crippling American families._

__

__

__

OR, IF YOU’RE ABLE TO DONATE $100, $200, ALL THE WAY UP TO THE FEC
MAX OF $3,500...

_Your one-time generous donation helps me fight head-to-head against
the Democrat Money Machine
[https://secure.winred.com/mike-collins/20250727_flex8530_collins_w_html_trump123?utm_campaign=034000000084020&utm_medium=email&xuno=464c455838353330&recurring=true&amount=25&utm_term=lrm-active]
pouring MILLIONS into Jon Ossoff’s campaign to buy this election._

__

__

__

SUPPORT MY SENATE CAMPAIGN >>>
[https://secure.winred.com/mike-collins/20250727_flex8530_collins_w_html_trump123?utm_campaign=034000000084020&utm_medium=email&xuno=464c455838353330&recurring=true&amount=25&utm_term=lrm-active]

DEFEAT JON OSSOFF >>>
[https://secure.winred.com/mike-collins/20250727_flex8530_collins_w_html_trump123?utm_campaign=034000000084020&utm_medium=email&xuno=464c455838353330&recurring=true&amount=25&utm_term=lrm-active]

__

BUT REGARDLESS OF HOW MUCH YOU CAN GIVE, THE MOST CRITICAL FACTOR IS
TIME.

REPUBLICANS LIKE YOU AND ME CANNOT WAIT UNTIL ELECTION YEAR ROLLS
AROUND TO GET MOVING. MY TEAM AND I ARE GOING TO BATTLE NOW, AND WE
NEED YOU FIGHTING IN THE TRENCHES WITH US
[https://secure.winred.com/mike-collins/20250727_flex8530_collins_w_html_trump123?utm_campaign=034000000084020&utm_medium=email&xuno=464c455838353330&recurring=true&amount=25&utm_term=lrm-active].

WILL YOU RUSH OVER $25, $50, $100 OR MORE TO HELP ME DEFEAT DEMOCRAT
JON OSSOFF AND FIGHT FOR PRESIDENT TRUMP’S AGENDA IN THE SENATE
[https://secure.winred.com/mike-collins/20250727_flex8530_collins_w_html_trump123?utm_campaign=034000000084020&utm_medium=email&xuno=464c455838353330&recurring=true&amount=25&utm_term=lrm-active]?

_America First, Always,_

_Rep. Mike Collins (R-GA)_

_Candidate for United States Senate_

P.S. It’s simple; I’m running for Senate to carry out President
Trump’s agenda and fight for hard-working Americans. My Democrat
opponent Jon Ossoff? He’s collecting million-dollar checks from
California so he can SEIZE POWER IN THE SENATE, IMPEACH PRESIDENT
TRUMP FOR A THIRD TIME, AND DESTROY THE AMERICA FIRST MANDATE YOU
DELIVERED ON ELECTION DAY.

P.P.S. I NEED YOUR HELP TO TURN OUR RECORD VOTES IN GEORGIA AND BRING
HOME A MAJOR WIN FOR THE AMERICA FIRST MOVEMENT. WILL YOU RUSH OVER
$25 OR MORE TODAY,_PATRIOT_
[https://secure.winred.com/mike-collins/20250727_flex8530_collins_w_html_trump123?utm_campaign=034000000084020&utm_medium=email&xuno=464c455838353330&recurring=true&amount=25&utm_term=lrm-active]?

SUPPORT MY SENATE CAMPAIGN >>>
[https://secure.winred.com/mike-collins/20250727_flex8530_collins_w_html_trump123?utm_campaign=034000000084020&utm_medium=email&xuno=464c455838353330&recurring=true&amount=25&utm_term=lrm-active]

DEFEAT JON OSSOFF >>>
[https://secure.winred.com/mike-collins/20250727_flex8530_collins_w_html_trump123?utm_campaign=034000000084020&utm_medium=email&xuno=464c455838353330&recurring=true&amount=25&utm_term=lrm-active]

body:
Sign the letter to thank Gavin Newsom! >>>
| **Gavin Newsom just announced his HUGE plan to combat Trump’s gerrymandering:** [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/92694?t=6&akid=20797%2E878179%2EtqqzsF) We’re THRILLED he’s so bravely standing up to Trump — Newsom could singlehandedly SAVE our midterm elections from being RIGGED!!!

[**So we’re inviting 2,000 Democrats to sign our thank you letter to Gov. Newsom, but there are only 4 SPOTS LEFT in your neighborhood! CHIP IN $3 TO ADD YOUR NAME »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/92694?t=7&akid=20797%2E878179%2EtqqzsF) | [**Donate $3 to sign now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/92694?t=8&akid=20797%2E878179%2EtqqzsF)
---
TO: Governor Gavin Newsom
FROM: A grateful Democrat
Subject: Thank you for taking a stand. Dear Governor Newsom,

_Thank you so much for standing up for what’s right — even when it makes you a target for MAGA extremists!_

I refuse to sit on the sidelines while Trump attempts to STEAL the 2026 midterms.

**Thank goodness we have you leading the charge to FIGHT BACK!**

I’m doing everything in my power to protect Democrats like you who are brave enough to face Trump head-on and risk MAGA revenge.

[**I know you’re facing relentless attacks from Trump and his MAGA minions, so I’m signing this thank you letter and chipping in $3 to the Voter Protection Project to help Democrats keep fighting for justice and WIN in 2026 »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/92694?t=9&akid=20797%2E878179%2EtqqzsF) | [**Donate $3 to sign now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/92694?t=10&akid=20797%2E878179%2EtqqzsF)
---

**_X A grateful Democrat_**
\- The Voter Protection Project
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=20797%2E878179%2EtqqzsF). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=20797%2E878179%2EtqqzsF).**

body:
There are no ‘off-years’ for the DLCC. We’re aggressively pursuing opportunities to build a strong Democratic firewall to put an end to the terror that Trump and his far-right allies are causing. | | |
---
| |

Given the chaos in Washington, state legislatures are more critical than ever. After Democrats notched two incredible victories in deep-red state legislative districts in Pennsylvania and Iowa earlier this year, we’re turning our attention to Georgia. **On August 26th, voters in Georgia will go to the polls in a special election to fill an open seat that Democrats are hoping to flip. A victory in this deep-red district would deal a devastating blow to Trump and slow down his Project 2025 agenda.** [When you make a donation, you’re powering our mission to defeat MAGA Republicans in states like Georgia nationwide. There are no ‘off-years’ for the DLCC. We’re aggressively pursuing every opportunity to build a strong Democratic firewall to put an end to the terror inflicted by Trump and his far-right allies.
That’s why this month’s special election in Georgia is so important. Democrats have a phenomenal candidate in Debra Shigley – a small business owner and mother of five who is deeply embedded in her community. _Debra has what it takes to stand up against GOP extremism._
Alongside Democrats nationwide, Debra is running to increase public school funding, expand access to affordable health care, and lower the cost of living for working families. **We’re determined to help elect candidates just like her across the country, but we need your support.**
[Before it’s too late, can you chip in $7 to help FLIP seats blue in places like Georgia nationwide? clean_body: There are no ‘off-years’ for the DLCC. We’re aggressively pursuing opportunities to build a strong Democratic firewall to put an end to the terror that Trump and his far-right allies are causing. | | | | | ---|--- Given the chaos in Washington, state legislatures are more critical than ever. After Democrats notched two incredible victories in deep-red state legislative districts in Pennsylvania and Iowa earlier this year, we’re turning our attention to Georgia. On August 26th, voters in Georgia will go to the polls in a special election to fill an open seat that Democrats are hoping to flip. A victory in this deep-red district would deal a devastating blow to Trump and slow down his Project 2025 agenda. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | | There are no ‘off-years’ for the DLCC. We’re aggressively pursuing every opportunity to build a strong Democratic firewall to put an end to the terror inflicted by Trump and his far-right allies. That’s why this month’s special election in Georgia is so important. Democrats have a phenomenal candidate in Debra Shigley – a small business owner and mother of five who is deeply embedded in her community. Debra has what it takes to stand up against GOP extremism. Alongside Democrats nationwide, Debra is running to increase public school funding, expand access to affordable health care, and lower the cost of living for working families. We’re determined to help elect candidates just like her across the country, but we need your support. Thank you, Team DLCC | Prepared and paid for by DLCC Victory Fund, 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005. Not authorized by any candidate. | | Peter, thanks to your help, we finished July in a great place. We’re building a winning foundation here, and supporters like you are what makes this team work. I want you to know that grassroots power really makes an impact, and it’s because of you that I’m able to keep fighting for Pennsylvania. **As your Lieutenant Governor, I’m standing up for federal workers, minority owned business, environmental protections, and healthcare access.** But under the Trump administration, it makes me a target. I’m not going to let that slow me down, but it also means we have to keep our grassroots fundraising efforts strong. Pennsylvania is going to be a battleground state in this next election. We’re going to be facing Republican money at every turn, so we need to be able to match their effort dollar for dollar. [**If you’re with us, chip in now so we can get a head start on August fundraising!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112635210/561127750/-76487485?amount=10&source=sbd_ad_em_fr_080225_ty&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNDU2MWZlNC1lNTZmLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dLYK2J_MPaleeJaoQb5FOFg59497OGQrKoia2Cy9n84=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112635211/561127751/-76487485?amount=10&source=sbd_ad_em_fr_080225_ty&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNDU2MWZlNC1lNTZmLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dLYK2J_MPaleeJaoQb5FOFg59497OGQrKoia2Cy9n84=) Thank you, Peter! With your help friend, we may still have a chance to turn things around.

[**Midterm Elections are just over a year away,**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/65312?t=8&akid=23259%2E4449941%2E0Xhnt5) and we need to elect Democrats up and down the ballot if we have any shot at standing up to Donald Trump and his MAGA GOP.

That’s why we’re reaching out to top Democrats in your area and confirming that EVERYONE has a plan to vote in the 2026 Midterms.

This is crucial, friend: **Without your response, we’ll lack the FOUNDATION for an airtight strategy to defeat Republicans in 2026.**
[**Please, friend: We need 1,000 loyal Democrats to submit their response before MIDNIGHT >>**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/65312?t=9&akid=23259%2E4449941%2E0Xhnt5)
[**DO YOU PLAN TO VOTE IN THE 2026 MIDTERMS?**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/65312?t=10&akid=23259%2E4449941%2E0Xhnt5)

---
[UNSURE ➞](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/65312?t=14&akid=23259%2E4449941%2E0Xhnt5)
---
** YOUR CONFIRMATION NEEDED BEFORE 11:59 PM TO FORMULATE OUR MIDTERM STRATEGY **
If loyal Democrats like you fail to respond, our research will be **_INCOMPLETE._**

Please don’t let us down. The fate of our Democracy depends on this! [**Respond now >>**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/65312?t=15&akid=23259%2E4449941%2E0Xhnt5)

– _Fight For Reform_

name: Roy Cooper
subject: Washington Republicans handpicked my GOP opponent
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jon Ossoff for Senate
body:
#

_I have an update to share on our campaign for U.S. Senate from North Carolina, Peter:_
This week, Michael Whatley, a DC insider and big oil lobbyist, and Republican National Committee Chair, announced he’s running to defeat me. **Whatley has a record of doing and saying anything to gain President Trump’s personal favor — even if it hurts North Carolinians.** It’s paid off for him so far, earning him the RNC chairmanship and Trump’s endorsement in this U.S. Senate race.
**[Can you rush in a contribution now to help us fight back? Click here to split a contribution between our campaign and Jon Ossoff in Georgia >>>**](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-august25-cooper.WXk8Rt&refcode=em250802-1-f&t=1&akid=606%2E5691347%2Epctx5m)
You know, I never really wanted to go to Washington. I just wanted to serve the people right here in North Carolina. But we’re facing a moment as fragile as any that I can remember, and we can’t afford to elect a D.C. insider who only stands for his political party and those he lobbied for — not the people of North Carolina.
Peter: it’s more important than ever that NC be represented by someone who will do what is right. And on this, I give you my word: I will stand up for your families and do everything in my power to make this country better.
We all know that this isn’t going to be an easy race to win. We’re in for a long, expensive fight no matter what — and Republicans are preparing, too. They plan to spend hundreds of millions in our state, and they even started attacking us _before we officially announced our campaign_ because they’re so concerned about losing this seat and losing the Senate.
**[One way you can help us fight back against Whatley and the GOP machine behind him is by making a grassroots donation right now. Let’s show them that we have the momentum in this race from the get go, and that their mega-donors can’t buy our state. Chip in $10 or $20, split between our campaign and Jon Ossoff’s team in Georgia, today.**](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-august25-cooper.WXk8Rt&refcode=em250802-1-f&t=2&akid=606%2E5691347%2Epctx5m)
**[DONATE](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-august25-cooper.WXk8Rt&refcode=em250802-1-f&t=3&akid=606%2E5691347%2Epctx5m)**
Thank you for your support,
Roy Cooper

Paid for by Jon Ossoff for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Thank you for supporting Jon Ossoff. Email is a critical way to keep up with Jon and his work in the US Senate, but you can click [here](https://act.electjon.com/signup/fewer-emails-signup/?t=4&akid=606%2E5691347%2Epctx5m) to sign up to receive fewer emails, or click [here](https://act.electjon.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=5&akid=606%2E5691347%2Epctx5m) if you'd like to unsubscribe.

name: Kevin Kijewski for Michigan Attorney General
subject: Kevin Kijewski for Attorney General - August Update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kevin Kijewski for Michigan, 115 W Allegan St, Ste 900, Lansing, MI 48933_
body:
Kevin Kijewski for Attorney General - August Update

| | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/kevinformi/kevin-kijewski-for-attorney-general-august-update?e=4b10910eed)
---
[|
---](https://kevinformi.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=39782b0ca6b504d2faad7a196&id=6e1ad237a4&e=4b10910eed)
[|

| | | | |
# August Update from Kevin
---
| Dear Friend and Patriot,
I hope this message finds you well! We have been busy this past week with some big developments on our pathway to reclaim Michigan as your next Michigan Attorney General in 2026.
On the writing front, I had an [op-ed published in The Detroit News about how China's land grab in Michigan](https://kevinformi.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=39782b0ca6b504d2faad7a196&id=a51c1fbfb9&e=4b10910eed) is a threat to our economy, security, and food supply. In my article, [I lay out the risks and my plan as Michigan’s AG to stop it](https://kevinformi.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=39782b0ca6b504d2faad7a196&id=56b8252936&e=4b10910eed): investigate CCP ties, bar risky buys, and support Michigan Farmers. [Click the link below to read the article](https://kevinformi.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=39782b0ca6b504d2faad7a196&id=43eda95042&e=4b10910eed).
---
[|
---](https://kevinformi.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=39782b0ca6b504d2faad7a196&id=58c8b7ccdb&e=4b10910eed)
| I also had an [op-ed in The Midwesterner about the new Citizen-Only Voting Amendment](https://kevinformi.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=39782b0ca6b504d2faad7a196&id=887a19aadc&e=4b10910eed). In my article, [I detail how Michigan's election system lacks adequate safeguards against non-citizen voting and why I strongly support the Citizen-Only Voting Amendment](https://kevinformi.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=39782b0ca6b504d2faad7a196&id=5637aa5a58&e=4b10910eed): this initiative will require proof of citizenship and photo ID to be a registered voter (which is not required today) and is essential to restore public trust in Michigan's elections. [Click the link below to read the article](https://kevinformi.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=39782b0ca6b504d2faad7a196&id=69ee516224&e=4b10910eed).
---
[|
---](https://kevinformi.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=39782b0ca6b504d2faad7a196&id=7c6441c1ca&e=4b10910eed)
[|
---](https://kevinformi.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=39782b0ca6b504d2faad7a196&id=b4ec007feb&e=4b10910eed)
| Also this week, I was happy to visit with several groups and answer questions about how we plan to restore integrity to the Michigan Department of Attorney General. I spoke at the North Oakland Republican Club’s Freedom Picnic in Clarkston, 2nd Congressional District’s Freedom Friday event in Sparta, and Michigan Matters PAC in Shelby Township to discuss with Republicans about restoring faith in our elections and ending the weaponization of our government.
---
| | | | | | | | | | [|
---](https://kevinformi.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=39782b0ca6b504d2faad7a196&id=48240cc652&e=4b10910eed)
| [|
---](https://kevinformi.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=39782b0ca6b504d2faad7a196&id=54a376799a&e=4b10910eed)
| | | | | | | | | | [|
---](https://kevinformi.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=39782b0ca6b504d2faad7a196&id=71a835c6ff&e=4b10910eed)
[|
---](https://kevinformi.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=39782b0ca6b504d2faad7a196&id=82b00e3759&e=4b10910eed)
| On the legal front this week, [I was proud to stand side by side with Americans For Citizen Voting at their press conference in Oakland County](https://kevinformi.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=39782b0ca6b504d2faad7a196&id=169cd02f0c&e=4b10910eed) to support the launch of their petition drive to put citizen-only voting on the Michigan November 2026 ballot. As Michigan’s next Attorney General that is committed to election integrity, I was honored to speak in support of this important measure. [Please click below to view the press conference and my remarks](https://kevinformi.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=39782b0ca6b504d2faad7a196&id=4ffafdabb8&e=4b10910eed).
---
[|
---](https://kevinformi.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=39782b0ca6b504d2faad7a196&id=01d263bc3d&e=4b10910eed)
| I’m looking forward to meeting with additional Republican groups in August from across the state. We’re also planning an exciting reception at the Republican Leadership Conference at Mackinac in September - details are coming soon as we hope you can join us!
I’m committed to keeping you informed and welcome your feedback. As Michigan's next Attorney General, I’ll fight to uphold the rule of law, prosecute dangerous criminals, protect our Second Amendment rights, stop political prosecutions, and defend the hardworking people of this state from government overreach. [To win against the radical left's agenda, please contribute today and join the movement to take Michigan back!](https://kevinformi.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=39782b0ca6b504d2faad7a196&id=01e7cbfe61&e=4b10910eed)
Very truly yours,Kevin Kijewski
---

---](https://kevinformi.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=39782b0ca6b504d2faad7a196&id=0cf1940b1e&e=4b10910eed)

### _Folks, The Number of New Paid Subscribers Dramatically Slowed Last Week. Without You, We Can 't Continue to Expand The Soundcheck Fund--Just as Trump Kills PBS & NPR. Please Consider a Paid Subscription to Support Independent Media_
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmx1ZWFtcC5jby9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.rWZUvbiaAIyu61xu312Vpje7KLAXAV4JRAqftSj9L2Y?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=169949121)
* * *
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/e900d718-405e-4a35-a350-28626f2302ac?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* * *
**By David Shuster**
By the time historians complete their autopsy of America under Trump, I am certain the Department of Homeland Security--particularly its tyrannical subdivision, Immigration and Customs Enforcement --will be named among the most bloated and repulsive of the nation's malignant tumors. One of the more significant reasons we are, [in the words of former Vice President and presidential candidate, Kamala Harris, "broken."](https://substack.com/redirect/41435ac3-44eb-41ba-b316-f4047cf4af45?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
We don't have to look any further than the recent travesty in Florida, a state already overflowing with corrosive lunacy.
Federal agents, drunk on authority and high on xenophobia, apprehended and assaulted **a teenage citizen of the United States** for the capital crime of riding in a car while appearing Hispanic.
**This is what 's being done [every day on the streets of America in our name](https://substack.com/redirect/7438f2b4-b1d2-4e9c-ba31-52843b7046bc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).**
The unfortunate protagonist of this banana Republican drama is Kenny Laynez, age 18, a high school senior and landscaper. In other words, a young man who is more industrious and has greater moral hygiene than the ghouls who swooped down upon him could ever hope to be.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/59600b6c-ab41-49dd-852e-c61d18ff4b87?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Laynez, _born and raised on American soil_ , committed no felony, no misdemeanor, no impropriety, beyond sitting in the front seat of a car with two undocumented coworkers and his mother. For this heinous offense, **he was treated to the hospitality of the modern American police state**.
**He was yanked from the car, tasered, cuffed, and informed by an officer,**_**" You got no rights here. You're an amigo, brother."**_
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/54c2385e-d3d9-4972-8d48-b1363d22be64?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
In a video recorded by Laynez (bless him for capturing the spectacle and keeping the record button on) we hear the sickening symphony of jackboot justice. "They're starting to resist more," grunts one officer, as though announcing the arrival of fresh game for the hunt.
"We're gonna end up shooting some of them," he predicts, with the clinical indifference of a man discussing pest control. "Just remember, you can smell that too with a $30,000 bonus," another replies--proving, in case there was any doubt, that the basest instincts of [MAGA men ](https://substack.com/redirect/564085c3-ad29-4a25-a6e9-5c4e7c830f61?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)may be purchased on the cheap.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/a121eb5e-6ea2-4a0a-a605-eada0512dc5c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
What we are witnessing is not law enforcement. These officers are not patriots defending our borders. These government agents are self-anointed crusaders patrolling our streets with Tasers, masks, and an itchy trigger finger.
Empowered by the Trumpian legacy of cruelty masquerading as policy. [We wrote about another such incident](https://substack.com/redirect/064fa961-d14f-4d7f-832a-f516b55822da?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) here at Blue Amp recently:
> So there was Denis Guillen, a landscaper originally from Honduras, peacefully trimming grass outside this medical building. Guilty of nothing other than working hard and wielding a leaf blower without a U.S. passport. So the masked men with a penchant for unprovoked violence suddenly appeared.
> [They were unidentifiable and as it turns out, unaccountable](https://substack.com/redirect/ed0ee46b-1582-45df-ad95-8e8c53d19907?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). The Trump agents proceeded to try and snatch up Guillen, who preferred not to be disappeared. So like any sane person would do when pursueed by masked men without a badge, he fled into the medical clinic.
> Staff inside--nurses, doctors, the people who are trained to heal, and not destroy like members of ICE, were also never trained to host a hostage drama. They politely asked the I.C.E. "agents" (a word that now means anyone with a badge-shaped piece of plastic and an extra Y chromosome) for identification.
> The reply to this simple request? Violence. A request for a warrant? Met immediately with a refusal, as if due process were optional.
The Trump Administration promulgated and multiplied this cancer -- [not with subtlety or sophistication](https://substack.com/redirect/3cca2336-1b6f-4fc7-8ba1-ca6083387dea?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), but with barbaric pride. The Immigration and Customs Enforcement Agency, once a relatively obscure corner of the federal bureaucracy, became a public relations mascot for the strongman fantasy: round them up, shut the door, and let God sort them out.
What followed has been a regime of institutional paranoia, run by perhaps t[he most morally compromised man in America](https://substack.com/redirect/8873a16f-71d0-4836-a944-0d435acd3544?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Skin color has become probable cause and due process is a luxury reserved only for those who resemble the Founding Fathers.
This legacy is a rancid stew. And all of us are being told to eat it and accept that a citizen, a teenager no less, can be thrown to the pavement by Trump's own little militarized police force, with no recourse, no recognition, no due process.
In a nation founded by immigrants and defended, ironically, by teenagers like Kenny Laynez, [this madness should be treated not as policy but as pathology](https://substack.com/redirect/9be60775-1865-4b78-b919-b3319f50ad9e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Watch the video of the incident below, and try to hold down your lunch.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/920b369d-4185-40c6-a74c-d9b70f2eb2fb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
The creators and enablers of this horrific disease, whether they're in Tallahassee, Washington, or any other locale throughout the Unite States, must be condemned, sued, and criminally charged. (Someday, there will be a truth and reconciliation commission.)
These tyrants, led by Trump, are going against everything our nation is supposed to stand for. Instead of law and order, [we are witnessing a relentless and steady erosion of America's soul](https://substack.com/redirect/7e6012cb-92cb-49da-b33f-8f28a3835ced?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
This isn't about border patrol. It is about who is permitted to walk (or, in many cases, ride in a car) freely about society, and who is presumed guilty because of their surname and skin.
**This is about[an ailing nation so entranced by Trump-inspired fear and resentment](https://substack.com/redirect/8e60db51-83b2-488c-aebb-922193ae831a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), that it would trade away its ideals for the illusion of strength.**
This is the grotesque and debilitating face of U.S. immigration enforcement under this madman and his horrific henchmen. The question is no longer "who are we keeping out?" The question is, what have we become? Or [what must we do to turn this around](https://substack.com/redirect/65760630-28a9-4fdc-8821-41f65f95a563?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)?
And relatedly, will America survive?
_David Shuster is an Emmy award winning broadcast journalist who is best known for his work at NBC News and as an anchor MSNBC. He is a contributor to Blue Amp Substack and[ co-host of our weekly show (Thursdays, 2pm et, on Substack), "Amped Up w/ Cliff Schecter."](https://substack.com/redirect/65d0462b-a020-4aa9-8138-5afc492f2790?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_

name: Indiana GOP
subject: Leading the Way in Energy and Agriculture
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE INDIANA REPUBLICAN STATE COMMITTEE
body:
| | |
---
| |
---
| | _**Leading the Way in Energy and Agriculture**_
---
Friends, Indiana continues to be a model for common-sense conservative governance, as this week again thrust our state into the national limelight. EPA Administrator Lee Zeldin joined Governor Mike Braun and Hoosier statewide and congressional leaders to announce the agency's proposed recission of the Obama-era endangerment finding. This finding underpins in excess of $1 Trillion in costs, burdening consumers and taxpayers. In choosing to make this announcement here in Indiana, the Trump administration has singled out our state as uniquely ready to meet the call to unleash American energy. The same day, Governor Mike Braun joined agriculture leaders and lawmakers at the Indiana Ag Policy Summit in Lebanon on Tuesday, emphasizing key agriculture victories for Hoosier farmers. In a fireside chat with Indiana Soybean Alliance CEO Courtney Kingery, Governor Braun highlighted the $116 million in tax relief included in SEA 1 and his _Make Indiana Healthy Again_ agenda, including executive actions to expand access to locally grown fruits, vegetables, meats, and dairy in Indiana schools and homes. These policies are creating new markets and opportunities for farmers across the state. Governor Braun also welcomed home Indiana's Task Force One, who's members had been in Texas to assist in flood recovery. We join Governor Braun in thanking those brave men and women who took part in this effort and our prayers remain with the victims of this disaster. The INGOP Team was proud to host our Republican Women Reception, honoring all the Hoosier women whose work and dedication keep our party alive and stronger than ever. As always, thank you for being a part of our team. Please feel free to reach out if there's anything I can assist with.
---
| |
---
| | Lana Keesling, Indiana GOP Chairwoman
---
|
---
| | |
---
---
| | _**EPA Announces Proposal to Rescind the Endangerment Finding**_
---
---
Governor Mike Braun welcomed EPA Administrator Lee Zeldin and Secretary of Energy Chris Wright to Indianapolis for a major announcement: the EPA’s proposed decision to rescind the Endangerment Finding. Braun praised the move as a step toward reversing costly federal overreach and lowering prices for Hoosiers. "Thanks to President Trump[](http://links.email.in-gop.com/s/c/hiVBlgl1iSRmZN691gT8UnBEemOTEeF3ZRnYuIDArl303CRoTMJm1yUINyExVmkBv2suPbpQwPb5lUpbgA5XRT8blAO3S7g4M_LRd7PoJvVhaEAVzv3Rc-SIAJAxDCuXCNPkF8elcayNr1JnDzl_mRXo6OUfdUrWuZNXL25Ypvr37dA128EFqbDZN1stvCAJ0JIzBRy6EXRaXO6K_XyudrfkQUWaRNQwqGyXOK84syZp_zC8vMytDQYsbkhEK2gSbXLqiOOaJMoJVxXuwJU1HjfiyIg5bzxA5LHWoIKJiLTocmjB2biCYLnfx9e6--8e_AE7J6T-H_WRTwLhY9Afh8_pABVi7e9hC8dzKFV59LWGcPk/H9F64Qr0dGzjTX7LFO7bWjlxYtC7iIXj/11), we’re putting the brakes on D.C. overreach and hitting the gas on American prosperity!" \- Governor Braun via [X](http://links.email.in-gop.com/s/c/Hdn9-hfepdbm6e6Uu-r2Ma237-fVeQZxjmaHMWVVIwNKHhdCUVTmxZYaivAFMvtswa0Wqxz7TpNz8ptXFQcrRmRf3yOAURYccz7FV5rbHAksh-e34xsCYTJf9Lskw69BK6P3IvtVPwjUJ8fYAyYLyqp2fE1DDCiIkQf9-p2Z67hy9VonOLqDTWsrsFLM0JPgz071QrQJtz4K7PQVu7Vo93AC_PjgRzmLRZnMhnZTV56oZO_YOvMPYD8rbWzSHSOX0jYioYTGX8DgKjGvSwP0ErQs-fwI7ieXX4GQB6pywRNa3Qt6-V5FYz_hP8Vep-UmqBCVLtNHk7q4bX2I8PWDYlNWlewc4Z8oBJ_nql3pIDXKM22qo6tSrjZ1x2i4FiCcm0yLatEd0tz7CvovmWxAE1hG3RFsZ1zj0CtmRblU8Q/ebn-AMt8tyxiL1VWxhblw5MjN4a5XBoo/11)

_**Governor Braun Welcomes Indiana Task Force 1 Home**_
---
---
Governor Mike Braun welcomed Indiana Task Force 1 home after their 20-day deployment in Kerr County, Texas, where 83 Hoosiers bravely worked on foot for over 100 miles each to aid flood recovery. He expressed pride in their dedication and gratitude for their safe return. "I am incredibly proud of all of our #INTF1 members and deeply grateful to have them home safe." \- Governor Braun via [X](http://links.email.in-gop.com/s/c/ESqc2dW_RovOklz1BamC-tMN_bEGrLsDtDB4WqsZz4CBFufJEhIYNeVe9fM__482AfOULj3YrrR7pcSwm9tqLJrPQE-YrBv5R34XRvgF8RrtiMwpXiGpfhyDi3H1g5UEbwJAVR_k0dDfLK5x05KSNlD5GNrcJuGtF3o4Zfffy2PvdkAl8x7rHg1_-cdWwc0vRsUF62NZDUg50mjICxizqfTFQ4hSzCJOjgkgBYQX8I2MIYVYODiRJ-HCwnHXIfkZHfwCcWbKWPq8ReFi4LV_ilENs1p4oOlZkTvqba485ssJa-5dssOeAleUI6lazUsX2PFGLn6SYivoUrCH9PEpU4EzFjI16VKEEC1qWJ8t9KQee1-5XtACggyzJFiPo5CUZJECS5NV6UB2AT16dBs7b9FFHmyyqBO-5W7QLVxnGg/XoDnkgfaqEjOzrJbhTxONK5aCaH4_fgO/11)

_**Supporting Farmers, Growing Communities**_
---
---
Governor Mike Braun spoke at the Indiana Ag Policy Summit, focusing on important achievements for the state’s farmers. He praised Indiana’s designation as one of five USDA hubs, bringing vital resources closer to local agriculture. Governor Braun also highlighted his administration's recent property tax cuts and initiatives to increase access to fresh, locally grown food through his _Make Indiana Healthy Again_ plan. “I think it’s clear that the more we can go from farm to market, the less processed stuff we have in there, and the more opportunities it creates in the ag industry.” \- Governor Mike Braun via [Brownfield AG News](http://links.email.in-gop.com/s/c/wGL9nF3xbWk36gZKanDHeyJJKuB5TPI2vjQSn0ErmQ9IEcHW17KN01sY3XzfjJE-e9cuiXc83DM7BTBzxlmsEbKkbViJVqgmY-dCDg0x0H1VSS5800FtEoNczF27hQNOP2HckZxMkAIa-TX7lSc1cXWR-TYYSAqJfvW_D7n37avxIjyoGgWhE_qYYQThOZIWLt9eI8OgPUCCDbcKtEtNR6nGT0oyZoGCjGEJ27y5x-0SFNFMBP8HQrpnIoQvG4MtZDtPbkTEIpzfnMS3L6ebJ-kv-le5H4eK_nI3tyqBmT1Uajc0nSK4eE8ip77CAwW1Mcc9F71In0rEC5WJdynvqF2TSOe0NXqEhi6Nl5LXsy-IvdNvNeAwQNZ20GynV1hHslcojJiBzWQvVITBGaODJhLD3zsM09XknNUYbp0orV4NlZoPSRSwC-e5MobVWkxoO8_1Ho_eEjClfDkKx9QE8nTNa1hzi28-8Lxjae6g6eVrI4lLjjdo3SkCONr82e7rzz8LFT2zu_vPeuzZvqSWXacLsHeT0CahqA/c23OCAlP019zs6Zy5_p2sMsWtcHFHOKz/11)

That threatens family farms, small businesses, and homebuyers in towns like ours," wrote Treasurer Elliot. **Comptroller Elise Nieshalla** worsening an opioid crisis that devastated communities in every state. **Senator Todd Young** [joined](http://links.email.in-gop.com/s/c/xpM1Wt3mbzI9VnUUIkh1ZL2504rE7onnIQLpN9myQjZF8e7apFC8UaX6RkRrk2UqwX7vlPKkpbmuqYn-rMQLx65U_IcKKJCcNifNQLXWuOmGhdtrkuRQyTFwN3Ij70u8jtvqufNFGkfekgYvLBtb6Q2UrwFGRsOFWOWHTQSrwz94e7SzDpUoTUw5Xdbn76vepUK0G29CSVkgDJsyfsWwAKO6-LcIe8rsoq1b1m6OmJVlAEyya_oHvbph53uhnzgBERz06GxMDheMH5qpIjUeMc01O_B5xnEko-cCYRVPm30tSMf_YQJL3CeNw7JaU54EN_YjnRxLEpG5V8dswYjR4cfed245mIqKCo5ijrBtz4RmjqmogkkWgjt2LYZ9i1vnx9JmFCBtWNrb7xr1WqA1ZOFVKFPPKJFOzxlCHu0NjP6oSxSUBaISYY9l8Myo4DXkDukeoevG8VbwTVywTXYPEMUK7E3H5Jrf0iUXzteQlDJU6mSy1bb2J8UrmLAsJK0t0S4KWl9EOr7eEltpihCIxZgGOcE5h2l8FP2ZqP72SF4egzj55-eppSmh7oKClkyMeMJH77X1jqk74aafjSpUsNj6A58VHpo56TvutA/SWczHCx6lqxp2ZbxzIVz4Fc5cm-_uYx7/11)
