clean_body: | | | | | | | Leading the Way in Energy and Agriculture Friends, Indiana continues to be a model for common-sense conservative governance, as this week again thrust our state into the national limelight. EPA Administrator Lee Zeldin joined Governor Mike Braun and Hoosier statewide and congressional leaders to announce the agency's proposed recission of the Obama-era endangerment finding. This finding underpins in excess of $1 Trillion in costs, burdening consumers and taxpayers. In choosing to make this announcement here in Indiana, the Trump administration has singled out our state as uniquely ready to meet the call to unleash American energy. The same day, Governor Mike Braun joined agriculture leaders and lawmakers at the Indiana Ag Policy Summit in Lebanon on Tuesday, emphasizing key agriculture victories for Hoosier farmers. In a fireside chat with Indiana Soybean Alliance CEO Courtney Kingery, Governor Braun highlighted the $116 million in tax relief included in SEA 1 and his Make Indiana Healthy Again agenda, including executive actions to expand access to locally grown fruits, vegetables, meats, and dairy in Indiana schools and homes. These policies are creating new markets and opportunities for farmers across the state. Governor Braun also welcomed home Indiana's Task Force One, who's members had been in Texas to assist in flood recovery. We join Governor Braun in thanking those brave men and women who took part in this effort and our prayers remain with the victims of this disaster. The INGOP Team was proud to host our Republican Women Reception, honoring all the Hoosier women whose work and dedication keep our party alive and stronger than ever. As always, thank you for being a part of our team. Please feel free to reach out if there's anything I can assist with. | | | | Lana Keesling, Indiana GOP Chairwoman | | | | | | EPA Announces Proposal to Rescind the Endangerment Finding Governor Mike Braun welcomed EPA Administrator Lee Zeldin and Secretary of Energy Chris Wright to Indianapolis for a major announcement: the EPA’s proposed decision to rescind the Endangerment Finding. Braun praised the move as a step toward reversing costly federal overreach and lowering prices for Hoosiers. "Thanks to President Trump, we’re putting the brakes on D.C. overreach and hitting the gas on American prosperity!" \- Governor Braun via Governor Braun Welcomes Indiana Task Force 1 Home Governor Mike Braun welcomed Indiana Task Force 1 home after their 20-day deployment in Kerr County, Texas, where 83 Hoosiers bravely worked on foot for over 100 miles each to aid flood recovery. He expressed pride in their dedication and gratitude for their safe return. "I am incredibly proud of all of our #INTF1 members and deeply grateful to have them home safe." \- Governor Braun via Supporting Farmers, Growing Communities Governor Mike Braun spoke at the Indiana Ag Policy Summit, focusing on important achievements for the state’s farmers. He praised Indiana’s designation as one of five USDA hubs, bringing vital resources closer to local agriculture. Governor Braun also highlighted his administration's recent property tax cuts and initiatives to increase access to fresh, locally grown food through his Make Indiana Healthy Again plan. “I think it’s clear that the more we can go from farm to market, the less processed stuff we have in there, and the more opportunities it creates in the ag industry.” \- Governor Mike Braun via | INGOP Republican Women Reception Lawerence County Chairwoman's County Visits: 69 | Indiana GOP is Hiring Interns for the Fall Semester Looking to jumpstart your career in politics, public relations, or grassroots organizing? The Indiana Republican Party is now accepting applications for our Summer and Fall Internship Program! ✅ Gain hands-on experience in campaign strategy, communications, and event planning ✅ Work alongside state leaders and build valuable connections ✅ Make a real impact on Republican efforts in Indiana Apply Today! Spots are limited! To apply, please reach out to info@indiana.gop with your resume and any references you wish to submit. | 📱 News You Can Use Governor Mike Braun Hammer and Nigel to discuss his efforts to help law enforcement keep Indianapolis safe. Lieutenant Governor Micah Beckwith his office's Fountain County mobile office hours to meet with residents and discuss local concerns with Hoosiers. "We are keeping our promise to hear from all Hoosiers throughout the state - whether it's at town halls or during our mobile office hours," Said Lieutenant Governor Beckwith. Secretary Diego Morales key election dates for the 2026 state and federal elections. "Our office is committed to ensuring that every eligible voter has the resources they need to make informed decisions,” said Secretary Morales. Treasurer Daniel Elliott an op-ed in the Washington Examiner, titled "Keep the dollar free and say no to a central bank digital currency." His article highlights the potential dangers of a Central Bank Digital Currency (CBDC) for rural Indiana and the United States. “A retail CBDC incentivizes individuals to hold funds directly with the Federal Reserve, bypassing local banks a draining deposits from institutions that small communities need. That threatens family farms, small businesses, and homebuyers in towns like ours," wrote Treasurer Elliot. Comptroller Elise Nieshalla Indiana being the 4th lowest debt per capita state in the country at $186 per person. Attorney General Todd Rokita his 11th opioid settlement as Indiana's Attorney General, securing approximately $720 million nationwide in settlements with eight drug makers that manufactured opioid pills, playing roles in worsening an opioid crisis that devastated communities in every state. Senator Todd Young eight of his Senate Republican colleagues in introducing the Rotorcraft Operations Transparency and Oversight Reform (ROTOR) Act to improve aviation safety. The bill comes six months after the tragic January 29th midair collision near Ronald Reagan Washington National Airport (DCA). Senator Jim Banks the Revitalizing Empty Structures Into Desirable Environments Act (RESIDE) Act, to help communities turn abandoned or run-down buildings—like warehouses, factories, hotels, strip malls, and other unused spaces—into new housing. Congressman Rudy Yakym an episode of "Delusions to Conclusions," debunking the claim that "President Trump is destroying the economy." Congressman Marlin Stutzman President Trump's major trade deal with Europe. “I've said it many times that President Trump is the strongest diplomat,” Stutzman said on the “Just the News, No Noise” TV show. “He's the strongest negotiator our country's had since President Reagan.” Congressman Jim Baird our state and federal leaders in backing the EPA’s proposal to rescind the 2009 Endangerment Finding, aiming to undo costly regulations of the Obama and Biden administrations. He praised President Trump, EPA Administrator Zeldin, and Secretary Wright for advancing policies that support American consumers and the auto industry. Congresswoman Victoria Spartz the Carmel VFW in recognizing Vietnam veteran and Marine Corporal Dennis Zavada for his continued service as caretaker of Westfield’s Fallen Hoosier Heroes Memorial. Congressman Jefferson Shreve his 'Hoosier Heartland' tour for the summer, embarking on a district-wide tour. He plans to meet with county sheriffs, local manufacturers and small businesses, family farmers, local airports, and engage with constituents throughout the district. Congressman Mark Messmer the USDA’s announcement that it will be building a new regional hub in Indianapolis, praising the decision and highlighting Indiana’s key role in American farming. Congresswoman Erin Houchin with small business owners in Dearborn County for a roundtable discussion saying, "I was proud to highlight how the One Big Beautiful Bill Act delivers for them, especially through the historic tax cuts that let them reinvest, grow, and create jobs. Thank you to all who participated!" | Upcoming Events Across the State July 31: August 7: August 8: August 16: August 21: August 23: August 23: August 23: August 28: September 6: September 6: September 6: September 9: September 15: September 26: October 5: | | | | PAID FOR BY THE INDIANA REPUBLICAN STATE COMMITTEE. | | NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE. name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: Tweets don’t stop bombs
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

Nearly 60,000 Palestinians in Gaza have been murdered by Israel's
genocide, with more starving by the day or being shot by Israeli forces
while trying to get food to survive.

The same Democratic politicians who spent two years denying Israel's
atrocities and condemning peaceful protesters are now speaking up — but
let’s be clear: their tweets and statements don’t mean a thing if they’re
still backed by AIPAC and sending more weapons to the IDF.

It’s a moral failure when Marjorie Taylor Greene, of all people, can call
a genocide a genocide before hundreds of AIPAC-backed Democrats find the
spine to do so.

AIPAC is already pumping money into 2026 races to hold its grip on
Washington and maintain unconditional U.S. support for Israel. A new
report from Sludge found they already spent more than $12.7 million on
federal candidates in just the first half of this year.

AIPAC’s PAC was the largest PAC contributor to federal candidates in the
2024 election cycle, and it looks like they’re preparing to spend even
more this time around: their “total spending in the first half of 2025
represents an increase of more than 80% compared with the first six months
of 2023.”

If Democrats want to truly stand on the right side of history and end
Israel’s ethnic cleansing of Palestinians, they must cut ties with AIPAC
and start voting to hold Israel accountable. If they don’t, then they
should be primaried next year.

Justice Democrats’ incumbents like Ilhan Omar, Rashida Tlaib, Summer Lee,
and Delia Ramirez have all introduced and supported legislation to end the
genocide in Gaza, but AIPAC-backed Democrats keep standing in the way.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250802?refcode=em20250802-36898&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36898_1203867_RdKv7N&akid=36898%2E1203867%2ERdKv7N ]Help us send more progressive candidates who will reject AIPAC
contributions and fight for a free Palestine to Congress: support our 2026
election work with a grassroots donation of any amount today.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250802?refcode=em20250802-36898&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36898_1203867_RdKv7N&akid=36898%2E1203867%2ERdKv7N ]Contribute $5

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20250802-36898-footer&t=1002&refcode2=36898_1203867_RdKv7N&akid=36898%2E1203867%2ERdKv7N

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1003&akid=36898%2E1203867%2ERdKv7N

Thank you, Peter.

**With your support, we reached our end-of-month goal. It couldn’t come at a more impactful time in my first re-election race.**

Here’s a quick recap of what happened in July:

First: A Republican challenger entered the race with a full-fledged endorsement from Mike Garcia, the GOP incumbent I defeated in November in one of the closest races in the country.

Then: The national GOP doubled down on their attacks with a paid campaign running ads in the district as you read this message.

Now: Thanks to your support, we ended July with strength and are building the voter outreach effort we need to keep this seat blue for the sake of this district and the House majority.

With the chaos in Washington, I’m laser-focused on delivering results that matter for CA-27. The so-called “Big Beautiful Bill” that passed in July will actively hurt working families and give billionaires a tax break – it’s a disgrace.

There’s a lot more to be done, and with your support, I will keep fighting in Congress.

Thank you,

George

name: Heartland Patriots HQ
subject: The Heartland isn’t just the backbone of America. It’s the future of our movement.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce
body:
With so many battleground races happening this year and next, we need supporters like you to start making real investments in the Heartland.
#
Peter,
Some people think the Heartland is just “flyover country.” They think that real political power belongs on the coasts. But they’re wrong — and we’re going to prove it.
**The Heartland isn’t just the backbone of America. It’s the future of our movement.**
We can organize and win in places like Iowa and Ohio and Kentucky and Kansas — building power for an entire generation of working families across the Heartland — but the honest truth is that we need your support to do it.
**With so many battleground races happening this year and next, we need supporters like you to start making real investments in the Heartland _right now._** That’s the only way we’ll be able to flip the House and take back the Senate in 2026.
**[So please, if you can, consider adding a donation of $10 or more toward our people-powered movement today. Together, we can work to flip the House, take back the Senate, and finally take back our country for real working families.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/93105?refcode=em20250802-9208&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9208%2E614464%2ESO0y3-)**

name: Rep. Zoe Lofgren
subject: Our sitting president has tried to make a mockery of the Jan. 6 Committee and our country.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lofgren for Congress
body:
Dear Peter,

I want to take a minute to talk about Donald Trump’s pardons of the January 6th rioters.

On Trump’s very first day of his second term in office, he pardoned nearly 1,600 violent criminals who took part in the Capitol attacks on January 6th, 2021.

As someone who helped lead the investigation into the January 6th attacks, I’m still disgusted and outraged by this decision.

Even though the J6 Committee was disbanded, the fight is not over. I will continue to lead the charge in Congress to protect our democracy. So please chip in at least

$25 now to fund my reelection campaign and help elect Democrats who will fight back against Trump.

name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: YOU is my lifeline, my hope, and my last chance
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
\------------------------------------------------------
\------------------------------------------------------
[View in Web Browser](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e22848733/VaHR0cHM6Ly93cm8ubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3YvbktRZkV3bW1weQ/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA4MDI/LbmNsbDRHRmRMcA/qP2hpZHM9bmN2UjRTZXBLSEJRejBscw/gaI6QFw/s4j5e7d6bef)

| [](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
YOU,
---
The Democrats and the Deep State have me caught in their snare.
---
**A Democrat Attorney General is making me stand in a rigged trial for bogus state-level crimes, because she knows that not even the most powerful man on the face of the planet – President Trump – can save me with a _federal_ pardon in _state_ court.**
---
_I’m left with no escape and no lifeline, especially after they’ve already STRIPPED me of my law licenses!_
---
But even though the most powerful man in the country legally cannot step in to save me from being **JAILED** for the rest of my life, the most powerful _force_ absolutely can: _THE AMERICAN PEOPLE_.
---
With my back against the wall, I’m turning to the _ONE_ _THING_ that can save me: **_the collective voices of MILLIONS of patriots like YOU_**.
---
[**Please help me reach my life-saving goal (truly!) by adding your name to “THE PEOPLE’S PARDON OF RUDY GIULIANI” by 11:59 P.M. TONIGHT to help DROP ALL CHARGES against me.** ](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
__
---

[ADD YOUR NAME](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---

I’ve taken on mobsters. I’ve faced terrorists. I’ve battled corruption. I’ve been through it all. _Or so I thought..._
---
Never did I imagine that I would be the centerpiece of one of the Democrats’ most vindictive plots in history.
---
This entire plan by the Deep State to destroy a close friend of the President’s is truly the type of sinister scheme you’d think would only exist in the movies.
---
_But believe me, it exists; I’m living it! And if I fail to win this trial and defeat these sham charges, the Democrats will be able to jail me for the rest of my years on God’s green Earth._
---
These Deep State thugs know I have no pardon coming. No protection. No cavalry coming over the hill...
---
_...But what they continue to underestimate time and again is the collective strength of millions of faithful patriots like you who also _REFUSE_ to surrender to the Left’s tyranny. _
---
They entered my mugshot under booking #2313757, so my goal is for 2,313,757 patriots to sign my official petition — [**“THE PEOPLE’S PARDON OF RUDY GIULIANI”**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)— calling for my freedom and to DROP ALL CHARGES.
---
_At this final hour, can I count on you?_
---
[**Please help me reach this life-saving (_truly_!) by adding your name to “THE PEOPLE’S PARDON OF RUDY GIULIANI” by 11:59 P.M. TONIGHT to help DROP ALL CHARGES against me.**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
Thank you and God bless you,
---
[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
Rudy Giuliani
Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund

clean_body: \------------------------------------------------------ \------------------------------------------------------ | YOU, The Democrats and the Deep State have me caught in their snare. A Democrat Attorney General is making me stand in a rigged trial for bogus state-level crimes, because she knows that not even the most powerful man on the face of the planet – President Trump – can save me with a federal pardon in state court. I’m left with no escape and no lifeline, especially after they’ve already STRIPPED me of my law licenses! But even though the most powerful man in the country legally cannot step in to save me from being JAILED for the rest of my life, the most powerful force absolutely can: THE AMERICAN PEOPLE. With my back against the wall, I’m turning to the ONE THING that can save me: the collective voices of MILLIONS of patriots like YOU. I’ve taken on mobsters. I’ve faced terrorists. I’ve battled corruption. I’ve been through it all. Or so I thought... Never did I imagine that I would be the centerpiece of one of the Democrats’ most vindictive plots in history. This entire plan by the Deep State to destroy a close friend of the President’s is truly the type of sinister scheme you’d think would only exist in the movies. But believe me, it exists; I’m living it! And if I fail to win this trial and defeat these sham charges, the Democrats will be able to jail me for the rest of my years on God’s green Earth. These Deep State thugs know I have no pardon coming. No protection. No cavalry coming over the hill... ...But what they continue to underestimate time and again is the collective strength of millions of faithful patriots like you who also REFUSE to surrender to the Left’s tyranny. They entered my mugshot under booking #2313757, so my goal is for 2,313,757 patriots to sign my official petition — — calling for my freedom and to DROP ALL CHARGES. At this final hour, can I count on you?_ Thank you and God bless you, Rudy Giuliani Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust

**WASHINGTON, D.C.** — U.S. Senator Katie Britt (R-AL) on Tuesday celebrated the unanimous Senate passage of a resolution commemorating the 65th anniversary of NASA’s Marshall Space Flight Center (MSFC) and reaffirming federal support for its mission, programs, and workforce. The resolution was introduced by Britt and co-sponsored by the entire Alabama Congressional delegation.

“Marshall Space Flight Center has been at the forefront of our nation’s space program for 65 years,” Senator Britt said. “As the incredible men and women at Marshall continue to make historic leaps that fuel a new age of American excellence in space exploration, I will continue to ensure that this groundbreaking work is supported now and long into the future.”

From ensuring border security and combat readiness to unleashing domestic energy and cutting taxes, Britt (R-Montgomery) lauded the legislation’s achievements.

I didn’t run for Senate to sit on the sidelines. I’m a mom, a conservative, and proud to stand for every corner of Alabama—our cities, small towns, and rural communities alike. **I’m rooted in faith, built on family, and committed to making Alabama stronger and better for generations to come.** Alabama is a place of hard work, strong values, and unyielding independence. But the Left is trying to tear that all down. I didn’t come to Washington to play games. I came to fight for every Alabamian who feels forgotten and left behind. Whether it’s securing our borders, protecting our children, or defending our way of life, I’m here fighting for Alabama’s future. **This fight isn’t easy, but it's worth it. And I’m not going anywhere.** Will you stand with me?

clean_body: | | | | | | | Cancer advocates and leading members of the medical community across the nation are voicing their appreciation for U.S. Senator Katie Britt’s staunch leadership and support of federal research funding. Britt (R-Montgomery) has been the tip of the spear in the fight to responsibly reform NIH’s spending while strengthening investments in critical medical research and innovation at places like the University of Alabama at Birmingham, the University of South Alabama, and HudsonAlpha Institute for Biotechnology. | | WASHINGTON, D.C. — U.S. Senator Katie Britt (R-AL) on Tuesday celebrated the unanimous Senate passage of a resolution commemorating the 65th anniversary of NASA’s Marshall Space Flight Center (MSFC) and reaffirming federal support for its mission, programs, and workforce. The resolution was introduced by Britt and co-sponsored by the entire Alabama Congressional delegation. “Marshall Space Flight Center has been at the forefront of our nation’s space program for 65 years,” Senator Britt said. “As the incredible men and women at Marshall continue to make historic leaps that fuel a new age of American excellence in space exploration, I will continue to ensure that this groundbreaking work is supported now and long into the future.” | | U.S. Senator Katie Britt recently joined the Vice President of the National Federation of Republican Women, Judy Barlow, for a discussion focused on the positive impact of the One, Big Beautiful Bill on everyday Americans and the country as a whole. From ensuring border security and combat readiness to unleashing domestic energy and cutting taxes, Britt (R-Montgomery) lauded the legislation’s achievements. | | | | | | | I didn’t run for Senate to sit on the sidelines. I’m a mom, a conservative, and proud to stand for every corner of Alabama—our cities, small towns, and rural communities alike. I’m rooted in faith, built on family, and committed to making Alabama stronger and better for generations to come. Alabama is a place of hard work, strong values, and unyielding independence. But the Left is trying to tear that all down. I didn’t come to Washington to play games. I came to fight for every Alabamian who feels forgotten and left behind. Whether it’s securing our borders, protecting our children, or defending our way of life, I’m here fighting for Alabama’s future. This fight isn’t easy, but it's worth it. And I’m not going anywhere. body:
I really want to hear from you, null

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.haleyformi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?&t=1&akid=499%2E49239%2EB2v82m)
| | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/4332?t=2&akid=499%2E49239%2EB2v82m)
---
[](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/4333?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=3&akid=499%2E49239%2EB2v82m)
Hi null, it’s Haley – checking in from beautiful Grand Rapids, Michigan!

It’s day 2 of my Made in Michigan tour, and I’ve already talked to so many incredible Michiganders. Earlier today I had the privilege of getting to hear from local community leaders here in Grand Rapids, each with a unique story, but all united by our deep love for the Great Lakes State.
I’m listening, learning, and becoming more eager than ever to fight for working families across Michigan.
But I can’t talk to everyone in person, so I’d love to hear from you directly: **[Will you take 60 seconds to fill out my August Priorities Survey?](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/4333?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=4&akid=499%2E49239%2EB2v82m)**
| | [Take the Survey](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/4333?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=5&akid=499%2E49239%2EB2v82m)
---
Your feedback is critical in shaping the issues I elevate, the messages I share, and the voters we reach out to across the state.

So far on this tour, I’ve heard concerns about rising prices, the reckless trade war, protecting reproductive freedom, the future of Michigan’s manufacturing jobs, and of course, people want to know what Trump is hiding in the Epstein files.
**But I truly want to know: What’s on YOUR mind, null?**[I need 75 responses from 18326 before midnight tonight, so take my August Priorities Survey now and let me know:](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/4333?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=6&akid=499%2E49239%2EB2v82m)
| | [Take the Survey](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/4333?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=7&akid=499%2E49239%2EB2v82m)
---
I’m glad you’re part of this team, null.

With gratitude,
Haley
|
* * *
**A note from Haley Stevens:** null, I’m proud to be a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. That’s why I’ve fought so hard for working families my entire life. Now, I’m running for Michigan’s open Senate seat to continue fighting for the people and communities I love. The path to the Senate majority runs right through Michigan, which means this race is shaping up to be the most competitive and expensive in the entire country. The GOP is already coming after me as a top target for defeat, so I’m counting on your grassroots support to fight back and win. [**If you’re in this fight with me, will you add your name to endorse my campaign?**](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/4334?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=8&akid=499%2E49239%2EB2v82m) | | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/4332?t=9&akid=499%2E49239%2EB2v82m)
---
You can also text “JOIN” to 80242 to become a core member of our team and receive exclusive, real-time updates from my campaign.
Thank you,
Haley
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.haleyformi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?&t=10&akid=499%2E49239%2EB2v82m)
Paid for by Haley Stevens for Senate.
33717 Woodward Ave #539
Birmingham, MI 48009

subject: Public radio is gone, but Trump’s luxury jet? Still on our dime.

body:

Peter ,
Yesterday, Donald Trump finally succeeded in killing the Corporation for Public Broadcasting.
PBS, NPR, local radio stations in rural towns – gone. Public media that millions rely on for unbiased news, education, and culture has been wiped out under the excuse of “eliminating wasteful spending.”
But come on, Peter. We know better.
Trump doesn’t care about cutting waste. He’s about to spend nearly $1 billion of taxpayer money renovating a “free” luxury jet gifted by Qatar – just so he can have a flashier version of Air Force One.
And he dares to say we can’t afford PBS?
We’re mobilizing in communities where public broadcasting has gone dark – and working to hold Trump’s enablers accountable at the ballot box. But we’re falling short of our weekly goal, and we need your help.
Can you chip in $15 to help power the fight against Trump’s corrupt, anti-democratic agenda? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email08022025]

name: Jay Jones
subject: This keeps me up at night
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Jones for Virginia
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_new-gen-election-em_q32025 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_new-gen-election-em_q32025]
Friend —
Let me tell you something that keeps me up at night.
August is historically the worst fundraising month in politics. Folks go on vacation. Many grassroots supporters tune out. Campaigns hit the “summer slump.”
That’s what Jason Miyares and his MAGA donors are counting on. That we'll slow down. That we’ll assume someone else will step up. Let our guard down with just three months until Election Day.
Folks, I REFUSE to give them that satisfaction.
Donald Trump's MAGA machine doesn't take August off. The Republican Attorneys General Association doesn't pause their attack ads for summer vacation. Jason Miyares doesn't stop cashing checks from MAGA donors just because it's hot outside.
But I’ve got a message for them: We're going to break the August curse. We're going to build the strongest grassroots movement Virginia has ever seen. And we're going to send Jason Miyares packing this November.
I've spent my career fighting corruption and standing up for Virginia families. I didn't get into this race to play it safe or follow conventional wisdom.
But I can't do it if our fundraising dries up...
Friend, we can’t lose momentum now. That’s exactly what Jason Miyares and his MAGA-backers are counting on. Please, donate $15 or more right now so we can send Miyares packing this November. » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_new-gen-election-em_q32025?amount=15]
DONATE $15 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_new-gen-election-em_q32025?amount=15]
DONATE MORE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_new-gen-election-em_q32025]
Thank you,
Jay Jones
Jay Jones for Virginia
1490-5A Quarterpath Road, #195
Williamsburg, VA 23185
United States

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td0556e18-4a01-4619-a7db-20e78a51219e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

clean_body: Dear Peter, I've been praying over this moment... And now I want YOU to be among the first in America to know: I 'm officially launching my campaign for U.S. Senate and . ? This race isn 't just about one seat, Peter. It's about saving our majority, saving our country, and stripping power away from one of the most radical Democrats in Washington, D.C. But before rushing over your support, please allow me to introduce myself. My name is Mike Collins. Before I ever stepped foot in Congress, I was behind the wheel of a big rig - hauling freight from one side of the country to the other. Plain and simple, I've never met a trucker I don't like. But politicians in Washington, D.C.? I'm sick of just about all of them. There 's no better example than Democrat Jon Ossoff - my Trump-deranged opponent in this race. He'll tell you himself: his number one priority as Senator is to IMPEACH President Trump over more bogus, made-up charges! Is this what the people of Georgia want? Hell no. But is that what the people of Georgia - what Americans like YOU - will get if Jon Ossoff wins re-election? You can bet the house on it. You see, instead of hiring a bunch of high-brow "consultants" to run polls in my home district, I've been on the ground actually speaking with voters. And let me tell you: they want secure borders. They want cheap gas and affordable groceries. They want the government off their back and out of their pockets. So I 'm diving into this race head first - to haul Jon Ossoff out of the Senate and put this country back in the hands of the people. But I can't win this battle alone. ? ** Look - this is not going to be an easy fight. Jon Ossoff has already raked in $11.3 MILLION from wealthy Democrat donors from across America.**$3.5 million of it is coming from California and New York. And this is just in the first quarter of 2025 alone, Peter. Now, I never claimed to be a DOGE wizard... But if my math is right, by the time the midterm elections are here, Jon Ossoff could be sitting on a . That 's why I'm revving up my Senate campaign now -- and why I need conservative fighters like you to be fully bought-in with me. Here 's the gameplan: 1\. Dominating the ground game >>** Georgia has some of the lowest Republican voter turnout in the entire country, which is why the Democrats have been able to keep their tyrannical grip over our state for far too long. I need your help to do a full 180 on this. . 2\. Securing our elections >>>**** The Democrats used and abused Georgia during the 2020 election. We know that. And we know there are now thousands of illegal aliens in the Peach State ready to vote blue. Republicans like you and me must stop all voter fraud in Georgia and secure our elections. That work starts now. 3\. Launching hard-hitting TV ads >>> In Georgia, that means ripping Jon Ossoff to shreds for posing as a "blue-collar American" despite "studying abroad" in London and going to private school in D.C. Nationwide, you and I must expose his deranged plot to seize control of the Senate and impeach President Trump for a third time. Will you help me EXECUTE each one of these campaign objectives as one of my top grassroots advisors? **** Bottom line, Peter, this is a race Republicans CAN and MUST win I need patriots like you fighting in the trenches with me now, laying a strong foundation to deliver a DEVASTATING BLOW to Jon Ossoff on election day.
